reviews.text:
I have met and even been hired by many attorneys and law firms over the years. Kia sands out among the crowd with his down to earth approach, desire to help people, and caring attitude.
He also has transparency which many attorneys lack nowadays. That is very apparent even in his billing practices.
I would not hesitate to recommend Kia and his firm to anyone with an accident injury or for estate planning.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much Dan for your review. I am grateful and happy to hear of the impression you have of me and my firm.

reviews.text:
Since I started my business eight years ago I've thought that I should probably update my will and have some sort of plan. But I hate to plan. My father died when I was 16. I remember the lawyer coming to his hospital bed not long before he died having him sign papers. I didn't want that to happen to my family. But I still dreaded the thought of doing anything.

When I met Kia Hohaia and learned that he did wills and estate planning I asked for his help. I'm so glad I did! Kia set up my will and a family trust. He made the entire process easy and painless. He was very skilled at guiding me to the decisions that would really be best for me and my family. I never felt pressured or skeptical of his care for me. He was an excellent, patient listener. He helped me understand what would happen to my family if I passed away and what inheritance my family would lose in probate.

Thanks to Kia I know that whenever I pass away my family will not be burdened with all the legal hassles of inheriting my business and assets. With Kia's help there was nothing to dread. I recommend him highly.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much Vern for your time and effort in providing this review! It is wonderful to hear the service you received has been of value to you. It has been a joy working with you.

reviews.text: Linda and I hired Kia to prepare our Wills and Living Trust.  Kia was extremely professional with his process of explaining and developing the documents for our estate planning.  We now have the security of knowing that our assets are completely protected and that upon our death our children will avoid probate when it comes to inheriting our estate.  We will be using the services of Kia as our family lawyer for all of our future estate planning needs based on his expertise, character and professionalism.  Having Kia prepare our Wills and Living Trust is one of the smartest things we have done.  Thank you Kia Hohaia, we could not be happier.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Ken for kindly taking time to post a review of the estate planning services you received! It has been a great pleasure working with you and Linda to prepare your Wills and Living Trust plan.

reviews.text: Thank you Nathan!!! Very satisfied with the outcome!
Nate you are the best.  Thanks for winning my case.

We got better results than we'd hoped for, truly!  Thank you so much Nathan for coming in last minute, dodging and navigating all the last minute obstacles like a pro, and coming in on top of the game for us in no time!  Well done!  We actually dealt with 2 lawyers from Bradley Johnson, Aaron Swenson first, followed by Nathan Trudeau, and were assisted throughout every detail by Ian Marlow and many of their exceptional staff.  We were treated with the UTMOST respect through the entire process, our calls and communications were addressed/returned promptly, usually the same day, and we were always made clear on the entire process.  It can be stressful no matter what dealing with courts and attorneys, but we felt none of that with this firm...if needed, and we sure hope not, we know who to call if we do! Brad is the most amazing person you will ever meet, he took my case and was there to win, he made me feel comfortable in an uncomfortable environment. I’m so glad that he was on my side. Searching for a disability attorney I came across this attorney. We exchanged a few emails and I advised Ms. Burchfield I was needing to start the appeal process and was on a time line. After a week of emails we set a time for me to come to her office. I showed up on time and upon introducing myself I hadn't barely sat down when she said to me that something I said in my email gave her great concern. She said it was the sentence of me saying, I feel my case could be won on appeal. That was the whole sentence that bothered her. She then proceeded to tell me she doesn't feel comfortable taking my case and won't be taking me on as a client. I was floored. This woman had the audacity to make me drive all the way to her office when she already had her mind made up she wasn't going to be taking me on as a client because of one sentence I said in an email? I told Ms. Burchfield I was extremely disappointed because that was something she could have told me over the phone. She wasted my time and had no problem doing it. I wasn't in her office but 20 seconds when she advised me of this.
I told her I felt it was very unprofessional to take one sentence that wasn't rude or condescending and was a simple opinion. And deny me representation then knowingly have me come to her office when she could've very easily made a phone call or sent me an email.
But to deny my case because I felt somewhat confident about my case.....really? Shouldn't all clients and attorneys feel somewhat confident about winning their case? I think they should. Why try at all if one thinks they're going to lose.

I will attest to all the other 5 star reviews given. Cynthia isn't only fun to interact with as she has an amazingly Kool personality but further to the point is an absolute kick ass attorney. Above and beyond good as not only does she win your case but keeps you informed the entire way. Many attorneys grace you with arrogance Cynthia graces you with results. Need a good disability lawyer you have found one in Cynthia. Definantly recommended.

Cynthia took care of me and helped me through the entire process of my disability case every step of the way. I could never thank her enough for all her years of hard work and I always recommend her to my friends, family, and acquaintances who are also struggling with disability and getting the assistance they need. She treats people as people and not as a paycheck or just a number.

Cynthia is very kind and VERY dedicated. She helped me so much, and does such good things for disabled folks out there. A true ally to the disabled community. I would highly recommend her services to anyone disabled or injured ❤️❤️

Being arrested in May of 2025 was the darkest day of my life. Following extensive research by my family to secure the services of a dynamic and fitting attorney for representation, we retained attorney Kurt Stender.

Kurt immediately displayed the respect and dignity needed in a trying time, expertly navigated the complexities of the law, considered my desired outcome, professionally recommended positive actions to take, and provided unwavering support toward a constructive and beneficial decision.
Highly recommended!

If you are fumbling through the internet, hoping to find the right attorney for you, reduce your stress and give Kurt a call. This is not a sales pitch, but honest and proven advice on my behalf.

In ending, I would like to share this fitting quote, “In life, there are those who often talk about what needs to get done… then there are those, who do what others only talk about”.

Thank you again Kurt, for allowing me to continue my positive journey in life, while still being able to walk in the light…

kurt came highly recommend for a reason, he's great at what he does. People dont realize how important it is to have someone that truly understands the fundimentals of todays broken court system, it has changed majorly. I was in a situation where I felt pinned against a wall and was gona suffer consequences I didn't deserve. Kurt lead the 12 month battle and got my case dismissed.  Thank you Kurt for returning my piece mind and protecting my backgroud!

Kurt is an amazing attorney who has been absolutely stellar and worked with me throughout my case gaining a favorable outcome. Kurt was present at every hearing and has been there when I needed to talk about things throughout the process. He is more than an attorney, he is someone I know I can trust as a friend. Kurt does not walk away just because a favorable judgment, he will make sure you are protected moving forward.

I would like to extend my deepest gratitude to Kurt Stender for his relentless dedication and expertise in handling my DUI case, which was particularly complicated and difficult. Thanks to his outstanding work ethic, integrity, and knowledge, he played a vital role in helping me avoid both vehicular assault and DUI charges. He effectively identified and presented key facts and evidence to the jury to prove my innocence, resulting in a Not Guilty Verdict. I highly recommend Kurt Stender to my friends and families!!!

Sincerely,

Franklin J.C Aguon

I am very grateful for you, Kurt Stender, for your unwavering support throughout my brother's DUI case. The state tried to charge my brother on his first offense, even after he already spent days in jail and finished his required classes. Not to mention his BAC was below the limit and that night of his accident, there was heavy smoke on highway 507. He even cared for the guy who he hit and held him until ambulance came. So, thank you Kurt for fighting hard for my brother. He's such an amazing man, despite his DUI. Your finesse in handling the situation and emotions was remarkable. You've have shown exceptional commitment and we highly recommend you to anyone facing similar circumstances. We cannot thank you enough, Kurt! God Bless You.
-Cherish (Franklin's sister)

I have now hired Kurt on two separate occasions, both with the desired outcomes achieved. He is easy to communicate with, realistic, and understanding of the situation. I would recommend his business and return again, although I hope I won’t need to.
Would highly recommend Mr. Stender. He guided me through and kept me informed on the process the entire time. Furthermore, he was able to negotiate a favorable outcome for my case. Thank you, Kurt!

I had an great experience working with Kurt as my lawyer. From the very beginning, Kurt took the time to explain that I had an ongoing case, which I was completely unaware of. His expertise and dedication were immediately evident as he helped get rid of a warrant, making the court process remarkably smooth, even when I myself was very anxious about it. Instead of serving time, Kurt managed to get me into a program, which was a far better outcome than I could have hoped for. He is a very level-headed individual who listens to you, sticks to the facts and most importantly gives it to you straight even if it’s not what you want to hear which I really appreciated the authenticity and honesty. I highly recommend Kurt to anyone in need of legal assistance.

I want to express my most sincere thanks to Mr.Kurt for his professional representation during the whole year of 2023 on my case. I admire your composure, work ethic and most of all excellent representation.
K.

I am giving *my* highest rating for Kurt. It's my own little windmill-tilting effort to fight rating inflation. All of us can do better. My normal rating for attorneys is 2 or 3 stars. I have vetted over a hundred in many practice areas. It's REALLY difficult to find attorneys who have not been corrupted by greed and/or power. Kurt was honest, caring, competent, forgiving, and dedicated to my cause. I had false allegations of violation of a NCO brought by the mother of our child. She had colluded with corrupt female police officers and a "me too" activist female prosecutor with little ethics to bring 5 charges against me, seemingly because I possess a Y chromosome, and despite the fact I'm a feminist and BIPOC ally, veteran, volunteer, and model community citizen. 3 previous attorneys were not willing or able to fight the system. Kurt took my case. Two of the counts were dismissed and I was acquitted by a jury of our peers in the remaining 3, clearing my record. Recently I had another situation where My ex tried to set me up again. Off the clock and after hours, Kurt took my call. Attorneys with the aforementioned qualities are rare. He earned and will continue to earn your business.

Kurt is an amazing attorney!! You know he’s good when you see someone outside of court your goes out of their way to let you know you got a good one! He played the cards just right and got us everything we wanted plus more!! I recommend Kurt, where he gets the charges amended and time suspended!! Without even going to trial!! Thanks Kurt, much love!!

Was an awesome experience with him as my lawyer he was so ready to take it to the box and he was very reassuring in this case they drop it all and for the first time ever I walked away with no fines or jail time thx you for working with me in my time of need

Kurt helped me to have my case dismissed, it was my worst nightmare.  I didn't do anything wrong, and Kurt was instrumental in the dismissal.  Lesson learned:  DON'T EVER SAY ONE WORD TO THE POLICE - CALL KURT!

I highly recommend Mr. Stender if you are in need of a defense Attorney. He is extremely professional both in and out of the court room. Mr.Stender gets the job done and makes you feel at ease in whatever your situation might be. Extremely knowledgeable, excellent communicator and a accomplished Attorney.

Kurt Stender is a good and honest lawyer and man which is very hard to find these days. He represented and stood by me on short notice through a gut wrenching family matter that went to court. He did not judge me or my family, but instead did everything that he could to figure out the best outcome and then guided and helped me do what was necessary to achieve that outcome. What I had to do was very miserable and difficult, but I could count on Kurt being only a phone call away with advice and help. After 10 long months, my family is now starting the long but needed process of healing thanks to Kurt's efforts. He listens and talks through things, laying everything out clearly but still treats you like an intelligent person. He is calm and persuasive, exploring all avenues and options available. I would recommend him to any and all of my friends.
Thanks Kurt

I'm giving Kurt 5 stars because he is a very genuine, professional, and great lawyer. Before hiring him I called around to plenty of lawyers most before even fully listening to my case "I'm gonna need $ payment" "Payment" "Payment" Not Kurt, not only did he take time out of his own day to talk about my case but he also gave me examples of what happened in some of his other cases which related to mine, that really helped me feel comfortable.

I was facing assault 2 with a possible gun enhancement in which I believe is 3-9 months jail time. Kurt got it down to a gross misdemeanor, NO jail time! Need I say more? If you need a lawyer in the Tacoma area Kurt Stender is the one to go to!

After over a decade of mental and physical abuse by way of “my other half”, I found myself with a sudden retaliatory domestic violence telephone harassment charge against me. My ex had left me for another woman, which meant I was now the sole provider for our mutual child. While I struggled for months to find a job, I received the news that the automatic no-contact order involved in my charge would prevent me from working for virtually any employer in my field of work. I was completely devastated and didn’t know where to turn. That is, until I hired Kurt.

Kurt was nothing short of AMAZING! He is by far the most talented defense lawyer, with a calm demeanor, yet skillful persuasion. He took immediate action on my case, never once judged me for the situation I had found myself in, and implemented defense mechanisms I would never have even thought of. Kurt was able to get my no-contact order lifted, a next-to-impossible feat. Thanks to Kurt, I am now employable!
-J.C.
An attorney that really cares! This is someone who will do the work because he cares about his clients and his community. I would trust him with any legal matters and I recommend him highly!
Kurt Stender is an experienced and highly competent attorney.  I am glad that I have him in my corner!

I've never met such a passionate and professional attorney.  Molly and the firm has handled several cases for me. Friendly, organized, and had supported me in all aspects. I know I can count on the people that respresent this company.

I required Molly Crowley's services several years back and she was nothing but professional and respectful. Her office did a great job. In fact, if needed, I wouldn't hesitate to employ her services again. It's hard for me to see Molly doing anything but exceptional work.
Very bad service, I called to report on a gallballer removal medical malpractice case. They are so impatient to listen to my case. And finally they hang up on me. This is grossly unprofessional.
compassionate, attentive, punctual, effective. fantastic firm. highly recommended.

I was already working with a attorney for a personal injury claim when I was hit while riding my bicycle bleake Kremer office got me a settlement in about six months I was amazed and Kate is wonderful I’m still waiting on finalizing the other case and it’s been over three years definitely would recommend Blake’s office

I cannot express enough my gratitude for the representation I received from Blake Kremer. From our very first consultation, his professionalism and dedication were immediately apparent.
What truly set this firm apart was their prompt responsiveness. Every call was returned within hours, every email answered thoroughly, and I never felt left in the dark about my case progress. In an already stressful situation following my injury, this level of communication provided immense peace of mind.
Blake went above and beyond and was able to negotiate my case with the best possible outcome. Their legal expertise was evident in the strategic approach they took with the insurance company. When the initial settlement offer was inadequate, they negotiated firmly but professionally, ultimately securing compensation that covered past and future medical expenses.
Throughout the entire process, I felt genuinely cared for as a person, not just a case number. This attorney's combination of legal skill, responsiveness, and compassionate approach made an incredibly difficult time in my life much more manageable. I would recommend their services without hesitation to anyone in need of personal injury representation.

Law Office of Blake Kremer does an excellent job. They are professional, easy to work with, and truly care about their clients. They handle everything smoothly and keep you informed. If you need a car accident lawyer, they are a great choice!

I highly recommend Law Office of Blake Kremer. They are professional, helpful, and make the process easy. Their communication is clear, and they fight for the best results. A great choice if you need a car accident lawyer!

I can’t recommend Blake Kremer and his staff enough! From the start, Mr. Kremer and his team were exceptional. They took the time to answer all my questions, no matter how small, and always made sure I felt informed and supported throughout the process. Their persistence and dedication were evident as they fought hard to ensure I was treated fairly.
Not only did they achieve a great outcome for my case, but their professionalism and compassion made a stressful situation so much easier to navigate. If you’re looking for a car accident lawyer who truly has your back, this is the team to trust!
Blake Kremer and his staff were exactly the right people to help me with my car accident!

5star because this is where I’m running back every time I love them there great and so helpful respectful and on top of their work 100% they’ll have your back if your in a car accident I worked with Kate and she was absolutely the best and also reassured me through the case Better then my own insurance.

Blake Kremer advocated for our family during a time of crisis. He was thoughtful and sensitive in how he approached our situation while being a strong and protective champion for our cause. Blake was tireless in his research and fact-finding as ours was the first of this particular type of personal injury case he'd taken on. His thoroughness, commitment and concern for our wellbeing got us to the other side of a very difficult time in our lives. I highly recommend Blake Kremer as a personal injury attorney, he is simply one of the best.

I have NEVER had problem with actual firm until 2 weeks ago with the intake process. I called twice no one called me back. I called the receptionist she had every excuse. I don't care..not what a former client wants to hear. Just get someone to take my information. She took it and still no one called me back. Over a week and half out I called again and said no one still has called me. She said if I was this upset why would I want them to represent to me. Well.. it's the lawyers I want to represent me, not the intake person or her the receptionist. She got a manager or someone on the phone and then the intake person called me. Three days later which is today,
I had a complete different question. The receptionist asked me my name. She stated she was supposed to remind me they declined my case. Well..I am not sure where the reminder comes in because I wasn't even told this information. She said the intake gentleman said to tell me if I called..lol. What?! I asked to talk to someone about this. She said it was the intake person. I didn't want to talk to him. I feel my case feel on deaf ears due to my previous 5 phone calls to get an intake call. I hope the lawyers are aware of who and how their cases are being screened and not even getting handled.

reviews.text:
I was the opposing party in a family law case where Mr. Loran represented my ex-spouse.

The case took significantly longer than expected, and communication and follow-through from his side often seemed delayed or inconsistent. Eventually, both sides reached a settlement (a CR2A agreement), which Mr. Loran himself filed with the court. That agreement required certain documents to be submitted within 45 days — a deadline that has now passed without completion.

These delays have created real-world consequences, including additional costs and the postponement of a planned property refinance. I’ve filed a formal grievance with the Washington State Bar Association to document my experience and to help ensure future matters receive the diligence they deserve.

This review reflects only my personal experience and opinions based on public court proceedings and communications during my own case. Others should make their own judgments, but I would encourage anyone involved in a similar matter to pay close attention to timelines and communication.

Joe Loran was my attny in a major Custody battle for my son and his dad. He didn’t prepare me for trial he didn’t explain anything to me I was completely devastated by my son being taken from me and all he said was “well the child has been with the father for a few months now I don’t think the court will change that back to you” I had/have an emotional bond with my son that will never be broken and he didn’t fight for me. Malpractice!!!!! Looking back from 10years ago I got railroaded in trial only got to see my son a few times a month. All because of the shitty attny I had that won’t do his job LAZY!!! and the messed up judge who ruled on this. my son has experienced major psychological damage from this. Thank god everything has changed now. Don’t hire this firm
Joe is the best. Michael Ritchie was also one of the All time greats. Both one of a kind. Love those guys,and forever greatful!

Joseph Loran was more interested in explaining to me how he became chapter president of the Northwest Hair Club for Men, than he was handling my case that involved a divorce and custody of 3 children. Terrible ethics, arrogant attitude, ridiculous costs. He'll charge you for using tissue in his office. Go elsewhere!
Joe Loran is the most honest, helpful, fair, and patient attorney you could ever find!

I have been a client of Joe Loran for many years.  He has represented me through child support and child custody matters. His representation was a true godsend during a difficult and emotionally-charged time in my life. I highly recommend anyone needing legal representation to retain Joe.  With him, I guarantee you will have the best, ethical and compassionate attorney in the Puget Sound area.

Ritchie helped me and my mom through quite an ordeal , when other lawyers tried to make us spend thousands , Ritchie showed us better and substantially less costly ways to do things. I highly recommend him.

Brandon and his team are the best hands down........... If you are ever in need they are there for YOU!!!!!!!!!!!!!!.....    very helpful and willing even when their not going to make any money....   says a lot about an attorney these days...

This is the best lawyer!! He answers questions with simple answers!! He does what he says!! He is honest and trustworthy!! This is hard to find in an attorney!! We had a dirt bag customer who did not want to pay for a beautiful deck we built him! Once we found tom he got to work right away and the dirt bag paid because he knew tom was not messing around and he was going to lose in court!! We have had tom do all our business issues from contracts to simple questions and he is always happy to help! He has always been upfront with pricing and never charged more than stated before he began work! I can’t thank him enough for all his time and hard work! No need to ever go elsewhere tom is our go to business lawyer!! Thanks tom!!!
Tom jumped on a need I had for representation.  Thankful for his service and he took his time to understand my situation.
Absolutely incredible, professional, and truly fight for you.

Karl is meticulous,  thoughtful and persistent. Although this is never a fun process, Karl made it as easy and painless as possible. Barb and the office staff were awesome. It was a long and painful road and ended with a pot of gold! 🤑
Great attorney and staff! Very knowledgeable and professional. I would highly recommend Karl Zeiger to anyone who needs an attorney.
Fast communication with helpful customer service.

Karl and Barb are amazing, I was always kept in the loop as to the progress of my case by Barb. My results were way above what I was expecting, Karl did an outstanding job getting my case finalized and closed and fought for me. This is your team if you need an injury Attorney and an amazing team backing you during a tough process! I’d give 10 starts if I was able!! 👏🏼👏🏼👏🏼

A great listening ear and compassionate. Help is here.
Mr Zeiger is a great attorney to work with.

After getting into a car accident, I decided to hire Michael Fisher as my lawyer. With dealing with my injuries and having to work, I didn’t also have time to deal with the phone calls, and everything that would go along with dealing with the aftermath of my accident. Michael and his office staff handled everything and did an excellent job making it very easy for me to recover and get back to regular life. I didn’t have to lift a finger and when it came time towards the end, they helped me along the legal process of what my part was. They made it very easy. I’m very happy with the services that he and his company provided and I would highly recommend him!
It was a pleasure working with Mike. He kept me updated on any action that was occurring or should be taken.

When I had my accident 3 years ago I hired Mike Fisher as my attorney, that was the best decision I could have made, there were some friends recommending their attorney but I had a good feeling about Mr Fisher and my feelings were right.
Mr Fisher handle my case the way I needed it handled, he was always on top of things never kept me in the dark, he was straight to the point and made sure all of my questions and concerns were addressed.
The doctors he reffered me to were also very professional,they were concerned about my long term health and educated me on how as I age my injury could affect my ability to function, thanks to the team of Doctors and Mr fishers caring for my health I am educated about ways and things I can do to try prevent further injury from everyday life functions I didn't know can cause injury to me if not performed properly
Thank you Mike Fisher for caring for me and not the Dollar, I will refer all of my family and friends to you.
I would recommend Mr Fisher at any time. He is loyal to his clients and is very compassionate in his work.

Mike is honestly the best and was a beacon of hope to myself and my family. He is very knowledgeable, professional, genuine and responsive. I was going through a very rough time and I was an emotional mess he was sincere and brought a peace of mind to me. He certainly exceeded my expectations. I am eternally grateful for his service and I highly recommended Mike Fisher. Thank you so much!
Mike is wonderful! He is so responsive, and we really feel that he has our best interests at heart.
Have used mike a few times, can not have anymore faith in anyone then him. his honesty and integrity is second to none, but the real talent is his ability.

I have worked with Mike for many years and continue to be impressed with his exceptional level of expertise, professionalism and genuine caring about his clients to make sure they receive what they are entitled to receive. I strongly suggest working with him for all personal injury needs from car accidents to the mistreatment of our elderly loved ones.
Highly recommend Thomas Adkins, he will fight for you and what's in your best interest. He's the BEST in my opinion!!
As usual nothing, nothing, nothing.
Tom handled my L&I claim... He is a Fantastic Attorney...

Tom Adkins is very knowledgeable. He has been great to work with and still working with him.

Highly recommended if you are looking for an attorney that handles L&I cases

Mr. Adkins was my attorney when I was injured at Boeing and it was a very difficult case and he was able to help me a great deal thanks to him I wasn't left out in the rain I would definitely refer Tom to anybody in need of an attorney, thanks again Tom I'll be sending business your way
Thanks Mr Adkins for all you do to help your clients.

Tom helped me with an L&I claim, I had no idea what I was doing or how to navigate the system, and handing my case over to him was the best decision I made. He was kind, patient, and explained everything to me. He also ended up getting me a great settlement and I hardly had to do anything. I am so grateful!
Best lawfirm I have ever encountered  extremely  helpful and they are a no bs  kinda place and Thomas  Adkins  is the best ....
The team at Wallis law firm were amazing. I received excellent service and support and very satisfied with the outcome.
Excellent service. The founder of this law firm, Barry Wallis, is a compelling personality and is incredibly competent. Anybody looking for great lawyers should definitely consider this firm.

DO NOT USE THIS LAW FIRM!!  I personally experience Barry Wallis failing to look up the facts about me. Mr. Wallis use an 11 years old Protective Custody Arrest and turned it into a life a crime for me, instead of properly protecting me. When I met him I had no criminal record but a long history of being abused record within the legal system. Instead of opening my case he, along side of my abuser, convinced me I would go to prison, He also used the same abusive words my abuser used and claimed I would never see my child again. Please do not waste your money on a man who only cares about your money. Since when he was free ... he did not have time to save anyone properly.

Having had the need of a law firm to address some issues with the courts I am happy to say the outcome using the Wallis Law Firm was a great one.
Professional and highly competent, they were able to assist our family and the outcome was very favorable. Should I need similar services in the future I would be sure to utilize this firm again.
Thank you.

Barry and Cambria were (and continue to be) wonderful to work with. I had a real estate case that appeared to be simple at the outset, but as some unexpected twists and turns came up, Barry and his team really shone. I got a rare combination of great advice, excellent area expertise across a range of legal issues that arose, and solid business instincts, so that I could have useful conversations about how to get my deal done. Even the other party in the transaction was thrilled to be dealing with Barry, because of his degree of professionalism, expertise, and ability, with Cambria, to move the deal forward. Not every legal matter has to be a dispute, but how often can you say that the other side appreciated your lawyer too?

This has been one of the greatest law firms, it was a shot notice and a dire need for help. Marci Granquist- Rya and Cambria Queen accepted the case in a timely manner and they really helped out my family. I would recommend them to anyone needing legal assistance in Pierce County and hopefully not, but if need be I would definitely use them again.
Thank You!

This past year I engaged the Wallis Law Firm for our business.  They provide excellent and timely service, are very knowledgeable and above all a professional practice.  I strongly recommend them to any small business seeking a quality law firm.

Wallis Law Firm has a comprehensive philisophy which focuses on meeting their clients legal needs through a competent, skilled and caring staff who strive to make the customer feel their situation is under control at all times. The firm endeavors  to clarify the complexaties of modern law and  assure each and every case is given the attention it deserves. Based on outcomes this legal team makes you fell as though you were the most important client they have.

Barry Wallis and his team are consummate professionals who get the job done for his clients. Between his intellect, passion, doggedness and savvy, you can't go wrong! Hire the very best in Pierce County! Hire Barry Wallis!

The Wallis Law Firm provides a valuable service to our community.  My family was injured by the negligence of a property owner and the financial loss was huge.  Mr. Wallis fought for my family and held the property owner to account.   My family's financial future was restored and we are forever thankful!!

By association, I had the pleasure to work with Barry and his team on an important case that lasted in upward of 20 months. Throughout, Barry was responsive, engaged and genuinely interested in making sure justice was served for his clients. He did just that. He obtained an incredible award and was "hands on" in every turn of the matter. He's a kind soul and his extensive knowledge of the law is the foundation of his practice. He truly cares and it shows in how he and his talented staff handle their clients/cases.
Wallis Law, and particularly Marci and Barry, work tirelessly on my behalf. They were able to get me a fair and just settlement for my personal injury claim
My legal documents were prepared and finalized quickly and accurately.  I would highly recommend this law firm.
My experience was very positive. Barry Wallis is communicative and responsive, transparent and professional. I would highly recommend his firm to others in need of legal services.

Mr. McGowan and his team are absolutely dedicated to getting the best result for you and your situation. No matter what they won't stop until they've exhausted all options. They also try to be very painless about each matter and proceeding due to the systems scheduling and processes, and made sure I understood everything that was happening and going on every step of the way. If I ever see myself needing a lawyer again I wouldn't hesitate to use grit city law ever

I found Matthew McGowan of Grit City Law online and was so happy I did. Of all the lawyers I called, Matthew was the first to seem to care about my complex case and asked for all the relevant details within the first 10 minutes. If you want to speak to a criminal defense lawyer who will truly give you the time of day, go with Matthew. The only thing keeping me from working with Matthew is my case being in a different state that he does not operate in, otherwise I would have loved to work together.

Matt has been absolutely amazing since the very beginning. He first helped me keep my DVPO in place and later supported me through my family parenting plan. He’s so confident and solid in his work that I never had to doubt him for a second. He made sure I was protected, understood, and actually got what I needed out of the parenting plan. He’s also incredibly personable and patient. Looking back, he put up with a lot of my anxiety and honestly, I probably didn’t even need to stress as bad as I did because he handled everything so well in the end. He always explained things clearly, answered my questions, and made me feel supported through a really hard time.
You will not regret choosing him. He’s just great in so many ways, skilled, confident, and genuinely cares about his clients.

Matthew McGowan is easily accessible, very quick to respond via phone and professional. He has 16+ years experience and he helped me make sense of a very stressful and confusing situation. Thanks to his expertise and calm demeanor, the litigation against me was dismissed. I feel like his pricing is more than fair and I don’t regret a dime spent. Tacoma, if you need legal representation, please look into Matthew MaGowan and Grit City Law!
Mr. Mcgowan is the best! and i love that he’s very truthful no matter what.

Matthew McGowan was hired to represent my husband's brother for the past 3 1/2 months. He's very honest, thorough, he worked hard to get the case dropped. He did a great job. My family and I would definitely hire him again(hope it doesn't come to that point anytime soon lol). So if you're reading this review, Matthew McGowan is the one to pick. He WILL get the job done.

Carla S.

Working with Matthew has been a pleasure. He has always remained professional, is very down to earth, and I can attest that he will fight for what is right. During my ongoing situation, he has done a lot of things he does not normally do and has provided me with resources to help me in a wild Family Law matter. I deeply appreciated the support I have received from Matthew and I assure you, you won't be disappointed with him representing you. Thank you!
Very responsive and honest attorney that delivered on their promise. Case 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 Dismissed. Thank you.

Simply the best representation anyone could ask for. I had a case that stood very little chance of winning. But Cheryl went beyond the extra mile to do research in my field of expertise so that she was better equipped to defend my case from multiple legal aspects. Cheryl's dedication and thoroughness is the only reason we were able to settle in my favor. Thank you for everything.
Amazing and trust worthy lawyer. I really appreciate Ms. Van Ackeren's time and thoughtfulness.
Very professional and amazing at what she does. Super helpful. The clerk filing my case would not stop mentioning how well prepared I was. Worth every penny!
Great website, no courtesy.
Cheryl and her team are amazing! So helpful and very knowledgeable, and down to earth! Highly recommend her.

Charles a great lawyer she works well with the military on divorce cases highly conversant with Washington state law and Military regulations. Her staff is extremely intelligent and helpful and if you need a lawyer Cheryl's the one you need

Cheryl was very professional and helpful in addressing my issue. With her help, my matter was resolved within two weeks. She responded quickly to communications, which was important as the matter was time sensitive. Her fees were reasonable and were well-worth it to have this matter solved. I would recommend her to others looking to address matters within her areas of practice.
The Van Ackeren team did amazing job with my divorce, it could have turned really bad, she made it look easy. Thank you Cheryl and your team

Cheryl and her team do amazing work. The team truly cares about the client and the outcome of the case. When you invest in this law firm, they invest in you. The most enlightening thing about this firm is their straight-forward approach to the situation. They will give sound legal advice, while teaching you why at the same time. Thank you for all you have done for my family and I!!

They have a $100 consultation fee that is not divulged upfront. When I arrived, I was informed of the fee. I explained that I was not told about this upfront. I then apologized and took responsibility for assuming it was free and not asking myself. There was no acknowledgment, apology, or responsibility taken on their end. It was just a very cold, "Well this is how it is" response.  It is not about the money, although there are many firms out there who offer free consultations, it was their inability to handle the conflict in fair, honest, and compassionate manner that really turned me off. I was very disappointed in the way I was treated by this firm. I would not recommend them.

What started out as the need for a "simple" Parenting plan, quickly turned into a nasty custody battle.  Mrs. Van Ackeren was there every step of the way to help me get through one of the most stressful times in my life.  She kept me in the loop of what was going on, advised me on what the positive and negative outcomes would be on any of the decisions i made and quickly answered any questions i had. When i first reached out for Mrs. Van Ackeren's help, I hadn't been able to see my two sons for months.  Within a few weeks I had them 3 weekends a month.  After 6 months, they were both living with me!!  I couldn't be happier with the way things have turned out.  I would definitely recommend her services (and have) to anyone.  I know that if anything else comes up, Mrs. Van Ackeren  will be there to help me and my family again.

Ms. Van Ackeren is an outstanding attorney with impeccable character.  She was crucial to helping me through an exceedingly difficult and contested divorce with the custody of a child as the main issue.  She listened to my predicament after my first attorney didn't work out, worked with me to correct the course and focus of my case, and stood by me and the facts through the final proceedings.

Ms. Van Ackeren does an outstanding job taking care of military members and their dependents.  She will listen to all aspects of your case, examine the facts and come to her own sound, informed and legally reasoned conclusions.  She does not back off from telling you straight what the circumstances are, and the reality of your choices.  Every step of the way she helps you to make the best informed decision possible for your case, even if it may not be the choice you would like, but still has the best benefits for everyone involved.

When your case may venture into unchartered waters, Ms. Van Ackeren has a wealth of knowledge to help correct matters.  She is also more than willing to seek out the correct information from trusted expert professionals in the necessary fields.  As former military, Ms. Van Ackeren understands the issues affecting military members and their families.  She trusts in the character of her clients, and your faith in her character will be constantly validated.  If you need legal representation in military matters or military related family law, I highly recommend you seek out Ms. Van Ackeren's legal representation.

When dealing with injuries from a car accident, it's crucial to have an attorney with specialized experience and a proven track record in personal injury cases. I've had the opportunity to work with Chris on behalf of several of my patients, and I've witnessed his effective, 30-year no-nonsense approach in negotiating with insurance companies and their representatives. He consistently delivers strong results while prioritizing his clients' well-being. I highly recommend Chris to anyone seeking skilled, dedicated representation that leads to favorable outcomes and better recoveries.
Chris Mahoney is an honest and trustworthy person. Will work hard for his clients.

I have been a client here, since my first accident claim in 2000. They took such good care of me and my needs after my injury, that they are my first n only call regarding any claims. I have used them 4 times since 2000 n have gotten good results from my claims.

Chris Mahoney is a awesome lawyer who handled my case. We won and I got a settlement. I would recommend him to people looking for a good lawyer. As I would use him again if needed.

Sincerely, Rebecca

Impressive firm. They really care about their clients. They listened generously, and spent a great amount of time understanding the our case. They know they business well and made our voices really hard in the court. We are so grateful to have won the case, and with out the Tufts Law firm it wouldn’t have been possible.

This man Douglas Tufts and his associate which is his dear friend Gary I've come to know them before they handled my auto accident claim 2 auto accident claims and a dog bite they're absolutely real down-to-earth full hearted guys who are true to their word very professional they get the job done very caring I love these two guys God bless them both
Conor was very helpful in documenting a business transaction.  Timely service and would definitely use him in the future.

Conor represented us for our Last Will & Testament. It was complex as we had numerous real estate properties & LLC"s. He explained everything in detail & gave us options for what would fit our wants & needs. He was professional & knowledgeable. We now have peace of mind. Thank you, Conor!
Conor has been helpful resource for my business and personal attorney needs
We have used McCarthy Law several time's over the years. Conor is a beacon of hope, always ready to assist us in any legal action we have had. Outcomes have all be successful.

I had Connor represent my interests in a rather convoluted and difficult matter. Connor's tenacity, high ethical standards, and great knowledge of law won the day for me.
I wouldn't hesitate to recommend him to friends and family. And I would definitely hire him again to represent my interests if the need arises.

If you're searching for an excellent lawyer, I highly recommend Conor McCarthy.  His expertise is in estate planning, workers compensation, and real estate. I've found him ethical, conscientious, and hard working. I've been very satisfied having Conor McCarthy as my lawyer. Edie Pagliasotti

I hired Attorney Conor McCarthy in 2016.

I had sustained a serious work injury and was having problems communicating and understanding the process with the Washington State Labor and Industries.

Conor McCarthy was a godsend, he completely took control, worked successfully with L&I and ultimately brought my case to the best conclusion for my injury and case.

Without hesitation, I highly recommend Attorney Conor McCarthy.
Connor was the primary legal advisor for Tacoma’s waterfront revitalization on the Foss Waterway. I was the project manager. Note in private practice he did a great job on my will.

Conor McCarthy has been my attorney for years.  He is honest, trustworthy, knowledgeable and gets the job done efficiently and effectively. They did what they said they would do, which is restore my gun rights at the state and federal levels. It took 5 months because the court was dragging their feet. I live in another state and after the restoration I was denied a concealed carry permit. This is because the state gives power to the State Police, and they can see that I’ve had a felony, so it’s a no. In Washington I could get one, but not where I live. I didn’t know this, but I also didn’t specifically ask. I did ask if I’d be able to purchase and own firearms; Yes. I asked if I’d be able to purchase NFA items; Yes. I’ve now done both with no issue. Vitaliy also offered to have my juvenile record sealed for a bit extra, and I chose to do this as well. A sealed juvenile record is hidden from the public, but not state and government agencies, hence my permit denial. Also, a sealing of records and expungement are NOT the same thing. I’m mentioning this for anyone that doesn’t know, because I didn’t. I live in a constitutional carry state so I can carry concealed anyway. Vitaliy and his team are good at what they do, I recommend them to anyone wanting their rights restored. Just don’t expect any enthralling conversation from Vitaliy. Every time I emailed with a question, I’d get a one word answer with no further explanation. Maybe that’s my problem for wanting to understand how everything works, and why things are a certain way. He had no interest in explaining things. He’s a busy guy, what can you do. Jessica, who works in the office is the person you’ll want to reach out to for information, she’s very helpful. It was a stressful and nerve-wracking experience, but I’m glad I did it, and I’m very happy with the result.

I engaged Eric Gilman to represent me in a complex construction litigation case. The basis for the case was a faulty construction product that created damages to my property. There were four parties involved in the defense side: the manufacturer, the distributor, the installer and the inspector who approved the installation process at each step. None of the parties accepted responsibility and we were forced to go pretty far into litigation. The case was settled just weeks before trial after a successful mediation.
I have been involved in several complex litigation cases over the past 30 years and very few attorneys took a personal interest in knowing the details of the case as well as I knew them. Eric understood the case far better than the defendants’ counsel which led to several good outcomes during the litigation. I have since stayed in touch with Eric and recommended him to several business owners and I will use him again if faced with similar litigation events.

Any legal matter can present stress and uncertainty, but from the moment I consulted with Janelle, I felt a sense of relief and support. Her dedication to representing me in a professional way was highlighted throughout my time of working with her. Not only is Janelle an expert in her field, she had excellent bedside manner and made me always feel comfortable throughout my legal process. I highly recommend Janelle and her team to anyone needing her services. I will forever be grateful to her for the experience she gave me.

I contacted Beck, Chase & Gilman during a very rough time. I was lost, confused and under doctor’s care. I lost my job, my career!

If you are reading this, most likely that is what is happening to you.

You have come to the right place. Eric Gilman walked me through what needed to be done. The patience and understanding was what I needed and he provided. The communication was above par. The staff was wonderful and operated with the same set of objectives and professionalism. Desiree was great!

Honesty is foremost; on both sides. You will learn what is actionable, what is not and then whether or not you really have a case.

I decided to settle. Mr. Gilman has great negotiating skills and I am more than pleased with the results.

So, ultimately, I cannot refer Beck, Chase & Gilman enough. I would use this firm for a lifetime!
