reviews.text: Kenneth was my Ssdi Attorney. I came to the appointment with all my medical records and all supporting documents from my doctor, who was recommending I apply for disability. I did not want for the attorney to have to chase down all my documents. I wanted to be fully prepared in case he would take my case. He answered my questions and agreed to take my case. He didn't waste any time. From start to finish, I was approved in 3 months. Social security approved the back onset date, which was nice. If you need a disability or social security attorney, Kenneth Gormley is one you want to have helping you get approved. You will be extremely happy that you did.

I want to update my original review, because once the situation became clear, I realized the issue was a misunderstanding with an outdated email address listed on the website. I had been reaching out through an old account, and the messages weren’t being seen. Once we were able to reconnect, Kenneth responded with care and understanding, and was very willing to help resolve things.

This has been a deeply emotional time, as I lost my partner not long after his case, and I was navigating everything on my own. I was overwhelmed when I wrote my initial review. I now feel heard and supported, and I’m genuinely grateful for Kenneth’s kindness and willingness to help.

Thank you for your compassion during a difficult chapter.
Great ssi lawyers

Although I am still mid appeal process, And it’s been a very, very long wait, And after getting very frustrated with Ken for some initial issues with lack of communication, He went above and beyond to call me and address all my questions and continues to advocate for my case despite how hard it is dealing with Social Security lately.

I'm very appreciative that he took me on as a client during the pandemic however he dropped me as a client after deciding my case wasn't worth fighting for, he stopped returning my calls and only after I found new representation did I receive a call. A couple of months later my case settled with my new representation.

Ken Gormly has been my Disability Attorney for over 2 years. I am so grateful to Ken for his hard work getting me approved for disability.  It was stressful what Social Security puts people through but having an attorney like Ken took that stress away. I appreciate all he did for me. I knew the day I met him he was the right attorney for me. He was professional, kind and compassionate! Thank you Ken for everything!! I don’t know what I would’ve done without your help!
Ken worked tirelessly to get my terminally ill wife the SSDI she deserved. I cannot recommend him highly enough.
I've been waiting almost 5 years and he never contacts me

Ken Gormly was my disability attorney for 3 years. I got denied the first time i applied and he suggested we apply again and my case was approved the second time. He did not give up and i would recommend him if you need a social security disability attorney.

The worst lawyer I've ever had ! Absolutely no Communication. Just like other reviews say he does not respond to emails or return phone calls. You'll have to do all the leg work for him to get all the documents. You'd be better off representing yourself
I have to say my court day is tomorrow but that being said! He is an amazing lawyer. Very knowledgeable and understanding highly recommended!!!!
He knows what he's doing!
Returns phone calls promptly.

He will never respond to your e-mails so don’t even try. You’ll have to call the office and leave message after message. When you do talk to him, he seems very nice, but he makes no effort to understand you until literally minutes before you’re in front of an ALJ.
If you're looking for a social security lawyer Kenneth Firmly is the one
No willing to do the work
Never returned phone calls. Totally misrepresented me at my hearing

Hired Mr.Gormly for my disability case and heard nothing for awhile. As a person who has short term memory loss it’s no surprise i became worried. After asking questions i was told i actually did not need a lawyer until my case went to court so i called and informed Mr. gormly that i wasn’t aware of that but i would like to hire him when that step came if it came. Well now that step has came so i called to resume his services solely based on the one encounter i had with him ( in which he was very polite ) only to be met with ( just like another person has already commente) a very rude and unhelpful paralegal who informed me Mr. Gormly would not be accepting my case which is completely different from our phone conversation months ago.  For this i am leaving my rating as is and finding another attorney but i definitely had to post a review seeing as how this clearly isn’t the first time for the horrible customer service i received.

If You’re a Veteran and need a Lawyer that will make it happen,  Mr. Gromly is the Lawyer that will make it happen,.. He was my Lawyer during the whole process, he was so well prepared and organized it was quite impressive..If there was a 10 STAR he would have it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️!!
Thank you Mr. Gromly, and your WONDERFUL and HELPFUL Staff for helping me win my SSI Disability case...
Great Lawyer!
The paralegal I spoke with today was beyond rude and unprofessional.

I have my
Court date next month an I’m feeling excited aN I have Kenneth as my lawyer thank you god for him
He is very nice man to work with. He can get your social security.
Great meeting, I felt good going in, and felt at ease when I left. Nice, very cool guy. I would recommend.

Ken helped my a lot of years ago to get SSI and was with me through all the long court dates and he's always going to be the peoples Hero because he fights for you like your family and for doing the right thing. God Bless you Mr. Gormly. From Jose Delgado & family.
Ken is a very likable fellow. He is compassionate about the people he serves. He has a very down to earth easy going manner.

I have worked with Mark Anderson on five property transfers and legal one agreement.  He has always been timely, cost effective and efficient in completing services requested of him.  He has been great to work with.
Dave Ravander

The website is insecure.  They way they send letters unprofessional in the mail without serving or confirming receipt. The attempt to bully people with disabilities.  The 3 positive reviews which seem like paid reviews.  I cannot confirm this a legitimate professional business.   Maybe they will respond to this to prove they are real.  I gave them 3 stars just to see. I can't find proof this lawyer actually is a member of the bar.  Currently my only knowledge is that a letter I've witnessed from a known drug addicted "client."  I don't think the letter is real. I will gladly delete this if I am wrong.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I'm truly confused by this review. More specifics will help me help figure out where this review is coming from. I do know that the reviewer is not a client of mine.
UPDATE: It has been a week now and the reviewer has neither clarified their comments with more specifics nor have they deleted their comment having discovered they were wrong. I remain very interested to learn the basis for this reviewer's comments and am open to taking their call to discuss their concerns. The office phone number is on the Google listing.

reviews.text: Mark is always so helpful and full of knowledge and willing to help where he can! Always my first call and always who I refer when my clients need a real estate attorney.

reviews.ownerResponse: This reviewer was not our client; she was an opposing party in a lawsuit.  This one-star review appears to reflect the reviewer’s understandable frustration that she was not going to win her case against my Client.  We ultimately obtained a judgment against the reviewer.

reviews.text: Anderson Law Firm is knowledgeable, experienced and reliable. Anderson Law Firm handles each of our cases with a sense of urgency and ownership. Professionality, thorough communication and positive results make it a pleasure to work with Anderson Law Firm.
Brett Witner helped me throughout this difficult time with my case. Much appreciated!

If I could give Brett and his team 10 stars, I would! I was very upset with myself for being in this position after working so hard on my credit in the past. I had to accept that with the debt I had, I could no longer manage even the minimum payments. Brett is knowledgeable, trustworthy, and most of all patient. It took me several months to decide if I was going to file. Every doubt or question I had, Brett helped answer. He let me make my own decision with whether or not I was going to file and was there for me when I decided to do so. The day I filed. I was scared and nervous but reassured. The day I had my hearing it was not bad at all like I thought it would be. Brett prepared me well. During my 60 day waiting period. Brett and his team communicated and provided updates to my case. They provided my 60 day waiting period date and as it got closer to that date, provided an estimated discharge date. On that date, Brett emailed me telling me congratulations and that my case has been discharged. I couldn’t believe it. We talked on the phone because I really needed to hear it. The burden of trying to keep up with payments were done. I could start new.  I’m extremely grateful that Brett was my attorney in this matter. Never once did I feel judged and that was important to me. I was treated with respect.

Thank you Brett and team!!

I am incredibly grateful for and satisfied with my experience at Morton McGoldrick. I worked closely with attorney Alex Glyman, who handled my case with exceptional sensitivity, care, and support throughout the entire process. The team is highly trustworthy, professional, and truly committed to helping you achieve the best possible outcome. I couldn’t recommend them more.
Brett Wittner was amazing. He never stops working hard for you. His dedication was outstanding. He made the whole process very understanding, 10/10

Mr. Wittner and his team are phenomenal. They helped my wife and I protect our home during an unfortunate real estate dispute. Completely professional and helpful the entire way through this process. We never thought we would have to go to the lengths we did to protect our home. Brett and his team delivered on a level of care and attention that is sorely missed from todays systems. 10/10 would recommend.

Brett was professional, courteous, responsive, and helpful throughout this process, as was his staff. My questions were answered and explained. When I asked for advice, it was presented in different scenarios and when I asked what would you advise, I got clear and concise answers. I truly thank and highly recommend Brett.
Very pleasant are personable group of folks!
Brett and his team supported us throughout the entire process. They set clear expectations up front. I felt well informed and respected. They were stellar in their representation. Many thanks!

Working with Brett Wittner and his team at Morton McGoldrick, for support through bankruptcy, and the options that were best for me has been a stress relieving experience. They have walked me through each step with strong communication, explaining the legal jargon, empowering my decision making, but most importantly, advocating for me in such a personal and thoughtful way, I could not have walked this road without them. . I highly recommend that you reach out to them for guidance and representation through your own journey.
The team was very helpful and understanding throughout the entire process. They take care to ensure their clients are treated respectfully during difficult situations.

Brett and Jen have done  a great Job helping me with Bankruptcy. Brett always answered my questions quickly and has been right there with me the whole time. Jenn (Brett's Assistance) has always been there for me every step of the way. I tend to ask a lot of questions and neither of them ever minded. My papers were filed quickly and on time. Brett even called just to talk through them with me and make sure everything was there as I wanted it. My reaffirming my car debt was done and easily. My garnished wages were released immediately and I got back everything that was garnished. The whole process was really straight forward and simple. I have recommended Brett and Jen to serval co workers who have been curious and I would recommend them to anyone. The day I called lawyer I called a few most wouldn't even make the time to talk with me for a day or two. I left a message for Brett and he called me immediately. He said he could hear the panic and was heading into court but knew it couldn't wait. He had to let me know I was going to be ok, and that he would talk further with me as soon as he was done. He called after court and he became my lawyer. Brett and Jen both are all heart and total professionalism.
Highly recommend!  Brett, our attorney, was always very responsive to my multitude of questions.  He was thorough and knowledgeable and always made us feel comfortable at a most trying time.
Brett Wittner handled our case with class and punctuality. He answered all of our emailed questions quickly. He made the difficult  process simple! Would definitely recommend to anyone.

During a stressful and hard time in life, Brett & his team were kind, helpful and efficient.
I appreciate the thoroughness and communication provided to make this decision in life as smooth as possible.
Thank you
Brett and his team are fantastic. Very responsive and educated me through the entire legal process. I very highly recommend him.
Brett and Jenn are very knowledgeable and easy to talk to about the whole bankruptcy process. I would definitely recommend them and use them again if I had too.
Brett & Jenn are amazing and knowledgeable- everything was processed so seamlessly. They answered ALL my questions and are extremely responsive. I can't thank them enough!
Brett and Jenn were fantastic to work with. Their support, professionalism and communication exceeded my expectations. Thank you both!!
Brett and Jen are awesome! They were very professional and gave me expert advice! They were able to help me through very stressful times and were able to deliver on time. Thank you, Brett and Jen!!
Brett and Jen are amazing. They always respond quickly and are so helpful.  I can email them anytime and I get such quick responses.  They really treat you exceptionally well.   So happy with them.
Brett and Jenn are awesome! They're very organized and helpful, and made the process so much less intimidating.

Brett Wittner is an outstanding bankruptcy attorney—truly one of the best in the field. He is exceptionally skilled, knowledgeable, and consistently reliable. Anyone facing bankruptcy would be fortunate to have Brett in their corner!
Stress free and very thorough. Their team had easy to follow checklists of documents needed and almost all of it was submitted to Jenn …in PDF form 🙂 it made the process seamless. Thank you so much.
Brett and Jen have been so amazing to work with. They were able to help me solve my personal issue. I highly recommend Morton McGoldrick law firm.
Brett and Jenn were extremely informative, patient, friendly, and thorough throughout our entire bankruptcy policy. Very grateful for them helping us get a fresh start.

Brett helped me file chapter 13 and chapter 7 for my business last couple of years. He is THE BEST bankruptcy attorney I can think of. He is always able to communicate with me when I have a question with clear answers. I strongly recommend him if you have any questions about filling bankruptcies whether personal or business.

Spoke with Josh Fensterbush and highly recommend talking to him about any real estate issues. He did research on my situation and evaluated the documents I provided. Gave me advice and answered all my questions. Thank you!

Brett Wittner represented us in our Chapter 7 bankruptcy case in 2024.  He was referred to us by a good friend and from our very first meeting to the our eventual discharge, Brett provided us with excellent counsel that was always on the mark.  We appreciated how he handled our emotions throughout the process in a professional, yet compassionate manner.  Brett was also always clear about the his strategy and never over promised nor left us without hope.  We are extremely grateful to have had him guide us through this challenging time.  As we were considering and reviewing different attorneys, Brett stood out among them all as the only one who reviewed our case in detail before charging us for anything.  It was only until he was confident we had a good chance of winning our case, did he take us on and then requested a retainer for his fees, which were very reasonable relative to other attorneys. His professionalism and transparency was a "breath of fresh air" in a business that often is crowded with opportunistic predators trying to take advantage of folks who are in difficult situations and fearful, often due to lack of experience or education about the bankruptcy process.  I would recommend Brett to anyone considering bankruptcy.

I will highly recommend this place to everyone.
Brett Wittner and Jenn Hélped me .
They understand my situation and helped me accordingly.
I was very happy as they took care of my need professionally and in friendly manner .

Excellent Excellent Excellent! Highly recommend for your bankruptcy. Brett Wittner, and his paralegal Jenn, were outstanding! Going through a bankruptcy is very scary. They were meticulous, highly informed, listened, answered every question quickly and with compassion, and held my hand through the entire process making it seemless and painless. I can't say enough good things. I'm so grateful I chose them to represent me. Just superb!

Brett and Jenn helped me through a difficult time and situation with a chapter 7 bankruptcy. Always available for my questions and worries. I just did everything they asked, and there were no issues at any step in the process. I really could not have asked for better support from my first and hopefully only legal counsel I have ever had.

Brett and his assistant Jen came in at a time when it seemed like our life was over and gave us hope again. Brett is knowledgeable, they are incredibly responsive and I couldn’t imagine trusting anyone else with this process. I can not recommend them enough.

Brett Wittner is by far the best bankruptcy attorney in the State of Washington. He is extremely intelligent, competent, kind and trustworthy.

He has encouraged and guided my wife and I in all aspects of our bankruptcy from how to file it, how to complete all forms required throughout the bankruptcy and how to complete the documents needed to complete it in a timely manner.

He is always available to answer all of our questions and quickly returns all of our phone calls. Brett makes difficult questions easy to understand.

We could not have completed our bankruptcy without him. We encourage anyone looking for an excellent attorney, to contact Brett Wittner. You cannot find a better attorney anywhere.

Ron Anderson

Definitely recommend Brett. He listens to your situation, gives you facts and presents the best option to situation. Our situation was quite the doozy and he gave us grace in all the emotions we had and allowed us to make the decisions for us. Good communication as well. Thanks again Brett!

I'd highly recommend Brett and his paralegal, Jenn. They are amazing - patient, thorough and kind. Great response times when we'd reach out, and they helped us trouble shoot some of our challenges through our legal process. They did a wonderful job!

I filed for Chapter 7 Bankruptcy recently and Brett Wittner & Jenn Odom both did a great job helping me through the process. It can be a lot to take in at first, but they walked me through it with ease. I had many questions, sometimes the same ones over and over, but every time they were helpful and courteous. I would love to give them a 6 star if I could! Would absolutely recommend reaching out to them if you are considering any type of Bankruptcy.

Thank you again Brett & Jenn.

Working with Morton McGoldrick, PLLC has been a pleasant surprise. They apply there experience to your needs which provides comprehensive solutions and address potential problems you may not have been aware of. Highly recommend this firm.
Brett and Jenn are excellent! Helped me with all of my needs, they’re super friendly and efficient!

I contacted Morton McGoldrick through the form on their website, describing my situation and why I needed a consultation. I also provided my email address and phone number, thinking I would get a response within 24-48 hours. When that didn't happen, I then called and spoke to your receptionist/front office staff and repeated all the same information I put on the online form to her. She confirmed that Morton McGoldrick does provide the type of legal services and consultation I was requesting. However, it's now been 72 hours since I spoke with your receptionist and a week since I filled out your online form and no one has contacted me and responded from your firm. This is definitely unacceptable and a 1 star ⭐ experience. I'm not sure how Morton McGoldrick has a 5 star Google review. But clearly that's no longer accurate.

When I needed a specialized lawyer, I asked a different lawyer for the best in the field and I was given a name of a lawyer who was awesome in every way and so I paid him up front after consultation. That's when I met Jenn Odom, his paralegal. Jenn was very professional, knowledgeable, yet so down to earth and very helpful as well.

My lawyer retired soon thereafter and my case was taken over by Brett Wittner and Jenn Odom joined him. They spent 3+ more years on my case and Brett Wittner not only did an outstanding job, but he also never asked me for an additional dime even though I wasn't his original client and he wasn't getting paid for it. Talk about ethics.... Wow! That impressed me. Since then, I've had some life changes for the better (un-related to Brett's or Jenn's great work) but Brett gave me a heads up that could've cost me over $10k without his advice, and Brett still didn't ask for anything more. That's ethics in my book.

Those good life changes have also affected my handicapped sister in a good way, but she currently has a team of lawyers dancing around her good fortune. I plan on consulting Brett and Jenn again to take care of that issue. This time, I plan on paying Brett Wittner even if it's for advice. Brett and Jenn did an outstanding job and I trust them both.
Brett is  AWESOME!!! If  you are looking for an immigration attorney he is by far the best!

Brett Wittner was a guardian angel sent from heaven to pull me out of a dark place!   He was always promptly responsive and patiently explained things to me.  I found the fees to be quite reasonable for all the work he had to do, as was the payment arrangements.  I would definitely recommend his services to anyone

Within 3 months of moving into my first home in an HOA community I found myself needing a lawyer regarding the planting of trees in my backyard. After countless consults I landed at Morton McGoldrick and was paired with Daniel K. Walker. For a little back knowledge, the community my partner and I live in we are the youngest couple by 20 years, at least. The situation was silly, but we knew we did not wanted to be taken advantage of and wanted to feel comfortable living on our own home. When I tell you Dan knows what he is doing and came through for us, please believe me. After presenting the letter that Dan had drafted to our board we were able to keep our trees planted and several of the other members in our community apologized for what the situation turned into. We have now been in the community for just over a year and have not had any other issues. Dan was great at communicating and understanding our needs. I would definitely recommend his services and hire him again, if needed.

My experience working with Brett and Jenn at Morton McGoldrick is how every attorney-client relationship should be. They were responsive, professional and knowledgeable and kept me up to date every step of the way throughout my case.
My situation was VERY COMPLEX and going in my expectations for a good outcome were low. That all changed after my initial consultation with Brett. He was so knowledgeable about my options and gave me several game plans to choose from along with the likely outcomes. He gave me his advice on what would be me best choice which I agreed with and he and Jenn took it from there.
Brett came highly recommended and now I know why! His assistant Jenn kept me apprised of progress and always returned all my calls and emails immediately. I never felt alone through this.
I would recommend Brett to anyone who needs representation without hesitation. I am so grateful I retained him. One of the best decisions I have ever made.

I worked with Brett Wittner and his assistant Jenn Odom to handle my terribly complicated  chapter 13 bankruptcy.

Before meeting Brett I had filed for chapter 13 with another firm. Brett became aware of my case through a real estate transaction that his firm was working on due to my wife’s partial ownership in the property.  Brett let us know that the way our previous attorney had handled this property had caused us to have a significantly higher settlement responsibility in the bankruptcy. At no charge he laid out the new plan with its potential drawbacks and benefits. He made it very easy to understand and empowered us to make the decision that was best for us. We elected to re-file and the outcome of our case was drastically improved due to Brett’s expertise.

Jenn also kept us informed throughout the process and was very responsive in providing answers.

I know how stressful and humbling filing for bankruptcy is. It can be tempting at such a vulnerable point in life to settle. Do yourself a favor and make sure to talk to Brett and team before deciding on who you are going trust with helping you restart your financial future.

This is the best Bankruptcy attorney on the planet. The first time I used him was over 10 years ago, and because of  Covid issues I needed him again. He was good 10 years ago,  the one I am in now I got to work with him again. He did an amazing job. If you are experiencing financial problems, and need  a Bankruptcy, I fully recommend you give Brett Witter a call in Tacoma, Wa.

I have been a client since 2015 up to febuary 2021, Brett wittner has always been available and attentive when ever i needed to talk to him even after my case was settled Mr. Wittner had to re involve himself in my closed case and correct the mistakes of a creditor who was trying to keep hold of my title to my paid off car. End results was my title is sitting on his desk waiting for me to pick up. Because of the attentiveness, sincerity and over and beyond quality of service ill refer Morton McGoldrick PLLC @attention  Brett Wittner and the attorneys in that firm for help to restore your financial freedom and regain financial control of your life any day of the week. I'm proof that there is no one better for the task.
Mr. Wittner Is very gracious and amazing to his clients. He takes the time and goes the extra mile for them. I will referrer anyone to him to any one that is in need.

Brett Wittner represented myself and my husband over a period of 3 years. He was always very professional, yet personable and made us feel at ease every step of the way. He remained responsive throughout and was extremely knowledgeable. I would definitely recommend him in the future. Thank you Brett!
Heather is a very qualified attorney. She was professional, patient and at the same time tenacious. I would recommend her to anyone looking for a hard working ethical attorney.

If I could choose no stars, I would. Todd failed me as my attorney.  I won't go into details, but on two occasions he gave me improper legal advise.  My suggestion:  DO NOT use Todd Tuell as your attorney.

Todd Tuell was highly recommended by a local business. He met with me regarding a property agreement  just a short time after calling. He is personable, concise, professional, and insightful. I left knowing I’ve found great counsel!

Heather made the legal experience comfortable and efficient. She was the perfect balance between professional and personable. I would highly recommend Heather and her team, Pam and Angie, to anyone who needs legal advice and help.

It was an absolute pleasure working with Heather Young. From the first meeting to the conclusion of my case she was professional, considerate and truly advocated for me in every detail. She was very responsive in returning phone calls and emails and filed all appropriate paperwork in a timely manner. She really showed her true value at the end of a 12 hour, very challenging mediation. We were all exhausted from the very long day and she took the time to go line by line through all of the documents to be sure that what I was about to sign was what I had agreed to. This attention to detail in that moment was absolutely wonderful.
She is not only incredible at her job, she is also just a pleasure to know as a person. If you are in need of a family law attorney who is assertive, detail-oriented, strategic, and resilient, with excellent communication skills, I would encourage you to call Heather Young.

I would like to thank Tuell& Young's firm for excellence. Heather Young represented me with a family law case for my daughter. I found Heather's EXTENSIVE knowledge invaluable. She was able to help me navigate a 7 year ongoing problem and keep my cool. I have never been more pleased with my Counselor and I have had many represent me in Pierce County. There staff is polite and does communicate rather efficiently I thought. I would Highly recommend them to anyone needing help in Pierce County.
Amazing staff! Heather is thorough, pays attention to details and is easy to communicate with.
Professional and friendly and thorough

Very slow, very unprofessional, and highly mistake-prone. My dad passed away and they went out of their way to ensure they got as much of his small estate as they could. Overcharged us at every opportunity. Poor communication and straight out lying. Blamed others and made excuses. Please spare yourself the additional trauma of dealing with this agency. 1-star is too much to give them.
Very nice and helpful Attorney!!!

Made many obvious errors and never finished the 2 qdro’s she was paid to do.... I paid for a professional and never received what was paid for.  Also did not disclose she knew my ex husbands family. Avoid her!!!!!!!
Excellent lawyers.$350 for hour & 1/2 divorce consult. Excellent advice and even did a little paperwork to take to courthouse to file.
Wonderful people. Very easy to community with. Staff very friendly. Great people to have on your side

Attorney Michael Smith at Tuell & Young has been a fantastic resource for us over the years.  His experience has been great with estate planning, and business process.  We have used Michael to setup two businesses - he handled all of the paperwork, and the process was quite easy.  He also assisted with setting up living wills and advanced care directives for our family - which came in handy when my father passed away.  Highly recommend!

What a way to deal with life’s unexpected turns. Todd Tuell was great in taking care of my mother’s estate, answering questions thru the process and making it all very easy to deal with. I am so glad I found Tuell and Young. They have (in every instance) given me straight, Hands down, best options at every turn. Everyone there is always very eager to be helpful. Great people. I would recommend them to wholeheartedly to anyone that needs their expertise. They are the best I’ve found.
I have worked with Shomer Law Firm on quite a few occasions.  Kim and her team are very professional and helpful.  I highly recommend this law firm, if you are in need of any legal help.

I have worked with Mrs. Shomer for many Years. She is always a pleasure to do business with and excellent at her job. I never have any worries that what I need handled will be done in the most timely and efficient manner. I highly recommend her and her staff.

Kim is an amazing human being. In my experience no one likes to be in a position to need a lawyer. In my case I had gotten to that point.

The professionalism and genuine love for her industry and the passion to help others is a gift that not everyone possesses.

She is truly a person that takes the time to understand and help you understand the importance of looking from the outside in. The  ability to take a step back and look at the facts, then decide how to move forward based on what she thinks their next move may be is a talent.

From our family to yours, Thank You Kim!

The Bishop's
Steve Davies and his firm helped my daughter and now 20 clients later still glowing reviews from everyone.
Stephen Davies is a very knowledgeable and helpful lawyer. He has my highest recommendation for a real estate attorney!

Brian Comfort has been my, and my family’s attorney for decades.  I always find Brian to be compassionate, extremely helpful and thorough.  I appreciate his legal counsel, as he has guided me through several challenging personal situations.

This review is long over due. Last year in 2023 Patricia helped me to win my social security case. I am forever grateful for all the hard work Patricia put into my case. Patricia is very nice and caring. I appreciate all the care and work she put in to helping me. A late but A Big Thank!

Patricia is a very well accomplished attorney with great knowledge in legal services.  My experience with her was 5 stars.  She was always available for me and when she was tied up always got back to me with the complete answers I needed.  She was very responsive via e-mail and phone.  She was successful in negotiating my case and getting me the results that were in my best interest.  I highly recommend her to anyone with a personal injury case or a SS case.  I can't giver her enough thanks.
Ms. Skrinar and staff were very helpful and ended up winning my case when this was my last hope. Thank you so very much for all you did for me !
Pat is great!  I had another attorney who had failed miserably with my first claim. Pat did a fantastic job in securing SSDI for me. She is great. Thanks again Pat!
It’s very mature for a group of lawyers to leave a harassing note on your car after having it towed. I wouldn’t say this is a business ran by professionals.

Attorney Patricia Skrynar is a sharp, straight forward strategist who represented me in the highest form of professionalism and authenticity on a disability case. Her kindness, attention to detail, persistence and passion for success got me a victory on my disability case. She will go above and beyond to win any case. I highly highly recommend Attorney Patricia Skrynar.
Patricia is great so nice

My situation was made easy and stress free.
And in the end I was able to celebrate.

Thank you,  thank you for easing my stress!
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re thrilled to hear that your experience was easy and stress-free! Celebrating is what it’s all about, and we’re so glad we could help you make that happen. Thank you for taking the time to share your positive feedback!

reviews.text: Green and Lloyd took excellent care of me throughout my case. I fought for over two years and was determined not to give up. They stood by my side the entire time, fighting for me and ensuring I received what I deserved. Thank you so much! I highly recommend their services—five out of five!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your wonderful feedback! We are thrilled to hear that Green and Lloyd provided you with the support you needed throughout your case. Your determination and trust in our team made all the difference, and we are honored to have stood by your side. We appreciate your high recommendation and look forward to helping others just like you in the future!

reviews.text:
After my motorcycle accident, Greene and Lloyd were there for me.

reviews.text:
A few years ago, Kenneth helped me with a personal injury claim against my university. I had an incident where my financial aid was incorrectly filed by school administrators - it  put me in a position of either dropping out with two classes remaining or paying back $55,000 of loans in one lump sum to finish school. It was literally a detrimental life altering situation I found myself in. Prior to finding Kenneth, I notified my school of their error. They acknowledged it and told me they were working on it. After 3 months of no updates and reaching out to them 3 to 4 times a week, I realized I had a time limit of a month to have it fixed or I would automatically be forced to pay back my loans before finishing school.

He fought tooth and nail for me and negotiated multiple times with my school's legal team to get the best result. Not only did his actions as a lawyer show his competency, but his compassion and morality shone through as well.

Kenneth is one of the best lawyers out there! He changed my life, and I am forever grateful.

My car was rear-ended and totaled by an inattentive driver as I was in stop and go traffic, attempting to merge onto I5 northbound in Tacoma. Kenneth's support throughout the process of getting settlement for the car as well as the necessary, ongoing medical treatment for injuries has been exemplary. I highly recommend him for any personal injury claims!

I used Kenneth's services when a delivery truck had a hit-and-run with my house. The delivery company claimed it wasn't their fault and wouldn't pay. Kenneth's persistence in going after the delivery company resulted in not only in a check for all the repairs, but a personal settlement amount for me as well.

Kenneth was straightforward and clear in leading me through the legal proceedings and process, and I felt like he had my best interests at heart the entire time. Obviously I was pleased with the outcome. Highly recommended!

~Birgitte

Trevor thought we owed money when we had retainer left and then owed 50$. For this they missed our Lien window, filed anyway and now we are going out of business after tons of wasted effort and time.
Took us a year to realize how bad they let us down. Paying that whole time...

They took our money and did not represent us well at all.

If your business means something to you, go elsewhere.

An excellent source of practical advice and dedicated representation. I have referred a number of clients to Davies Pearson and specifically Mr. Dashiell. The care and professionalism he provides has always steered my clients appropriately. Thank you.

I hired Trevor White to assist my father with an HOA-related case. From the beginning, it was made clear that my father isn’t fluent in English and that I would be helping translate and explain details to ensure clarity. Despite this, Trevor repeatedly insisted that I couldn’t speak on my father’s behalf—even just to clarify important background information. This created a serious communication barrier that ultimately led to confusion about the situation and an outcome that fell short of expectations when the case was settled. I expected more professionalism and flexibility in handling a case involving a client with language limitations. Unfortunately, I can’t recommend his services based on our experience.
Paralegal Tonya Fries was extremely unprofessional and rude, do not recommend this firm for any services.
Mr Brian King seems to be an excellent litigator
I left a message over a week ago and I got no call back
Very  attentive and great communication with very knowledgeable attorneys. You cannot go wrong with them, period.

After another three months of trying to get the title I hired Thomas and in two months I learned the owner of the dealership had died two weeks after my purchase. Corona virus made a nightmare worse, Thomas got my title in short order. I couldn't have done it by myself, money well spent and a very good value, thank you Thomas.

Communication has been an issue. Also, emails are very unprofessional. I have a family member that had a case that could have been solved in a year, which took 4 years to solve. I continue referring clients to them based off client feedback I get.

I highly recommend Connor Jepson and Lisa Daniels. Connor and Lisa handled my case with exceptional professionalism, clear communication, and an impressive understanding of the legal process. Thanks to their hard work, dedication, and expertise, my case was successfully dismissed.

Connor went above and beyond in every aspect of his work. His professionalism, integrity, and the high value he places on his interactions with everyone involved in the process were evident throughout. He truly stands out as someone who cares deeply about his clients and their outcomes. It was an absolute pleasure to meet and work with him, and I am incredibly grateful for his efforts.

When Connor moved to another firm, Lisa Daniels stepped in seamlessly and continued to provide outstanding support. Lisa was incredibly helpful, prompt, and attentive to my needs. She ensured that the motion was filed and the case was successfully dismissed. Her ability to provide reassurance and support during stressful situations, despite her busy schedule, was truly remarkable.

I am deeply grateful to both Connor and Lisa for their dedication, professionalism, and unwavering support. If you are looking for knowledgeable, trustworthy, and compassionate attorneys, I highly recommend Connor and Lisa. Thank you both for everything you have done!

I specifically requested a particular attorney, but was told that they were unavailable and was instead assigned Gloria. This was a terrible mistake and has caused me irreparable harm.
From the beginning, Gloria made it clear she was overwhelmed and delayed any meaningful work on my case. Then, without proper preparation or explanation, she pressured me to sign a plea deal with an impossible six-hour deadline, threatening a minimum 15-year prison sentence if I refused. When I raised objections, she responded by forcing me to sign an agreement preventing me from suing her and threatening to abandon my case immediately—leaving me completely unprotected legally.

Feeling coerced and abandoned, I reluctantly signed. At sentencing, Gloria’s defense was weak and ineffective; she spoke first but allowed the prosecutor to finish and seal a harsh outcome against me. This was my first arrest and first time facing prison, and her gross incompetence directly cost me my freedom.

Beyond losing my freedom, I lost a multimillion-dollar business due to her mishandling of my case. Gloria’s performance was not only devastating to me personally and financially but also severely damaged the reputation of Vindicate Law Group. Her unprofessionalism and neglect reflect poorly on the entire firm and betray the trust clients place in their legal representation.

This experience has been life-altering in the worst way. I urge Vindicate Law Group to take responsibility, thoroughly review Gloria’s conduct, and make substantial changes to ensure no other client suffers as I have.
Connor was amazing and got my case completely dismissed. It was a pleasure to meet and work with him. Thank you very much. :)

I normally don’t leave public reviews, but I felt compelled to share my experience in the hope it helps others—and perhaps opens a door to a fair resolution.
I hired Carrie Fulton Brown for a criminal case and paid $15,000, hoping for a strong advocate. Unfortunately, my experience left me feeling unsupported and unheard. Carrie attended a couple of early hearings, but as the case progressed, I didn’t receive the level of guidance or representation I expected for such a significant fee. I was especially surprised when she didn’t show up for my sentencing and sent another attorney last minute, citing illness. I had to accept a plea deal under pressure, despite being innocent—something that continues to affect my life deeply, including my ability to find work.
I truly believe that Carrie started out with good intentions, and perhaps circumstances got in the way. But I hope that by sharing this publicly, it encourages a conversation and maybe even a gesture of goodwill or partial refund, which would mean a lot to someone in my position right now.
I still believe in fairness, and I’d be happy to speak directly if there’s a willingness to revisit how things ended.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi,
Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear that you felt unsupported in your case. Our Firm Administrator will be reaching out to you to speak with you about your experience.

--Vindicate Criminal Law Group

reviews.text: Working with Connor was very much a great pleasure!  Even when things seemed grim for me he was always calm and collected, providing all the legal advice I needed.  He was patient with my questions and thorough with all his explanations.  Hoping not to need him again ;) but he'll be my first call if I need another criminal defense attorney.

September 12th, 2022 police arrived at my door to tell me they were investigating sexual claims made against me, outlandish as they were I immediately panicked because as everyone knows, once these rise against you, you’re pretty much screwed. I immediately reached out to any attorney and was recommended Vindicate law, I spoke to the receptionist and explained the case and was assigned Carrie Fulton Brown. She accepted my case. The path to freedom was long and arduous. After the arraignment they told me I was facing 60 years in prison. Many continuations later, my anxiety and stress were at an all time high. Me and Carrie never really talked to each other about the case itself except a few times as my case was entirely hearsay, but because of the fact that it was from a minor the case was stacked against me 10 fold. Communication with Carrie was very rough, as most people sitting in the hot seat just want a shred or a glimmer of positivity but Carrie did NOT deliver on that front in the slightest. But that was okay, because she was dedicated to working against the state in a screwed up system. Most of the beginning of my case I knew most people and even Carrie didn’t believe me when I say I didn’t do it. Later on I passed 3 polygraph tests trying to prove I didn’t do it,  and only after the 3rd one when I passed it with the actual prosecutor  / State did Carrie tell me she strongly believes I didn’t do it. She gave me the best options to follow forward and going to trial with a minors words against mine was bleak, Carrie fought for the best outcome, I served 0 days in jail, no fees or Fines, Didn’t have to sign a sexual registry, all 4 counts were dropped to a Class C Abuse of a child. And 1 year of DOC Probation in which I spent 3 weeks on before the DOC discharged me from probation saying my crime didn’t fit criteria of having probation as I was a zero risk person and this was the only thing I’ve ever gotten on my record.

All said and done, I’m glad Carrie pulled through for me and allowed me to stay out of prison and remain with my family and to continue working she’s a tough person to understand and rough around the edges when talking to her but she’s nothing but business which is what you want in an attorney. Thanks Carrie for giving me my life back! 60 years was a long time to be away.

I am absolutely appalled by the complete lack of professionalism and utter disregard for my situation shown by Carrie Fulton Brown from this Law Group. I entrusted her with my case, believing her promises of dedicated representation, and instead, I received nothing but empty words and an empty bank account. She happily accepted my retainer, and then proceeded to do absolutely nothing. During the 6 months period she was my attorney, before her withdrawal, phone calls went unanswered, meetings/appointments were canceled for no apparent reasons. No investigations were done on my case, she did not interview no witnesses, and the so called ”victim“. Furthermore, Carrie had the audacity to tell me I was borderline harassing her by calling her and her incompetent paralegal Lisa too much. She literally took my money and vanished into thin air. Carrie Fulton Brown is a trash of attorney. I suffered significantly due to her inaction, and I was left feeling completely abandoned and betrayed. I would strongly advise anyone considering hiring her to look elsewhere. Save your money, save your time, and save yourself the immense frustration and disappointment. She is a disgrace to the legal profession.

HONEST REVIEW: I am an actual client of Vindicate. So here's my honest experience. Vindicate is as prompt as you are, you pay, you retain and you get representation. So far, Connor has been there when I needed him, he has gotten me the best case scenario so far. You're not hiring a friend that's gonna make you feel warm and cozy and you're not gonna get someone who you can talk to anytime you're stressed out with your case. However, Vindicate is not judgmental, will give you direct guidance through the ins and outs of the criminal justice/court process. They seem like true professionals. So far the money I have spent has been WORTH IT. Although it's never easy to come up with, I adamently suggest you do what it takes because it is your life, this is the way I feel. I am not locked up and I am able to be productive for my loved ones while I await the remainder of the process. I will update this as things develop, but, know these guys are kicking butt for me and getting real results.

UPDATE: We got positive results and Connor worked with me every step of the way. Even after court he stays dedicated to representing my interests.
reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text: While searching for an attorney to represent a family member I called several attorneys in Tacoma I left messages for those that didn’t answer. I received a return call from vindicate law. Kaylee was not only super professional and very empathetic in the situation at hand. I appreciate how she made me feel and how I was handled over the phone. I’m still in the process of trying to come up with what I was quoted, which I believe was reasonable for the case however, even if that doesn’t happen for me, I would still recommend these guys because they treat you like they matter and their rates are reasonable. If you are in need of a lawyer, I would definitely check these guys out.

Just over a year ago my life was shattered and I did alot of research in the short amount of time I had to hire an attorney in my search I chose vindicate law group because there upfront honesty, costs and what they expected from me as a client. Vindicate assigned Connor jepson to represent me. Connor was above and beyond professional and holds his value in a high regard that is seen in all of his interactions with every one involved in the process even the system thats out to get you. In any job someone is paying the bill during that process sometimes people feel as if they where just a paycheck it takes a special kind of person/ employee to show the value in what one is being  received.  In my case there was a lot of loss and heart strings pulled once things started to unfold I could see that Connor actually cared and was in just as much disbelief of why I was in this situation. Any thing negative I have to say about this unfortunate experience is and was out of vindicate, Connor jepson or my control. reviews.text:
I was charged with a misdemeanor. I needed a rapid dismissal, or I risked losing my Washington State gaming license, and thereby my job in a casino. I believed hiring an attorney gave me the best chance at success, so I called Vindicate Law Group. I don't remember the name of the woman I spoke to initially, but I told her I wanted to immediately file a motion for dismissal. She told me that was something they could do, but that I needed to pay their fee up front. She said that, were the case dismissed in a timely manner, the fee would be refunded and I would only be charged an hourly rate for the time spent on my case. I paid the fee and my case was assigned to Blake Harris.

In my first conversation with Mr. Harris I told him exactly what I had said in my first phone call. He told me a motion for dismissal wasn't possible. I told him that was the only reason I had hired his firm. He told me I had already signed a contract, so I couldn't back out.

My case was not dismissed right away. I lost my job. Mr. Harris then spent the next six months requesting continuance after continuance while negotiating a plea bargain. The best deal he could get me would see my charge dismissed after two years. I attempted to satisfy the prosecutor's requests. She wanted me to pay for counseling. I told Mr. Harris I could not pay for counseling, since I had just lost my job. I sought free counseling, but that was not satisfactory.

Eventually I ran out of patience and asked to take it to trial. Mr. Harris said I would have to pay more. I reminded him that I was no longer employed. I told him I'd take my chance with a public defender. The public defender had my charge dismissed at my very next hearing.

I should have saved my money. It really would have come in handy after I lost my job.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Kurt,
Our team at Vindicate always strives to give the best possible representation for our clients. We value our clients’ opinions and it is important to us that our clients are more than satisfied with their experience with our team. We are glad to hear that you got a dismissal and wish you the best in the future.

--Vindicate Criminal Law

reviews.text: Blake did a great job at getting my case dismissed! Blake was very communicative during that time with updating me on any new information, or what he anticipated the outcome would be. He pushed the case to trial where it was dismissed. The prosecutor failed to show up in person on that day and was reprimanded by the judge resulting in a more favorable dismissal. So, it really couldn’t have gone any better. I hope I’m never in this sort of situation again but if I am I won’t hesitate to call Blake!

reviews.text: A very strange experience from the beginning,  I had consulted with an intake person there. I was told I needed 10,000 for a retainer up to trial.  Fair enough,  I paid half with credit card half with cash.  Was told I could only get a receipt for the credit card transaction and not the cash because they could only print one receipt.  Fast forward a year and I have another lady call me saying that I owed the 5000 cash still because it was not accounted for and the original woman who booked us an attorney no longer worked there. One day my attorney either quit or was fired.  Not sure because none of this was communicated with me,  I found out bu texting my attorney and a different attorney had that phone now.  Poor communication,  I asked 2 simple questions a month ago and still don't have an answer. The new attorney that spoke with me didn't seem interested in talking with me over the phone and was very dismissive.  Emails generally go unanswered.

Jason  S. Newcombe is the hand's down best attorney I've ever had represent me in a very serious hit and run crash and a high speed chase with police while off of my medications for schizophrenia. Jason fight for me for 2 years. He would tell me don't worry brother I've got your back. You're not a criminal this case has always been a mental health case. You need to stay on your medication's continue mental health counseling. Continue seeing your psychiatrist. Find some local groups to volunteer with. Take several different types of defensive driving classes. Continue to carry full coverage insurance. Don't get any new traffic violations. Keep your nose clean and don't get into any more trouble. I did everything Jason asked me to do and then some. I've kept my nose clean and stayed on all of my medications religiously. I really took everything Jason told me to heart because he's a very intelligent person. Jason Newcombe really does have your best interest at heart. Jason's law firm associates are very professional and everyone is very personable.
I'm so grateful I chose Jason Newcombe as my attorney I thought for sure I was going to receive jail time especially with a past record. Jason fought hard for me for 2 years and I ended up with a very good deal. My case was dismissed without prejudice I serve no jail time I got my life back. Thank you Jason from all your hard work, wisdom and guidance. I will truly be grateful to Jason and Fritz and everyone else that worked hard on my case. My entire outlook on life it's changed for the better. I make much wiser decisions now. I take all my medications as directed. I follow all laws. I continue to volunteer and I will never forget those words Jason spoke to me. You are not a criminal! I'm not! I just got in over my head and Jason was there to throw me your life preserver.
Thank you Jason!
Respectfully,
Michael Kamberger.

Eron Cannon and Mark Melter went after me on behalf of their client Allstate. I’m a non lawyer and I represented myself against them in a Federal Court trial. Allstate paid them over $3 million dollars in attorneys fees and they asked for over $15 million dollars at trial. The court awarded $150,000 trebled and @$200,000 in attorneys fees. I’m sure if I could have afforded a lawyer, they would have received nothing by way of a judgement. These attorneys were dishonest to say the least and clearly they weren’t very skilled considering I represented myself and Allstate’s shareholders had to pay them over $3 million dollars in attorneys fees just to get a tiny judgement. Not only were they dishonest and made up their own narrative to try and make me look bad, but this became a personal vendetta for these pukes rather than a case that made sense for Allstate’s shareholders. This is a prime example of a big insurance company wasting shareholders money on a personal vendetta case. In the midst of this, they broke up my family and forced me into bankruptcy. All for what? A settlement of 500k that Mark Melter brags about in his bio which is also dishonest in his wording. BTW... Allstate spent another $250,000 in attorneys fees post judgement to collect a 500k settlement. We were going to pay the entire $700k before Melter got involved. These crooks charged Allstate’s shareholders somewhere in the neighborhood of $3,500,000.00 to collect $500,000. This is what your insurance premiums go towards.... outrageous attorney bills that financially don’t make sense. Overpriced lawyers who brag about losing millions of dollars for publicly traded companies. Great job guys. Keep it up!  And then to top it off, the federal judge who handed down the verdict, now works for these scumbags. Corrupt from the get go....

I am so glad I did.  I hired The Law Offices of Steven Weier, PS.  Everybody I worked with there was helpful and patient.  And because I am on Medicare my case had special considerations.  Tina – their Medicare specialist – was able to help arrange for payment of my medical expenses and actually was able to find ways to smooth out the process for me.   I worked with two of the senior attorneys Paul and Steven.  We actually had to file a lawsuit against the company to get them to finally pay for my bills and reach a settlement that was appropriate for my case.  I feel like I received great representation at every step of the way, and I would highly recommend this firm.   They make a great team and do great work!

J.A.

Adam was an incredible attorney to work with during one of the most difficult times of my life. This is a family-run business, which makes a huge difference—you truly feel connected on a personal level, not like just another case number.

I met Adam in April after being rear-ended in an accident that resulted in a loss of motor function and required emergency surgery. From the very beginning, Adam showed genuine care and compassion. He is not in it for the money—he truly cares about his clients and their well-being.

Adam stayed in touch throughout the entire process and handled every aspect of my case, including dealing with insurance and medical companies, which took a tremendous weight off my shoulders while I focused on recovery. I honestly wish the other driver had been insured so Adam could have been compensated for the time, effort, and dedication he put into my case

reviews.text: SaraEllen was amazing! She took the time to hear me out when 4 other firms wouldn’t. Others I couldn’t even get passed the person who does their initial screening before talking to a lawyer. SaraEllen called me after I reached out and left a message. She heard me out herself and took my case. She was very communicative and respectful. The outcome was definitely better than I could’ve hoped for. I will always and forever refer her and this firm to everyone.

I had a fantastic experience working SaraEllen. Unfortunately, I was the victim of a mis-identified debt belonging to another person, and needed resolution to avoid impacts to my credit and reputation. From start to finish, she was very communicative and straight forward in setting expectations for the process and likely resolution, giving me the peace of mind that I needed at each milestone. SaraEllen is extremely knowledgeable in her field and an absolutely fantastic attorney who I truly enjoyed working with, and I am very pleased with the outcome of this matter. Thank you so much!!
I had a very stressful problem, and she helped me solve it. Great lawyer.

SaraEllen Hutchison is an outstanding lawyer. Throughout the handling of my case, she kept me in the loop. Even during delays, she stayed in touch regarding where the case stood. She was extremely detail-orientated, refusing to let anything slip through the cracks. She looked out for me and fought for the best result possible, keeping my interests and my family in mind. I received the impression that she truly cared about the quality, efficacy, and efficiency of what she was doing. She’s particularly familiar with the fair credit reporting act and mixed/merged credit files. I highly recommend her to anyone in need of an attorney.

I was having a problem with my credit and felt completely lost, no one wanted to listen to what was wrong or knew how to help me.  One short conversation with SaraEllen and she knew exactly what was wrong and knew how to move forward.  Very professional and honest, I would work with her again.

I would give SaraEllen 10 stars if I could.  I was a victim of identity theft and I had been trying to work with the credit agencies to clean up my credit reports on my own. I currently live outside the US, so this was complicating the issues. After several years of running into walls and red tape, I was at the end of my rope. I was frustrated, stressed and full of anxiety.  I had no idea what to do or where else to turn.  I found SaraEllen online and contacted her.  She responded right away and we talked on the phone about my case.  She was incredibly professional, sympathetic and kind. After speaking with her, I felt confident I had found the right person to help make things right.

SaraEllen began working my case right away and kept in touch with me at every step of the process. We talked on the phone often so she could explain everything that was happening. She took the time to go through every detail and reassure me along the way.  Her tenacity and extensive knowledge of consumer protection laws finally led me to a resolution. I could not have done it without her and she was truly a godsend. I can’t say enough amazing things about SaraEllen Hutchinson and I won’t hesitate to recommend her to anyone that is struggling with consumer protection issues.  I would hire her again in a heartbeat if ever needed.
Called no answer, followed instruction to email my concerns, and no reply. This firm wont get back to you if you dont worth anything to the firm.

SaraEllen is an exceptional lawyer and a trustworthy person.  Although we did not expect to have the need for a lawyer, we are so thankful that we found SaraEllen.  We discovered her through great reviews from other people.  She guided us through the distressful experience of identity theft, truly fought for us and won our case.  She is the optime of professionalism, kindness and strength.  She cares about her clients and shows consistent follow through.  She kept us updated throughout the entire process, provided explanations when needed and helped to allay our worries.  We would highly recommend her to anyone needing legal representation.

reviews.text: Sam was so helpful after I got in my car accident. He made sure I knew exactly what my next steps were and how to proceed. If you need help after an accident of any kind, this is the place to go!
Excellent service and always helpful and friendly
We used Sam for our probate attorney. He did an awesome job and everything went smooth thank you Sam and staff for your great work.
Sam and Candace are amazing people.  They treat us like humans instead of just a case. So glad our daughter recommended them ☺️
Sam is a stand up guy and a great lawyer!
Super helpful, punctual, and real, Sam sits down and discusses things with you personally, and Candance is always a pleasure.

My daughter was shot accidentally and we were given Sam's name on a recommendation from a friend.
We met with Sam, he explained the ins and outs to us and told us he would get information from the insurance company and get back to us (my daughter mainly).
After that, he all but disappeared.
The lack of communication, empathy or trying to get him to return calls in a timely manner is unprofessional at any level.
We found out that (at least from what he is telling us) that he can't help us and there is no avenue for the insurance company.
That is fine, but it would have been better to just sit us down and let us know that.....not send us a letter without a phone call or meeting.
I would never recommend this attorney for anything to anybody.

UPDATE:
Found another attorney who has helped through the process and we now have a case, because Sam failed to do his job adequately.

They are heartless they drag your case out and at the end will drop you like nothing if your case is not a big one you will not be important to them you take off work for appointments they make and they cancel and now your worried about losing your job during a pandemic because you took off for them
Their receptionist apparently likes to hang up on you.

Great attorney with amazing knowledge. Unfortunately this is my 2nd time needing to use him. (Only say that cause obviously being in a accident sucks) However, from the moment of introduction you can rest assure your case will be handled with care. Sam's while legal team is on point. Quick to reply and always friendly. Definitely recommend this firm.

Friendly Office. Will add more after case closed.

Thank you ... very good experience. If your ins company ignoring you.. good place to get help.

I called today to get a consultation for a personal injury matter. The receptionist who answered the phone cut me off before I could finish my sentence and said “NO HE ISN'T!”  I was just asking if Sam had a moment for a quick consult. After That I said “wow you cut me off pretty quickly”, she said “no, how about I take your phone number and he can return your call”. Obviously after that treatment I’m going to take my business elsewhere. Little did she know I was a personal referral from a friend of his, and he lost out on a lot of money. I hope this is a lesson to Sam on who he has answering the phones.
The best Attorney AND staff (Candace) I have ever encountered. Integrity, compassion, diligence, all hallmarks of this firm.

reviews.text: I highly recommend elder law attorney, Liz Ann Johnson, based on my work with her over the past two years.  Liz has provided excellent guidance to me in my work as attorney-in-fact for clients who don’t have a friend or family member to serve in that role.  Liz knows the ins and outs of, Medicare, Medicaid, special needs trusts, first and third party trusts, and guardianships because she did this work for many years as a paralegal before she became a licensed attorney.  Liz communicates this information in a very personable and respectful way, using her skills as a mother of six to gently correct and encourage new approaches.  Liz has a very active and broad volunteer practice which benefits folks in her community and beyond. Liz’s fees are reasonable and her monthly invoices are easy to understand.  Liz is committed to helping elders and their families cope effectively with this constantly changing area of law.  Liz’s ability to rise above the frustration and cynicism about our court system makes her a true gem in the world of attorneys.

Christina made everything so easy for our family. From the very beginning, she was incredibly kind, patient, and extremely communicative. Our family cannot recommend Christina highly enough! From the beginning, she was honest about what to expect and remained consistently communicative throughout every twist and turn of our complex step-parent adoption. Though the process had many ups and downs, Christina's steady guidance and clear communication gave us confidence even during the most difficult moments. She was always accessible when we had questions and provided realistic expectations while advocating fiercely for our family. Thanks to Christina's dedication and expertise, our adoption was successful. If you are facing an adoption with unique challenges, Christina's expertise is exactly what you want in your corner. We're incredibly grateful for her support during this life-changing journey.

We were looking for help to adopt our niece so we called around to get some information and prices. Christina's office was the most informative and friendly that we contacted. They were extremely transparent with their prices and ensured that they could help us. The overall process was seamless and the office stayed in contact with us every step of the way. We highly recommend using Christina for your adoption needs.

Christina helped our family with two adoptions, one for an older child and one for our baby. She walked us through the entire process and checked in with us every step of the way. She was warm and inviting, making us feel comfortable throughout. I am so thankful to have had someone who could ease my worries. We are now the legal parents of both children and couldn't be happier! My wife and I would like to adopt again in the future and we know we have someone we can go with confidence that the job will be done quickly and efficiently.

Christina and her team are exceptional.
She handled our domestic adoption finalization. They kept us on track and are highly communicative. They made the process seamless.

reviews.text:
In short - If you are looking for an adoption attorney Christina is hands down the best out there. Simply amazing and a blessing, you will not be disappointed.

We brought our, what felt like an impossible situation to Christina, ready to take the leap of faith. Christina helped us with not only 1 but 3 step-parent adoptions. It was always my dream to have a tri-adoption, but an impossible dream at that. One of the adoptions began as contested, as expected, but we had full confidence in Christina, we were prepared to fight the fight, knowing it could take a very long time, but to all of our surprise in roughly 7 months time, she was able to settle the case before trial. That same week the other two adoptions were agreed to and in October, my dream of a tri-adoption came true. Christina and her team are amazing, she is very knowledgeable, aggressive, always has a plan - and a back up plan. She is honest and up front, I always knew what to expect and what was coming. When you're feeling the anxiety and pressure from the process, she's there to talk you off the ledge.  If you would have told me at the start of this year that this year would turn out this way, I would have never believed it. If you have ever considered adoption or step-parent adoption, fear paralyzed me for a long time, do yourself a favor and give her a call, do a consultation, you will not be disappointed. Christina healed my family, she is a blessing that I will forever be grateful for.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Jordan!  Your adoption was so special!  I am so glad that our law firm was able to be apart of your adoption journey 💗.
