reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Mandeep!  It was a pleasure to work with your sweet family!

reviews.text: Christina Sherman and Annelise Martin were both extremely professional, and willing to answer our questions and help us in our families adoption proceedings.  After several discussions with them about how to possibly proceed, of which they were very honest and upfront about how the situation could go, we retained them to handle our case.  With their continued assistance and effort, not only did the case rule in our favor, but what was a highly stressful and challenging situation went about as smooth as possible.  I would strongly recommend them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Mike, we so appreciate your trust in our law firm!

reviews.text: My husband and I are so thankful for Christina and her assistant.  We came to them with a VERY complicated case and a 4 day deadline to complete a private adoption.  No only did they beat the deadline of when the baby was supposed to be here, but they helped us through every aspect of this case.  From the first conversation we had, I immediately felt taken care of and knew they would help us through this.  The case became a lot more complicated and Christina confidently told us not to worry and she was able to help with it all.  Christina came to the hospital and brought a cute gift for our sweet baby boy.  Every time I spoke with Christina or her assistant I felt comforted and had full faith that they could see us through everything.  I cannot say enough great things about working with Christina.  I am so thankful she was able to help us and saw us through everything.  She feels a bit like family now and we will always be extremely grateful for all of her hard work and compassion.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Nicole!  It was so wonderful to be a part of your adoption!  We are so appreciative of you and your family!

reviews.text: Christina helped us with a contested adoption.  She looked at the case from multiple angles and consistently looked for the path of highest likelihood of success. In the end the other parent agreed to terminate rights and we were able to complete the adoption.
The whole process to adopt my daughter was seamless, warm, professional and peaceful to work with her and her staff! Thank you!

My husband and I strongly recommend this genius lawyer attorney for adoption process. She was recommended from an agent who handles child services. Good thing i trusted and believed in that agent’s word of advice and took her advice because everything i was told from that person appeared to be true. Christina is a very sweet loving, amazing family-oriented, and a very helpful individual to deal with. Even if your situation seems hard at first, she will always find a way to help you get thru with a positive attitude and to help you win your case. She and her assistant Annelise did a great amazing job as quick as possible just within about 3 to 4 total months of wait for a final approval. Our process was sort of tough at first but these two helped made everything easy to follow along and we didn’t have to do much but collecting just evidence signatures and personal documents to them while they deal with the hard part. Am sooo relieved that within 3-4 months we receive our final approval. We are now very excited and grateful for their sweet and loving hard work upon our adoption process. Our hats off and we would definitely choose Christina Sherman once again if we ever have to adopt another child in the future or preferably for any other legal issues that she handles. You will not be disappointed 😇
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much!  You were a pleasure to work with!

reviews.text: Christina and Annelise were simply amazing. They took a VERY stressful process and made it so much easier. Christina was supportive, positive, responsive, communicative, and reassuring. She is also very knowledgeable. We had the best experience and we would absolutely trust them with all our future adoptions! Thank you Christina and Annelise for helping our dream of becoming a family come true!
Christina has walked our family through two adoptions. She was wonderful!

Christina Sherman and her legal team are the best!
They are so responsive, very caring, and quick!
Christina is a great person all around I highly recommend her, our family has used her firm twice❤️

After being given several list of adoption lawyers after consulting with a JAG (Judge Advocate General) representative, we were drawn to Christina Sherman and we are blessed to have chosen her. From the get go, we have always been informed, both her and Annelise are always very informative, helpful and kind throughout our whole adoption process. Thank you very much Christina! My family and I are grateful for all that you have helped us accomplished.
For all you other military families out there that are looking for a great adoption lawyer to assist and help you navigate through the process with ease, this attorney is the one!
Christina Sherman did such an amazing job working with our family. She was professional and answered all my emails and questions. She worked very hard and got things done in a fast and timely manner.

Christina was first and foremost absolutely wonderful to work with!! She is very knowledgeable and professional and you can see she absolutely loves what she does. Her price was very reasonable and kept her original price and didn’t try to charge us for something that she didn’t do. She was very prompt with communication and got back to us very fast. We would absolutely recommend her service to anyone that needs help with their adoption.

Amazing Lawyer, I can't express how great she was. She got our adoption done faster than the time frame she gave us. She made us all feel very comfortable and communicated every detail to us. She really took the time to help us and showed that she cared. Highly recommend.

Christina was absolutely wonderful facilitating the adoption process that helped complete our family. Communication was great and her knowledge and understanding of the legal adoption world is top notch. She is very personable and I felt like she put her whole heart into our case. I highly recommend Christina!

Christina is not only an excellent lawyer but she is highly compassionate and able to apply the right kind of advice and how she delivers it depending on the situation.  I think working in this field of law is a calling, and she is definitely called towork with families. I was very fortunate to find her.  I trusted her professionalism.  She calmed me through some anxious times, while still being very straight-forward and realistic.  Because of her i was able to adopt my daughter, who is the greatist joy in my life.  There really aren't words to truly express how happy and grateful I am.  I think about Christina and my daughter's birth mother and her family daily when i look at my daughter.    I hope to use Christina's services again to expand our family!

Wow. There really aren’t words. We had a very complex step parent adoption case that Christina took on. I thought we were looking at a year long battle, Christina got it done in under 3 months. She was on top of everything, called me multiple times just to talk me through everything and get me through some stressful parts. You can tell her care extends beyond the case and truly to your family. If you want someone who truly cares and isn’t afraid of a tough fight, she is it !!! Can’t recommend enough.

Christina was a God send to our family!  We needed someone to act quickly and aggressively,  someone who was willing to take a few risks and that’s what we got.  We got an attorney who saw a quick solution to multiple challenges. She did not even blink while hitting them head on. We’re pleased to say our adoption went as fast and as painless as possible. Christina is thorough and proactive. She was able to maintain her professional demeanor while being fully invested in our case. We appreciate her immensely!

I’ve been using Joseph for years, and he’s always come through. Every ticket gets dismissed with little to no effort on my part. He’s professional, reliable, and gets results. Couldn’t recommend him more!

The work was done quickly and qualitatively. I recommend

So happy with their results! Would highly recommend to everyone out there, quick and easy, worry free. As for my infractions, they gave me 100% guarantee or money back, and I was not disappointed! I’ll definitely use them again.

He was great until for no reason stopped showing up at my cases said he was on vacation for one and than never went to any after that… I paid 3K up front and he just left me on the stand at the end of the case and stopped answering my calls. Very disappointed.

Joseph Cutter came highly recommended and made this such an easy experience. I appreciate his professionalism and his ability to make this process so smooth. I highly recommend reaching out to Joe if you want your case handled. Joe is “cuttin” those tickets up!!

reviews.text: The firm did a great job at resolving my legal issue. It took a while and Steve explained that it would. He touched base when needed and helped the client make the best decisions. Thank you!

After I was involved in a motor vehicle accident I was highly referred to Mr.Hansen by a friend. After seeking Mr. Hansen's council he and his staff quickly began to gather the facts of my case and   recovered  a fair settlement for my injuries. I highly recommend Stephen Hansen.
Best Law firm in Tacoma and surrounding areas.

Steve is an attorney that I have known for years.  Recently he did some work for a family member of mine and I will tell you he really does care about his clients and does great work.  He always gets back to you as soon as he can even if he is preparing for a trial.  I can assure you if you are looking for a dedicated and honest attorney Steve is that attorney.

I would recommend Stephen Hansen with 5 stars for these reasons:  The first consultation with him is free of charge.  He has a practical outlook.  He tries to give you a realistic outlook of  what he thinks about your situation.   He is not just Pie in the Sky.  His fee is reasonable,$275/ hr, comparable to other attorneys in the area. He was always prepared , when our case went to trial.  And probably most of all, he was workable.  He was willing to accept our opinions and input, and work together as a team.  He is a pleasant person, and very skilled at what he does.

While I did not use all the services of Stephen, I did have a productive conversation over the phone finding out my rights as a homeowner who had been taken advantage of when friends needed help. He was very knowledgeable about the city of Tacoma laws as well as the surrouding area and was very easy to talk to. Even if you don’t use his services and just need questions answered, give this man a call.
Steve was very generous with his time and made sure I had all of my questions answered. Highly recommend.
Great Attorney. Fantastic view

My case seemed to be a tricky one, and immediately when Steve and I had our initial consultation, I had finally felt relief and confidence for the first time in about a month and a half. He was mentioning topics and facts that made me feel secure after talking with a few different lawyers. I knew I was in good hands with Steve. The communication was great and they handled everything quickly and in a professional manner. I would highly recommend Steve and his team. They have much knowledge and experience in the business. I will be referring him and his team to anyone that is in need of their services. Thank you again for your help Steve.
they were very helpful they got the justice i deserve i would go thu them anytime and they kept me and my sister updated every step of the way they were very nice

Connelly Law is an exceptional legal team. Hollie Connelly, Greg Zacharia, and Ivory Wheeler demonstrated immediate, decisive advocacy on my behalf at a time when I had been treated unfairly. Their diligence, responsiveness, and command of the facts gave me complete confidence that they had my back. They are sharp, thorough, and compelling in how they frame and argue a case, both principled and pragmatic. Throughout the process, they were encouraging while also providing clear, realistic guidance on viable paths to restoration. Following a full day of mediation, their tenacity and strength led to a positive outcome that reflected the true impact of the harm I experienced. Class-act, bold, empathetic, and straightforward--Connelly Law are powerful advocates who hold parties accountable and pursue justice with integrity.

Forever grateful for this group!

This law firm changed my life. Not only did they get done what they said they were going to get done, every step of the way I was made to feel comfortable and that I have a voice. I can never express my gratitude enough. Holly and Tosha are a wonderful team and wonderful people.
Outstanding service. They helped me tremendously and were responsive and attentive. Highly recommend.

Connelly Law Offices claims:

"Connelly Law Offices is an acclaimed litigation practice representing families and individuals who have been injured or whose rights have been violated. Our attorneys thrive on challenging legal issues and represent the unheard by giving them a voice"

This is false. I have a case that is so wrong violates fathers rights, civil rights, metal health, abuse, neglect and much much more. Connelly did not give me a voice. Maybe to challenging? Also never got email or phone call saying they will not take the case Real reason is it's all about the MONEY and not the CHANGE or what's right anymore. We don't matter we are just part of the broken system. Washington State, DCYF/CPS,Child support and others should be held accountable.

To all the fathers and good parents struggling to be heard that are stuck fighting the system. Don't give up! Our kids and others need us. Good luck and God bless
Tommy Clark

A friend got a massive payout from these guys/gals for a car wreck. I highly recommend!
"They'll go to bat for you if you get a bat taken to ya!"

I had the privilege of working with Nathan Roberts from Connelly Law. Nathan's reputation as a Super Lawyer for over a decade truly speaks volumes. From the outset, Nathan, along with Christian and Meegan, demonstrated exceptional dedication and expertise. They were not only highly knowledgeable but also incredibly responsive, ensuring I remained informed every step of the way.

What impressed me most was their client-centric approach; they took the time to understand my unique situation and tailored their strategies accordingly. I felt genuinely supported and valued as a person. The outcome of the case exceeded my expectations, and I am truly grateful for all their hard work and commitment. I wholeheartedly recommend both Nathan and Connelly Law to anyone seeking expert legal counsel.
Hire them them you will see justice

I was represented by Lincoln Beauregard  Evan Fuller, and Hollie Connelly on very complex cases against the department of children youth and families and a group home. I received an amazing outcome and couldn’t be more pleased!! I would recommend this law firm to anyone that needs personal injury representation!!!
Thanks to everyone here I am truly grateful for all the work that was done for me over years.

I hired Connelly Law to represent me in a pregnancy discrimination lawsuit and only have positive things to say about the experience. Being a plaintiff is an emotional, exhausting journey; my team at Connelly Law was the right balance of patient and communicative with me while being firm and fierce in my advocacy.

Great law office!
Make It Difficult for Customers to Contact You; No return of phone call or voicemail; No verbal update; bad bedside manner

And you only got a certain time to file a claim... So good day," that deadline was a month away from that letter... Thank for taking my case and not doing anything with it... READ REVIEW BEFORE YOU PAY.

They play a game which client could give them more money. If you pay the most among that time of client, you're good to go and good luck hopefully. However, if you can't prove your enough financial capital to them, they're not on your side.
The good huys
Been there a few times and the only word I would use to descibe it is Glorious!!!!

I can’t recommend Amber in good faith. I would assume the entire firm (husband and wife) operate in the same manner. In my experience, she repeatedly characterized my requests for clarification as “arguing,” rather than addressing the questions directly. I also negotiated a reduced rate for a hearing that ultimately never occurred, and that arrangement was repeatedly brought up in a negative way.

Communication and scheduling were consistent issues—difficulty getting timely callbacks and unreliable follow-through on dates and next steps. I did not experience much compassion or empathy given the circumstances; the focus felt primarily financial, and explanations often came across as condescending rather than helpful.

If you’re looking for family-law counsel, I would suggest interviewing other attorneys as well—particularly someone who communicates more clearly and demonstrates more empathy
David Mayo is very capable, dependable, and hard working. He truly fights for his clients. And he cares a great deal about his clients and their cases.
This place is horrible, communication sucks, can never get a hold of them, they are lazy. Don’t waste your money!

Do not trust them with your life and hard earned money! This place is full of Lazy incompetent attorneys. I retained Doug Drowley in sept 2023. My ex wife is using meth and I proved it with pictures of needles full of meth in her purse along with other paraphernalia and texts from her phone about meth. I also provided video and still shots of her attacking me. She went to jail and Doug filed for a restraining order. He was able to win this easy order as anyone could have. Doug then left the firm. David mayo took over and didn’t go to the next court date two weeks later to finalize the order. I tried exercising the restraining order in February 2024 to find out it expired because my lawyer didn’t finish the job. So we filed a new one. $7000, four continuance’s later armed with definitive proof of her impersonating a supervised visit specialist and proving all kinds of lies she still wine unsupervised visits. She provided “clean u.a’s” and even a hair follicle sample to the court. I told David since day one that it was fake and asked him to call the place where she took it at and confirm my suspicions, of course he did nothing. After she won unsupervised visits I did it myself hours after court. It took me a one minute phone call and one text message to (u.a’s r us in Puyallup) to confirm that the papers were totally fake. They wanted me to pay them again to go back to court to fix there foul up so I fired them. In my trade as an electrician if we screw up on a clients home we don’t charge them to fix are mistake. Over $15000 dollars later and 0 results on a easy black and white case I was forced to fire them. Your going through a lot in your case I’m sure it’s hard enough do not trust these people!!!!

They did the bare minimum for our case. They avoided filing blatant contempt against the opposing party. Amber Bighorse and her employees did not fight for us. When we finally decided to get a different attorney, her Paralegal claimed that they couldn't share our file through DropBox because it was too large. Two weeks later, it somehow magically worked. Finally. Lots of excuses, unanswered emails, contempt filings not being filed. I strongly advise you to find a better firm to handle your case.
I'm just trying to find out if my divorce is final, I've called twice (months in-between calls), yet no one there can be bothered to return my call to let me know.
David, Amber, Kay... the whole team has been amazing for me and my case!

I retained Bighorse and Associates to help me with a contentious divorce case, including a DVPO.  Frankly put- they need to get their act together. I am still beyond words for their lack of professionalism.

I was in such a vulnerable position and had high hopes of Amber and her firm, but they let me down beyond words. It would serve them well to show a little more empathy and patience towards their clients. I would NOT recommend these attorneys for representation, and would STRONGLY urge someone to seek out another firm.

They were late to consult. They really didn't want to talk to me about the case. They pretty much said I was better off self representing. Complete waste of time. They are part of the toxic anti-father culture.
Wonderful law firm David Mayo and his staff are amazing people to work with. Will definitely recommend to all family and friends
Bighorse law is the best. Amber and David are amazing people and I will always refer people to them for legal advice.
Lied in court saying I owed them funds for the arbitrator. When I paid the arbitrator directly with a credit card.

Amazing place, the people that work here and own the facility are so welcoming and invite you in like an extension of their own family. Professional, reliable and gave more to me than I could even imagine. Court and family law is no easy issue to cope with but having this firm on my side is something I'll never regret. Thank you to everyone here (Amber, Maddy, David, Doug, Penny, Suzanne and whomever else that  assisted in my case(s)) even the individuals not involved, were 'involved' which just adds to the confidence and reassurance to a very difficult and stressful time.

Rodrick and Jill were fantastic to work with. Communication was always on point and clear, expectations were laid out early on and nothing came as a surprise. Couldn't be happier to have them in my corner.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for being a great client Mr. Bohle, it was our pleasure to assist you. Best of luck on your future endeavors! - The Bighorse Law staff.

reviews.text:
Heard good things and sought them out. They seemed nice and willing to help but never returned a call nor email. Unfortunate.

Editing to add since the comment made in review, was hoping that I would change my response, but is now not showing. It was twice as unfortunate that we tried to work with them again, lost our case, they didn't care to look at our proof of the other parties manipulative actions, we lost, and the outcome has not been great.
They even spelled our names wrong.

If it's not an easy divorce with kids and custody issues I suggest looking for other options.  Be sure you come with tons of money if it's a long divorce.  They answer to your money.  You go through many lawyers and most are very green.  It's a uphill battle don't add to it by trusting these lawyers with your families future.  Learn from my mistakes.

We went through three attorney's in the 18 months we were at this firm. It is obvious that the attorneys are leaving for a reason. It felt like each attorney we were with screwed us over in a different way.

Amber Bighorse made herself available for a mediation so that she could assist the attorney that was part of our case (Erin, who had some incompetence issues you can see in other reviews). Ms. Bighorse showed up in yoga pants looking very unprofessional and was on her laptop for another case the entire time. The mediator even commented on her disengagement and asked her why she was there. Both of the attorney's at the mediation gave no concrete advice, and kept saying that although we were scheduled to go in front of a "friendly" judge, we COULD get someone different and they COULD decide to give us nothing... It seemed like they were more on the side of strong-arming a compromise than attempting to represent the best interests of their client.

When we tried to stop a relocation to Texas, the attorney who was helping us, David,  missed his time to call to consult on the case, then asked to reschedule the reschedule. He made another meeting time to discuss the case the night prior to the trial, and cancelled that too. It's obvious he was stretched too thin to take the case. The day of the trial he didn't eat anything and became more and more agitated as the day went on. He accepted a long distance plan that is less than the Standard Possession Order for Texas, saying there was no way we would get more in front of the judge we were seeing. When we pushed back on all residential time being in Texas (yes, you read that right), he said maybe we should argue the case in front of the Judge since we seemed to know more than him. Incredibly unprofessional. He also did not modify our child support, which was miscalculated to begin with and has since needed to be modified for additional reasons. He said we can do that any time we want through child support services and didn't do it while we were at court and all the paperwork had been completed. Hundreds of dollars and hours of time spent already for that modification, and he just didn't do it.

The paralegals were all great. Every one of them that we worked with was very responsive and did great work. Unfortunately, they were not the ones representing us at court or in mediation.
Professional, responsive, and reasonable.
Very happy with my choice. Was nervous hiring a lawyer but Amber made the whole process very easy for me. Would highly recommend using this firm.
Wonderful people! Very professional.

Amber Bighorse saved my life. I had a very very complicated divorce and custody battle with my (thankfully) now ex-husband. She was thoughtful, kind and really took her time to listen and help me. I can’t recommend them highly enough.
Very friendly, very professional.

I hired Amber Bighorse to represent me for a challenging child custody case and was immediately thankful I did.  She brought swift results in what seemed like a hopeless situation. Amber and her associates showed compassion for my family and I, and were always helpful with any questions or concerns I had during this difficult process.  Amber has vast knowledge of the law and is a force to be reckoned with in the courtroom. I feel lucky to have found Bighorse and Associates and would highly recommend their services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for being a great client Mr. Moody, it has been our pleasure to assist you in your case. - The Bighorse Law Staff

reviews.text: Inattention to detail, requests for information and/or documents at the "last minute" when there was ample lead time. Re requests for information already submitted. If I took time at this point to review all my e mails and notes I could go on with details of what I perceive as sloppy work. I had the impression and was told more than once they had to great of a case load. If I knew then what I know now I would have hired someone else.

The timing took a bit longer than I expected but still acceptable since there is a built in 90 wait period from initial filing.

reviews.text: We have never had a better experience with a law office. They were quick to respond to all my questions, very knowledgeable & professional!

UPDATE:

After this Google Review, I finally received a email from Erin and asked to speak to the firm manager Amber Bighorse. After my discussion with Amber, my overall suggestion would be to hire another firm. They lack the basic skills of time management ,client relations, and needs to spend time improving processes rather than making excuses for the failed ones. I just don't want this happening to anyone else.

Original Post:

I am or was currently still working with "Erin F Morris" and her staff. They completely stopped communicating, and I'm left figuring out things on my own. Worst experience in my lifetime, I hired another lawyer elsewhere, and am really happy with the results. There are better professionals out there to hire than this firm. Services and communication was the worst I've experienced. Please stay away from this firm!!!!! Don't bet your livelihood if you have a divorce case, they'll drive you off of a cliff and try and justify it. Makes me wish I had hired my (now) Ex spouses Lawyer!

As a father going through a tough custody case, they assisted me and explained the law in a clear language and the steps in the process that needed to be done. Everyone made the process so much easier and it ended up being much better than I thought. Thank you !

I had a wonderful experience with Bighorse & Associates during my non-parental guardianship case with my nieces/nephews.  One of the reasons why I chose this firm over others was for the fact that they have personal experience as non-parental guardianship.  For me this was a key factor, as they, had an understanding on a personal level of what this process feels like from a client perspective.  My case was supposed to be easy as it was parent consented but became complicated when the grandparents decided to fight the guardianship.

This is where Bighorse & Associates came through in their full support for my case - this is also where having a firm with personal experience being guardians as well as attorney's means everything.  I never felt like I was just a client ATM; I felt like one of the firms family members, who was going through this with an entire firm behind me.

I highly recommend anyone going through the guardianship process hire Bighorse & Associates as they were key in helping me stay calm, grounded, and completely informed through the very complicated process with the new legislation as of January 2021..

I was extremely pleased with Bighorse Family Law.  They are very experienced and understanding in these matters.  Amber and David are excellent and fair attorneys, along with my  paralegals Kay and Peyton. Who really went over and beyond in their work.   Amber is definitely a "FORCE" to be reckoned with.  Amber fought hard and aggressive for me.  Amber and her team made sure that I received what I was entitled to.  I honestly was surprised  with how well I ended up in the final orders. reviews.ownerResponse: I received a call around 4:00pm one day last week from "SF Guy."  He stated in his message that he needed help quickly. He could have scheduled an appointment and got back to his call, but did not.  He did not call back until a few minutes to 5:00pm, meaning that he likely did not finish his call for over at least a half an hour.  We do free consultations and I do my best to get back to people as quickly as I can.  I am sorry that you feel disappointed, however, please understand that my time is also valuable.  I hope that you are able to find an attorney that can help you.

reviews.text:
I recently had the privilege of working with Dennis Schroader at Schroader Law during a challenging family law matter, and I cannot recommend his services highly enough. From our initial consultation, Dennis demonstrated an exceptional level of expertise in family law, including divorce and custody issues, drawing on his extensive experience as a seasoned litigator. His background, which includes serving as a Rule 9 licensed legal intern during law school and building his own practice since 2015, equipped him to handle my case with precision and strategic insight.
What truly sets Dennis apart is his commitment to client advocacy. He took the time to thoroughly understand my circumstances, providing clear guidance on parenting plans and support arrangements while maintaining open communication throughout the process. His familiarity with the local courts in Tacoma, combined with his military service as an intelligence analyst in the Air Force, instilled a sense of discipline and reliability in every interaction. The outcome exceeded my expectations, resolving the matter efficiently and favorably.
As a Tacoma native who deeply values the community, Dennis approaches his work with genuine care and professionalism. His team of dedicated assistants and paralegals further enhanced the experience, ensuring all details were managed seamlessly. If you require representation in family law, personal injury, or criminal defense, Dennis Schroader is an outstanding choice—professional, effective, and truly invested in achieving the best results for his clients. Five stars without hesitation.

Thanks, Ed!

If 0 stars was an option, it applies to the representation from Dennis Schroader.  I talked to him on the phone initially and then he deferred to a legal assistant who was out of state in Florida.

I could not get in touch with anyone from their office and was updates last minute (if at all) in my case. He had someone else attend the final hearing who  knew nothing about my situation.

There were moments throughout where it was imperative to strike while the iron was hot, and yet, Dennis and his staff dragged their feet on everything.

I was billing opportunity instead of a client.  The charges were far and above higher than the representation was worth. The bills were padded with multiple charges for things that did not occur. They have no problem with being timely and proactive about collecting money from their clients.

I ended up changing to an attorney he was opposing in another case.  She gets the job done and is communicative, organized, and up front about costs. I only wished I switched sooner and perhaps I would’ve had a better outcome.

Dennis and his team did amazing job for me and  my daughter, they are worth every penny!  I have almost 50/50  because of Dennis and team, from not seeing my daughter in over a year. Very honest and straightforward. He got what I asked him to do for me. Dennis and team are like family to me now. I will continue to use him in future and also refer him to friends and family.

I initially hired a different attorney for my very complex and difficult child custody case. Unfortunately, that attorney did absolutely nothing for my case and still sent me a $3,000 bill. After doing a lot of research, I found and hired Mr. Jeff Whalley- and that turned out to be the best decision for myself and my daughter.
Not only did Mr. Whalley secure my desired 50/50 custody arrangement, but he also achieved this without having to go to trial. During a long, grueling 9-hour mediation session, he worked tirelessly to make sure my voice was heard and that I got the time I deserve with my daughter.

The entire team at Whalley Law Firm was incredible. Jordan Potter, who I first spoke with, took the time to explain in detail how the process would work and approached everything with care, respect and honesty. He didn't just speak to me as a client, but as a person. It was evident throughout the entire process that Mr. Whalley truly cares about his clients. He treats you like a human being, not just a billable source. I also want to take the time to thank Alexis, Ris and Karen. They were amazing to work with. Communication was always open and timely, and I never felt left in the dark.

I can't strees enough how dark and trying this time in my life was. But having a whole team standing by my side was truly the blessing I needed. If you're looking for the best of the best in family law, Whalley Law firm is a no-brainer. I'll be forever grateful for the hard work Jeff and his team put in for me and my daughter.

Whalley Law did a great job handling a family law case for a friend of mine. They were professional, easy to work with, and really seemed to care about the outcome. The whole process was smoother thanks to their guidance. Definitely recommend them if you’re dealing with a family law issue.

As a Chiropractor working closely with auto injury clients at Health Works Chiropractic, I can confidently say that attorney Jeff Whalley and The Whalley Law Team are an invaluable resource in the recovery process.

Jeff is not only a highly skilled attorney, but also a compassionate advocate who truly understands the complexities that accident victims face both physically and legally. His team consistently demonstrates professionalism, clear communication, and a genuine commitment to turning victims into victors.

The collaboration between our offices has been seamless. Jeff ensures that our mutual clients feel supported, heard, and empowered throughout every step of their legal journey. His understanding of the personal injury process  including how it intersects with timely medical care, documentation, and recovery timelines  is exceptional.

If you’ve been in an accident, don’t wait. Call The Whalley Law Team for your free consultation. You’ll be in powerful, honest, and highly capable hands.

Dr. Janelle, D.C.
Health Works Chiropractic & Auto Injury Clinic

However, what truly sets them apart is the depth of care they bring to their work. They didn’t just represent me—they supported me. They guided me with clarity and fought for me with conviction. Dan and Kyle exemplify what it means to be exceptional attorneys: skilled, ethical, empathetic, and wholeheartedly invested in their clients’ well-being and outcomes.

I am profoundly grateful for everything they did, and I would recommend Nelson Allen Walk & Scott with absolute confidence to anyone seeking outstanding legal representation. This is a firm that not only delivers results, but does so with integrity, heart, and unwavering dedication.

my claim was a serious injury I will suffer from pain the rest of my life in my foot from this injury. It was osteomyelitis they had to remove bone. Anyways I was off work for 4 long years. Lots of rehab learning how to walk on my left foot again not fun. 9 months went by with no income, coming into my house hold he told me he would be able to get me back pay and not to go back to work for them nine months so my 9 months go by dealing with this man and his horrible staff I called and said what the hell is going on this is ridiculous you guys are jerking me around I need to get paid or go back to work. The front office lady told me that they were not going to get my back pay and that I need to call them back. I lost it she also said he would never say anything like that. When my wife was there with me during the first meeting. So I could not fire him or I would end up owing him more then what we agreed on. Three more months went by I get a call from the front office saying they got my settlement. I get there look at the check it was 1,200$ I about went postal this coward would not even come out of his office or talk to me at all. I talked to a real injury lawyer after all this and with a injury like mine I should have practically been set for life. At least a nice pension. But nope this guy just wants you money and will take whatever he can get since he don’t do anything for you it’s free money to him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Casey, I'm always willing to meet with clients to discuss their concerns and to seek their input on ways to achieve the best result for them.  My office door is literally 10 feet from the lobby and my doors are always open unless I'm meeting with a client.  Your case was a contingent fee case, so there is no way that you would have owed us "more than what we agreed on."  In fact, you had already settled your workers compensation claim before you hired our office and you received 100% of those settlement funds with no fees paid.  You then retained our office to try to increase your settlement.  Most workers compensation attorneys would have declined to represent you at that point since you had already received the value of your claim.  However, we were willing to try to get you more money and, in fact, we were able to do so.  If your portion of the increased settlement was $1,200, then our contingent fee would have been even less, since we would have received only 30% of the increased settlement amount.  Your claim was opened in 2010 and you did not hire our firm until December of 2014, nearly 5 years later, by which time you had already settled your claim.  Over the course of the next year, we worked very hard to try to increase your settlement and, in fact, were able to obtain an increase.  However, since you had already received the majority of the settlement before hiring us, the increase was not substantial.  You also wanted us to try to get you a pension so that you could stop working, even though you had already been informed prior to hiring our firm that you were not eligible for a pension.  Needless to say, we worked very hard for very little pay on your case, but we did so in the spirit of trying to help even though you had already received most of the value of your claim before hiring our firm.  We wish you the best and would encourage you to visit your doctor and file a reopening application if your condition has worsened since your claim was closed in 2015.  If you wish to discuss your case, please feel free to call and make an appointment to talk to me in person or by telephone.

Blake and his entire team at Universal Law are simply AMAZING. I highly recommend Blake if you are looking for a lawyer that will have your best interest at heart and will give you the best possible outcome.

I live in Tennessee and my son lives in Washington. In October of 2024 I found myself needing to hire a lawyer to represent me in our custody/parenting plan. Living in Tennessee, I wasn’t familiar with any firms or Washington Laws. After some research and calling several firms I ended up with another firm. After having paid them thousands of dollars and with our case already moving forward they ended up having to drop me as a client due to a “conflict of interest” on their end. Again I found myself at the beginning needing to find a lawyer with months into my case.

I found Blake and when I called my first encounter was with Alejandra. After giving her a run down of where I was with my case and my concerns about hiring someone new since I was already out thousands of dollars, she made sure I was heard and reassured me that they would be able to take me as a client. Fast forward to a year later and that was the BEST decision!!

From the very beginning they were very clear about the process and what would be next in my case. Blake had to step in with only about a week before my first hearing and he did so effortlessly. My case was complex and the other parent was not wiling to give me anything but with Blake’s support we were able to work things out to where I now get to spend time with my son.

I am very satisfied with the outcome of my parenting plan. Not only did Blake make sure I got the best outcome but he also helped me get every single penny that I had paid the previous firm back. That absolutely speaks of Blake’s dedication for his clients. I will always be thankful for him and his entire staff. Blake and Alejandra were always available anytime I had questions or when I needed to change anything on our plan. They always had my interest as a priority and Blake worked efficiently to make sure that I would get the time with my son that was my right given our long distance.

Again all I have for him and his entire team is gratitude for all of their hard work and commitment to my family. Thanks to them I will get to see my son and have the opportunity to have a meaningful relationship with him moving forward.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Angel so much for the kind 5-star review. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. It was an honor to assist you, and we’re glad our team could provide clarity, support, and guidance during what can be a very difficult time. If you ever need help in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out—we wish you all the best moving forward.

Money was a concern for me, and they took the time to walk me through everything step by step. Having never been through this before, my goal was 50/50 custody — and they helped me achieve that goal.

Understand that cases involve a lot of give and take, and it’s best to stay as kind as possible to the other party — unless Blake advises otherwise. They truly know the system. It isn’t perfect, but it’s always better to negotiate before going to trial.

Greetings Jess,

We received your negative review and wish to respond to clarify what we provide in terms of our initial consultations. As a courtesy, we provide brief phone consultations with potential new clients. We are still an active, and busy, law firm representing other parties in often complicated matters. The consultations are provided at the availability of our partners. reviews.text:
Recently I contacted Tom Dickson regarding land drainage issues I was having with a development next door. One property owner in particular was not maintaining a storm drainage on her property. This was causing erosion on my land. I was very redundant with what I was requesting of his office
My request to Tom was two fold. One, that a legal letter be mailed to her making her aware of the problem. And the legal risk she had if nothing was  done to repair the drainage. Two, that an attorney meet me on site to fully understand my situation. I felt this would create the least legal expense and hopefully she would resolve the problem without any further legal action.
A retainer was paid in advance for this work.
Instead Tom starts research on the defendants ability to pay for legal expenses which I had already paid for and researched myself. And he generated multi pal discussions with other attorneys in the office as if we were going to pursue legal action. Ringing up a sizeable billing that required additional deposits of funding. None of this was necessary if she responded positively.
I asked that he reconsider his billing which of coarse he did not.
Vary unhappy.

reviews.ownerResponse:
I appreciate you taking the time to share your perspective. Unfortunately, this review does not accurately reflect our work together.

Throughout your case, you had my personal cell number and we spoke frequently — often outside of regular hours. I make it a point to ensure my clients understand that the court requires filings to be relevant, and I always explain what that means in the context of their cases.

Legal matters can be highly emotional, and it’s important to recognize that words and actions — especially when documented — can carry significant consequences in court. The attorney-client relationship works best when clients carefully consider and follow the professional advice they receive. Attorneys sometimes must tell clients things they may not want to hear, and the ability to accept reality and respond constructively varies from person to person. Ignoring sound legal guidance often leads to exactly the kinds of difficulties good counsel tries to help clients avoid.

Based on publicly available records, I note that your legal challenges appear to have continued since we stopped working together. I sincerely wish you well with any personal obstacles and hope you find the support and stability you need moving forward.
- David N. Mayo

reviews.text:
I had a very long and difficult divorce and custody case, and I’m incredibly grateful to have had David, Amber, and the entire team at Stellar Legal Group on my side. David, who I worked with most closely, was absolutely outstanding. He helped me achieve 50/50 custody—something I wasn’t sure was possible given the complexity of my case.

David was extremely thorough and crafted a unique strategy that truly made a difference. He always responded quickly to emails and phone calls, and made sure I felt informed and supported every step of the way.

Kay, his paralegal, was also fantastic—very detail-oriented, organized, and dedicated. She worked tirelessly on my case and it showed.

Everyone I interacted with at the firm was professional, kind, and easy to work with. Their pricing was fair and the invoices were always clear and easy to understand—no surprises.

Then once they did more excuses of why no one is calling me back very poor communication. You called their office and talked to the secretary. She always Say she gonna pass on the message, but she never does. Communication is horrible there Also, after I pay my retainer fee I had a court hearing Stella law group Claim to be so busy They called another firm to show up on their behalf. Then at the last minute they tell me I was Responsible for paying that lawyer when I already paid Steller LEGAL group to represent me This Lawyer showed up He didn’t say not one word on my behalf, but I got stuck with his bill make that make sense or how is that fair when I paid a law firm to represent me Then Steller  Law group Was supposed to set up a mediation Take money out of my account For two weeks, I told them to take the money The secretary kept saying is not her job. She were relayed a message come to find out the message was never relayed To anyone Then they say it was my fault so they took my money And withdrawal I ask for David to give me a call to find out what was going on He didn’t even have the courtesy To call me They didn’t even tell me they had withdrawn from my case for no reason This law firm will talk nice to you to get your money, but there’s no communication here And trust and believe when I say one excuse after another, the excuse is never Stop When you have to beg  a law firm to take your money the red flags was there Then they try to use the Lawyer that I finally got she represented Britney Spears And she’s a good lawyer was all agamic and butter you up Do not Let a person come across friendly fool you One more thing I had to go to court the judge said they had no paperwork in on my be Be careful when choosing People to represent you And give your money to

reviews.text: I want to thank Mr Oliver helping me he's very know

My experience with David Oliver & Associates was really good. They are professional, knowledgeable, friendly, good communication, and fast to reply. With only a couple months until my appeal hearing. I contacted them and we got to work right away. The hearing went through smoothly and I felt like I was in good hands.

I got denied twice for SSDI. Hired David and went to court. After 2 years of waiting, David got me approved within only 15 minutes during my hearing with the judge. His attention to detail is unmatched and he made me feel heard and secure during the process. I would recommend David to anyone looking to get approved for the benefits they deserve.

I have been dealing with disability lawyers for near 5 years now. I never even spoke to my original lawyer and who I was appointed changed so many times I couldn't tell you who they were. After the first denial they had given me the terrible advice of not appealing and didn't explain what that meant.

I was recommended David Oliver after my previous lawyer (from the same place) dropped me right before my hearing. The judge was gracious enough to give me an extension to find a new lawyer. Thank GOD I found Mr Oliver. From day one he was realistic, informative, helpful, and concise.

He helped me understand what to expect, and the expectations from me while minimizing what I needed to do.

He kept in touch the whole way, I appreciate his thoughtfulness and work. Even if we hadn't won (which we did!) I still would have given him a glowing review. I highly recommend hiring Mr Oliver.
He is amazing. He did a great job with my daughters case that we had been struggling with for years. I recommend David to anyone looking for a disability attorney.

After nine years, finally got the approval for SSDI. David and his staff worked very hard to get me an approval. Their dedication, perseverance, commitment was outstanding. He never gave up and fought to the very end. I would recommend David to anyone that is in needing of a lawyer. I want to thank you for all your hard work. Its been a blessing and shout out to Egypt who helped David.
My mom just was  represented by David Oliver he was able to help her highly recommend thank you David I know it wasent easy thank  you for putting in the effort in her extremely difficult case.
David went above and beyond to help me win my case. I highly recommend David Oliver.
David and his team were amazing and helped me figure out everything I needed to win my SSI case on the first appeal. If you need a disability lawyer this is the guy.
A great experience since day 1 and I am truly grateful to Mr Oliver and his team, definitely would recommend

Approved 12/22/25 for SSDI after 4 years

I can't thank David Oliver and his staff enough!! I seriously doubt I wouldve ever been approved. He and his staff are so helpful and kind (thanks Robyn for always answering my emails quickly, I know there were many. And David, I know you are very busy but you always got back quickly as well. 5 stars, highly recommend using his office:-)

I've lived in WA state my whole life. Worked continuously from age 16 to 42. Was a nurse (LPN) from 2003-January 2022. Same job for 14 years.

In 2018 the asthma I'd had since age 7 downgraded to severe persistent eosinophilic type. Between 2018 and now I've had 18 bouts of pneumonia, multiple ER Visits and a lengthy ICU stay. Maxed out on asthma meds. On 3 daily inhalers, on prednisone every other month, use a nebulizer every 3-4 hrs about 2 weeks per month.

In counseling as my depression and anxiety worsened as my health did. On 2 antidepressants and anxiety meds.

I was fired from my allergy nurse job on 1/31/22 for some bs reasons because they couldn't say they were firing me for missing too many days.

I initially filed for SSDI in February 2022. Denied in August 2022. Spoke to David Oliver (disability lawyer) recommended by my neighbor and reapplied in October 2022. Denied again in March 2023. He appealed and I finally had my hearing before a judge in Kentucky via phone on 11/26/25. It went well.

The occupational expert recommended jobs like mail room and other jobs that wouldn't pay close to what I made as a nurse. The judge kept questioning him asking if I could miss more than 3 days per month and keep my job, or take unscheduled breaks every 3 hrs for 30 min to do a nebulizer treatment. Occupational guy said no each time. My lawyer was concerned as the judge was known to only approve 30% of the hearings he presided over.

I got the best Christmas gift finding out I was approved on 12/22/25:-) my back pay would start February 2022!! Received all the back pay on 1/1/26:-) SUCH A RELIEF after 3 years, 10 months, and 21 days!!!

We are a family of 5 and I hadn't worked the entire time we were waiting. My husband was doing 50-60 hrs per week as a 911 dispatch supervisor. Thankfully we had his income.

I was denied benefits twice despite years of medical justification.  It took quite some time, due to the SSA review timelines, but Mr. Oliver steadily guided my case to a hearing and I found out today that I was approved.  Thank you Mr. Oliver!

U get what u pay for! I wanted to win! David Oliver was honest right from the start and did everything he promised to do. Nice to have a Good & Honest Attorney. That does what they tell U. TY Mr. Oliver.

David and his associates did an amazing job on my difficult disability case.They were professional,attentive,and really made me feel like they had my back.

I would highly recommend David for your disability case.He and his staff handled everything so easily and efficiently it was over before I knew it.

Thank you again David and associates!

David Oliver was very professional and thorough with my claim. Kept me informed and prepared for my case. Would recommend David Oliver for anyone who would need legal representation and help with navigating disability issues.

I could not be more pleased with the service I received. The process was long and painful but that was all from the social security side. This office was prompt, and on the ball with everything. Highly recommended

I’m beyond grateful for David and his team. David not only won my case, but he truly took care of everything from start to finish with professionalism and compassion. I felt supported every step of the way, and he made the process so much less stressful.

I also want to mention his receptionist. I’ve noticed she has gotten some unfair criticism in other reviews, but in my experience she is wonderful. She may come across as very official at first, but once you get to know her, she is an extremely lovely person who keeps everything organized and running smoothly. I really appreciated her help and professionalism throughout the process.

If you’re looking for someone who will fight for you and actually deliver results, I can’t recommend David enough.

Its not just hype, David Oliver is good at what he does. He remembered me from a case we had in 08-09. This case was different and he was still ready to fight for me. I really enjoyed how he kept me involved in my own case. Mr. Oliver, when necessary, broke down the legal verbiage to help me understand. Never assumed I understood everything. He asked questions, really studied the case, and took notes.

If that's not enough for you, his office is literally across the hall from the Ss office. Right there in their face, ready to fight for you.

Thank you Mr. Oliver for helping me get the W.

David and his team are incredible. Very professional, and very supportive throughout the process even when I had doubts about the case. They really made it felt like I was being heard and always knew the exact right path to get the answers and evidence necessary to make the case. Simply amazing.

Anyways we did win and I’m happy about that. Maybe if you have a disability he can physically see he might take your case more seriously idk. But we won and I’m happy with that. His office location is super convenient tho.

After years of fighting Social Security we went to David he was very curttious and above all he did exatly what he said he would do and my wife should be getting her first check soon his rates are fair and i consider it money well spent most importantly my wife who is and has been disabled for years can now live without fear that she cant take care of those basic needs we all have thank you David for helping my wife get what she should have been getting years ago I'll forever be in your debt. S.S.

Consulted with Oliver about VA claim. I wanted to appeal a decision for a new rating. This attorney was quick to respond to my online inquiry with a phone call. During the phone call he briefly explained what he would need for him to represent me (letter from doctor with specific information). I got the vibe that he is a very impatient man. He had a demeaning tone of voice when he clarified some confusion on the consultation call (he either doesn’t recognize this or he does it on purpose). This was a big turn off but I was willing to obtain what he needed. Once I obtained the letter from my doctor I brought it in to his office to see if that would be enough to move forward with my VA appeal.

It’s true what others say about the receptionist in the not so positive reviews btw.

Anyway, it didn’t take long after dropping off the doctor’s letter for Oliver to reach out to me. He was unsatisfied with what the letter indicated and stated he had emailed me specific instructions. I told him he never emailed me anything (I’m sure he thought he emailed me). Based on the overall interaction with this Attorney and the non VA reviews on Google; I’ll just be taking my business elsewhere to someone who can provide a more helpful consultation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Response to VA inquiry complaint:

Sir, I read your review with some consternation. As you noted in your review statement, I was prompt in my response to your initial inquiry and after you obtained and brought in a statement from your doctor. The statement your doctor provided supported limitations that preclude your prior employment as a police officer, but it did not support an inability to work nor did it support, in my assessment, an increase in your VA rating and that was what I stated to you. I stated that I did not think I could help you based on this medical opinion.
It was unfortunate that the doctor was not supportive of your claim, but I think it best to be honest with both my clients and those who contact me inquiring about representation and to provide my best assessment of the likelihood of success with a claim or appeal. I don't recall criticizing you or being short with you in any way for your inquiry and as you yourself noted, I was prompt in responding to both.
I wish you the best if you continue to pursue benefits.

He answered all of my questions and made the whole process leading up to the hearing as clear and streamlined as possible. The paralegals always made themselves available when I needed to call. A fellow Veteran recommended David Oliver to me and thank God I made the call.  I was ready to give up.  David and his staff stuck with me and did their very best to help me keep my sanity through the lengthy process.  Over 3 years they battled for me and the day finally came with what I've been waiting to hear.  Thank you David and staff!

David Oliver is simply the best social security lawyer you could hope for. From the moment I first met with him, I was struck by his deep knowledge of the complex social security system and his unwavering commitment to getting the best possible outcome for his clients.

David listened intently as I explained my situation, asking thoughtful questions to fully understand the details. He then laid out a clear strategy, explaining each step of the process in a way that put my mind at ease. His attention to detail is truly remarkable - he left no stone unturned in building the strongest case.

Throughout my interactions with David, I was consistently impressed by his professionalism, responsiveness, and genuine care for my wellbeing. He fought tirelessly on my behalf, navigating the bureaucratic maze of social security with skill and tenacity. His persuasive arguments and meticulous preparation were instrumental in securing the favorable decision I received.

Beyond his impressive legal prowess, David has a wonderful caring  manner that makes you feel heard, supported, and in capable hands. He has a calming presence that helps alleviate the stress of such an important legal matter. I always felt that I could reach out to him with any questions or concerns, and he would provide clear, thoughtful guidance.

If you are in need of a social security lawyer, I cannot recommend David Oliver highly enough. He is simply the gold standard in his field - a true expert who will go above and beyond to ensure you get the benefits you deserve. I am forever grateful for his exceptional representation and unwavering commitment to his clients.

Mr David Oliver. He helped me out so much and he is very kind person he goes above and beyond make sure you get your benefits. Because of his team none of this would happen. Thank you David Oliver and your team
Had a really good experience. David knows what he's talking about, is very organized, and made a frustrating process a lot less frustrating for me. Would recommend.

Mr. Oliver and his staff did a fantastic job on my case.  They were friendly and professional.  Mr. Oliver was great about explaining things to me and letting me know what the next step would be.  I would highly recommend Mr. Oliver.  I told a couple of my friends about him, and one of them is now working with Mr. Oliver.
Excellent work, always polite & informative. Just the absolute best lawyer!

We finally won on our second try (my 3rd). I never was in court for the first 2 times, so I can't tell you how that went. I wasn't even told when they were let alone be invited to them. However on the 3rd try (his 2nd try) David was awesome in court. He always got questionnaires for the doctors made up quickly and sent them right away. He answered and returned calls every time! A big thank you to David Oliver and associates!
Very helpful

I had the best experience with Erica Matson's guardianship services. From start to finish, the process was handled with exceptional care, professionalism, and expertise. Erica Matson was incredibly thorough, kind, and compassionate, while also being efficient and highly proficient in navigating the legal requirements of guardianship. Every step was clearly explained, and I felt supported and respected throughout the entire process. I am deeply grateful for the outstanding service provided and would highly recommend Erica Matson to anyone in need of guardianship assistance.
My Will and information were in big need for her expertise... I was totally impressed with her ability... Rachel Rolfs was very impressive and insightful...so much better than my last attorney...

reviews.text: I can’t describe how great this firm is! My daughter has cerebral palsy and spastic quadriplegia. She can’t walk or talk, and she has limited use of her hands. Her former attorney placed a very restrictive conditions on my daughter that kept her from doing things she was capable of doing and enjoyed doing. Rehmke law office gave my daughter her freedom to live in a least restrictive environment and enjoy her hobbies and investments. The Rehmke attorney took the time to interview my daughter to get to know her abilities and personality. Both my daughter and I felt this was very important to get a feel for my daughter’s abilities and personality. From there, a legal plan to maximize my protection over my daughter was formed. When we went before the judge, our attorney presented our case in a respectful and inarguable manner. The judge went from a granite hard expression to one of the most beautiful smiles I’ve seen! I will and have recommended Rehmke to several people to represent them due to how effective our attorney was. As my lifestyle changes and to continue to protect my daughter’s interests, I will return for Rehmke’s services. I can’t speak highly enough about this firm and attorneys!
Excellent guidance, first class explanations, helpful in setting up will and addressing our concerns.
Expert recommendations & advice in a friendly positive environment.

Every one there has been super helpful and nice I definitely recommend them to all especially Andrew helland he answered all my questions and problems I had so would really recommend him and use him in the future
Helland Law is a small firm in a big city, and they are very busy. All three Attorneys are VERY good at what they do, and they are amazing and kind people.

Their attorney Christy McKinley ruining peoples life and based on false information and allegations that her clients provide, obviously she only doing it to make money and not care to have families peacefully get the divorce or keep the marriage , I get it it’s her job and all about money but messing with  people mentally and by providing false statement ruining their life is not good , i would feel miserable to do what she’s doing , remember Karma
They advertise free consultation and told me nicely on the phone it's 300 dollars but the lady on the phone was kind😁

I called and paid for a consultation and Jeanie at the front desk told me to expect a call around 3:30pm but not to call them because the attorney was in a meeting and she wanted to give him a little time in between appointments. So I waited. I began calling them after 4pm hoping to reach someone but was unable to. Days later when I had already hired other council I heard back from Jeanie saying that she would get me in another day. When I said that I had already hired someone else because the whole thing was so unprofessional and that I would like my money back for the service they failed to show up for, Jeanie said she would ask about it and is supposedly still asking about it nearly a week later. Do not hire. Waste of time and money.

I hired Bob for my divorce and custody case after being referred by another attorney back in 2017.  There was a lack of time and energy put into my case. I expected them to tell me step-by-step what I needed to do and they never gave me all the info/details I needed. Ex. - Before my hearing, they told me which documents were required by the court but failed to tell me there was a page limit. Also, I thought the first hearing would determine the custody/divorce. I didn't know I would wait months for the hearing that would determine everything. Bob handed my case over to Andrew without letting me know. Less time/attention was put into my case after the first hearing. I only got phone calls/emails from them when the court required something. There were numerous times that I had to call/email them to ask them to answer my first call/email after days of no response. I was charged the minimum time allotment (I think 20 mins) for them to read an email which asked them to respond to my first email. When a g.a.l. was appointed, I was mailed some paperwork and Bob said I didn’t need to fill any of it out. Then after getting an email from the g.a.l. asking for paperwork, I looked through the papers and realized that I did need to fill it out. This was embarrassing and made me look bad. Andrew went with me to mediation. Most of the mediation was me just sitting there and Andrew chiming in every now and then. I didn't get the help and guidance that I paid so much for. I also got very mixed signals in terms of feeling like he was on my side and trying to protect me from the stuff my ex-husband and his attorney were trying to get away with. He pointed things out a few times that they had tried to sneak into the parenting plan and he said this isn’t ok and needs to be changed. Other times he seemed indifferent/like he didn’t care and was super quiet. By the time my court hearing came up I wanted to find a different attorney but felt like I didn’t have enough time to do so. Due to all of the above, I made a decision that I will regret for the rest of my life and made a deal with my ex because I felt I had no other choice. After all of the paperwork was finalized and I was mailed copies of everything, I was told by Andrew that I could go ahead and change my name at any time. I went to the DOL to update my license only to find out that my copy of the paperwork WASN'T CERTIFIED and that I would need to come back with a certified copy. I had to call and ask that they send me one without charging me for it... When my bf picked up my trial retainer refund, Dena was super rude and unprofessional towards him and laughed at him when he was surprised the refund was only $300. She joked about it with the other office staff saying we thought we were going to get it all back. My bf corrected her and said no we didn't expect to get it all back but we expected more than that since we didn't go to trial. The next year, my ex moved with our kids out of the boundary that's listed in our parenting plan. I had to take him to court, so I found a new attorney. My new attorney was a MILLION times more helpful. She said if Helland had asked me for documents for dr./dentist visits for my kids showing that I took them to their appts. that it is a HUGE factor in determining custody. NO ONE AT HELLAND TOLD ME THIS/EVER MENTIONED IT! She ALSO said attorneys who nickel-and-dime people don't like those clients and most attorneys who have ethics/morals don't do this. Knowing that I easily could have gotten full custody (especially after going to court and seeing other custody cases where the mother was awarded full custody despite not working or had things that I thought were "negative" going against her) and HLG failed me/took my money is incredibly depressing. Helland Law Group has negatively affected me and my kids' lives for the rest of their adolescent years. I will regret the choices I felt forced to make due to their failure to properly help me for the rest of my life.
Money suckers👎👎👎

I am an active duty service member, currently deployed overseas. I was in search of legal representation and I couldn’t have found a better law office to help and guide me on such a short notice. HELLAND LAW GROUP! Have made my deployment less stressful and a huge weight off my shoulders. I finally have a peace of mind while finishing out my time out here. I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney to represent my case. Andrew Helland stepped in immediately and handled my case with such compassion, diligence and overall professionalism. Best decision I made. Cost was very reasonable. Jeannie Pierce is very sweet and compassionate. She makes you feel like you’re part of her family. She is very welcoming and you can feel you’re in good hands. I definitely recommend.

I made sure to come back and review. Jeanie at the front desk is a dream. She has a great memory, is knowledgeable, and honestly is a top tier human. Anything to do with the law can be trash, but this firm is hands down excellent. They have a dog, Slater. IN. THE. OFFICE. He’s divine. They gave me stickers of said dog as a very old adult. I can get into details about the work, which again is excellent but there was something so wonderful about being treated like a human, and a special human with this firm. All of them there are doing it right,

Patti is a fantastic lawyer. From the beginning she has made sure all my questions were asked with all the stress I had and let me know it's going to be ok. I have been accused of everything while doing everything on my own. Being in a parenting plan where I was broken down as a bad mom was the worst thing to read in the papers filed against me. I was also pregnant with our 3rd child so stress and emotions were the worst at this time. I was told to focus on having our son and not court. To just enjoy having our new one. Not only is her office so understanding and compassionate but they go for what's right. The kids really do come first. It's nice to have a lawyer who cares as much about what's best just as I do.
Been doing business with them for over 45 years that should say alot for them

With my second divorce, I had trouble finding good lawyers the first time around. What I discovered with most lawyers,  they would only answer a couple questions and expect the money upfront before they can answer any more questions. Second time around, I sure did my homework looking around for a sincere lawyer. When I discussed my concerns with Andrew, he was patient and answered all my questions when needed, he waited for me to be ready to move forward.

Andrew Helland is highly knowledgeable and responsive.Through the process of divorce, he was honest about the process and answered any concerns I needed to know regarding the situation. Andrew was also attentive  and would instantly notice if there is any issues and make sure that we didn't miss anything in the process.

I feel highly positive about Andrew, and no regrets about having him as my lawyer as he's one of the best I have ever had. I would definitely share references for Andrew and his firm. From my discovery through the process his firm is well known in Tacoma, and most of other Mediators, norms, attorneys and Judges do like working with them because of their honest characters.

I love the quality of service and the professionalism of the staff.
Is rarely do we get to say or hear good things about lawyers and their office. I Fully trust this group and they have an office dog! I guess I trust dog people.

Attorneys Bob Helland, Patti Steele and the Team have assisted me in navigating a complex and at times difficult family law system for several years. I couldn’t ask for a more professional, dedicated Attorney/Team to represent me. Outstanding service !
I have referred several friends to the Helland Law Group (Family Court and Personal Injury) and they have had similar positive resolutions to their cases and couldn’t thank me enough!

I contacted Attorney Andrew Helland to represent me in one of the worst events in my life. I cannot speak highly enough about my experience.

Andrew Helland is incredibly knowledgeable, responsive and was attentive to any questions/concerns I had leading up to the court date. He was honest about what the alternatives were in approach and the likely challenges that might be faced. He helped me to see what choices would serve me best.

Not only was he able to skillfully navigate the difficult waters of an unjust accusation, his calm and empathetic support allowed me to de-stress knowing I would be well represented. The relief that comes once Andrew Helland is on the case is life altering.

Attorney Helland's excellent legal mind, compassion and experience helped me to envision a future without the trauma of what I was experiencing very quickly. I couldn’t be happier with the outcome Andrew Helland was skillfully able to craft

I would recommend Attorney Andrew Helland without reservation to anyone looking for an excellent lawyer with a great support team.

Andrew and his staff is beyond amazing!  They are ALL genuine, very responsive and informative. From the first time speaking with Andrew he made time and effortlessly answered all of our questions and concerns. We would recommend Helland to anyone, worth every dollar. Thank you again, Helland Law Group!

Bob and Mindy were very instrumental in my custody case. It was very stressful and time consuming, the fact Bob and Mindy had continually let me know that things will get better, was a stress reliever and eased my pain of not seeing my son. They were right and a few months after the litigation was finalized, my son and I were back in each other’s presence. I now have my son closed to 50% of the time and my Ex and I are amicable.
Custody cases can be very unsettling and stressful please trust in time, it’ll all work out.

Thank you to the Helland Law Group.
Patricia Steele is a horrible lawyer.
Great law office i did not post anyother reviews other than this one

reviews.text: About a year ago I separated with my 20 year girlfriend. Getting a lawyer is never a happy moment but when I found Bob he talked to me as a normal person. Thank you again for everything Bob
Andrew Helland was very professional and knowledgeable, great to work with. Our Wills were completed in a timely manner, accurately, and at a reasonable fee. Would highly recommend!!!

Patricia flat out lied to me on the phone, and is currently avoiding me while her client violates a court ordered parenting plan. They are both using the courts being closed to keep a 2 year old little girl from her father.

What can I say...Patricia Steele has been my attorney since 2016. Patricia is VERY confident in her field of work and her results confirm that. She has a life long client with me and my family! Even Jeannie and Aubrey are so friendly and reassuring!

Patti was incredible. She is thorough, honest, assertive, and kind. She handled my very sensitive case with excellence and care. We don't regret a single dollar we spent. I even had my opposing party refer a friend.

This office is staffed with the most amazing professionals. I had an excellent consultation and was given nothing but the best legal service throughout my case. Will be spreading the word to friends and family in need of legal assistance!
Professional and entirely competent. Friendly staff.
Best attorney ever...hang on

They're the  best.   This kind of thing is expensive , but from beginning to end I felt like their only client.   The first surprise in my case came through at 7pm -mid-week and Andrew jumped on it without hesitation.  Mindy pulled it all together.   I really feel like they value my money.  From beginning to end they were there for me - very fast.
Been extremely beneficial for me for a long time.  Very friendly.

These folks are not only true professionals, but genuinely very nice people. I have never been in such a warm, welcoming law office.
