reviews.text:
I am surprised to see such good things shared about Kevin Rundle on these reviews.

I am a hard working professional when it comes to communication and justice.

Kevin and his Paralegal Andrea have done nothing but mis guide the court and then turn around and do the opposite of what we agreed on in court.

He believes what he says goes and will force you into unnecessary high conflict situations, and probably framed it as your best interest to keep his pocket paid.

He has dilberately made it so my case would not be heard, threatened me with slander in order to come to an agreement, and used his connections in the family law, non chalant attitude, and misinterpreting of facts and timelines to negate due process.

If your other party hires Kevin Rundle prepare to be lied to and about throughout the whole case.

And his paralegal Andrea seems to be picking up fast, concern of the credibility of the entire culture of this firm.

I will be reporting him to the WSBA with proper documentation to support my claims.As I believe he should not be in family law.

Go over to civil matters or something, Our children need advocates, not money hungry vultures that increase conflict in the parties and Obstructs Justice by jumping around calenders and voiding due processes.

I truly cannot thank Jonathan and his team enough for everything they did for me during one of the hardest times in my life. Going through a divorce is emotionally exhausting, and as a minority without family support here, it was also incredibly isolating and frightening. There were many moments when I felt alone and unsure of how I would protect myself and my children. From the very beginning, Jonathan made me feel protected, heard, and supported.

One moment I will never forget was my first temporary orders hearing. My ex-spouse’s attorney was very aggressive and intimidating, and it was an incredibly stressful experience. But Jonathan stood up for me with confidence, strength, and professionalism. He fought for me and made sure my voice was heard. Because of his preparation and advocacy, I was granted everything I truly needed. My ex-spouse was even requesting alimony, which was completely unreasonable, and Jonathan made sure that did not happen. That moment showed me I had someone truly fighting for me.

I am also incredibly grateful for Dian and Mellisa, his paralegals. They were always kind, patient, and responsive. They helped me understand every step, answered my questions, and made sure nothing was overlooked. They treated me with respect and compassion during a time when I felt very vulnerable.

What makes this team special is not just their legal knowledge, but their humanity. They understood how much was at stake for me—my home, my children, and my stability. They helped me protect my future when I felt like I had no one else standing beside me.

Because of Jonathan, Dian, and Mellisa, I was able to move forward with peace, dignity, and security. I will always be grateful for their support and dedication. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone who needs not only a strong and skilled attorney, but a team that truly cares about you as a person.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Gerelchimeg,
Thank you so much for taking the time to write this review for Jonathan, Dian and Melissa! We really appreciate you sharing your experience so that it might help someone in a similar circumstance. Our mission is always to obtain the best possible client experience, which isn't always easy with such difficult, stressful situations that come with family law. We're happy to hear that your experience working with our team was a positive one. Thanks again!

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text: I was qouted 3 to 6k by a local attorney after I had already consulted with Kevin Rundle at Envision, I decided to stick with Kevin and pay a bit more thinking I would get better representation,  Boy was I wrong ! I Recieved Horrible Representation,  There was no law broken, He and his helper completely dropped the ball !  Charged me Alot more, Atleast 3x the money, quoted me around 6k and eventually exceeded that by over 10k They submitted my crucial evidence and proof to the court blurry as in unable to read and make out the requested dates ! My wife was up all night getting these exhibits together for them And then in court Kevin fumbled through my case like he was looking at it for the first time.  I was found in contempt of a parenting plan when I clearly was not in contempt, had my case reviewed by a Judge, the Judge made a comment about how she couldn't read an important form, opposing council offered to give her a clear copy kevin said nothing when this form was one of the several proving I didn't do what I was being accused of, I was supposidly rufunded a small portion and offered another $ 500.00 wich is peanuts in comparison to what ive spent.,  This also did not help the next support modification hearing. I am Very un happy and upset that my ex can mislead the court with lies and get away with it , now im responsible for her attorney fees which are (luckily Alot less than mine) a sanction, the negligence This firm committed caused injustice and financial burden !  contemplating what to do next.

Janice and Michelle went above and beyond to help me in my divorce. They were professional, efficient, kind, and treated me like a person and not just a client. Janice listened to my needs and concerns and fought for me and my children throughout my divorce. I highly recommend Envision Family Law!!

My divorce case started under unfortunate circumstances and Kevin and his team moved quickly to get me in front of a judge. Going through a high conflict divorce, it was important to have someone who knew all the best options, and how to deal with opposition. After the first paralegal I was working with had moved on to another company, I was paired with someone else who I felt wasn't communicating well or being responsive, Kevin immediately switched me to another a paralegal no questions asked. While my divorce was longer than I expected, the only reason it was finalized was because Kevin knew how to keep it moving.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Tristen,
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave this review for Kevin! We appreciate that, with the already stressful circumstances of a divorce, having the right people on your team to help you through it is invaluable. We're glad to hear that Kevin and his paralegal were able to provide you with the help you needed.

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text: My ex husband hired Envision, and was originally represented by Daniela Lazar. She knew he is an abuser, yet she fought tooth and nail to cover that up and try to take my kids from me- not ask for fair custody- take them entirely. I have raise my kids for 14 years and she thought it was appropriate to rip them from their home and order supervised visitation. It’s one thing to fight for your client to get fair custody and another to ignore facts, lie under oath, victim shame and support abusers, putting those children in danger. I would never want to hire a firm without integrity. Not to mention, wildly expensive and they still didn’t win his case for him. My kids went through hell because this firm lacks integrity. His new attorney is no better. Her words in court, knowing full well the extreme abuse her client has put me through (I’m talking black eyes, broken facial bones, etc) “now that there is no man in the home, ms Thompson has turned to abusing her children”- DISGUSTING. This firm should be ashamed. All they care about is the money. My ex husband has spent probably close to 60k…. For poor legal advice, and corrupt attorneys.

This law firm turned into a nightmare for me. Nothing was ever done to help me and I ended up being in severe debt with no answers and still currently in court. And now without a lawyer. After my ex was ordered to help pay for lawyer fees, Mr. Moffit immediately released me when I did not pay the fees personally (after already dumping thousands of dollars into him)
Since then I have received absolutely Nothing that was ordered in the temporary order with the judge and have not heard personally from Mr. Moffit. The moment he lost his case he completely backed out and left me in the dark with zero answers and no help. My case was an unusual one but I wasn’t a waste of time and I should’ve been represented fairly.

Mr. Moffitt and his team saved my life and helped restore my relationship with my 4 year old daughter. My divorce and family case took a year to finally settle and avoided an expensive trial. I truly believe God provided me with the right  lawyer for my case and defended me with unmoved faith and skill to fight for me. Before hiring Jonathan, I attempted to protect myself from my ex husband’s vengeance.  I attempted to get a DVPO for myself and was denied due to lack of evidence. My ex husband was military had served me a DVPO a few days before Christmas. This made me homeless and no contact with my daughter. I was devasted that I lost everything. He cut me off all resources and I could not find anyone to represent me for hearing on January 3rd.  After his DVPO went through, I was desperate for help. I consulted with others and Jonathan stood out to me. From the consultation, he assured me that he was experienced with high conflict divorces. Jonathan was able terminated the unwarranted DVPO. Hearing after hearing, he fought for me and was able to hold my ex accountable. Divorce is either painful or excuratting painful. I highly recommend Mr. Moffitt and his team to represent anyone that is going through a high conflict divorce.

reviews.text: Outstanding Family Law Attorney group!  I really appreciate their hard work, dedicated efforts, attention to detail, and clear and timely communication.  An extremely impressive team. Ms. Leblanc and Ms. Parsons are undoubtedly the best.

I’m incredibly grateful for the legal support I’ve received from Attorney Nicholas Lovelace and his paralegal, Olivia Leszkai. Throughout a very difficult and emotional time, they have consistently prioritized the safety of both myself and my child.

What stood out most was how proactive they’ve been—not only helping me navigate the legal process, but also offering realistic, thoughtful solutions for what conditions could be proposed for my ex to regain his parental rights in a safe and structured way. That guidance has given me both clarity and peace of mind.

Nicholas is knowledgeable, strategic, and compassionate, and Olivia has been incredibly responsive and supportive along the way. I’ve felt heard, protected, and well-advised throughout this process. I would absolutely recommend their team to anyone facing a complex or high-conflict family law case.
I’d like to thank Kevin and Sheri for supporting me through a child custody case. They were very responsive to any questions or concerns that I had.Thanks for all the hard work you guys did.

*KEVIN RUNDLE and SHERI EARLY*

I was referred to Evision Family Law by a friend when I found myself in the most bizarre and sudden situation. Kevin Rundle and Sheri Earlys representation took so much weight off of my shoulders. They are both wonderful to work with and made me feel safe, putting my family's well being above all. I felt initially, that I would feel worry every time my representation would call, but Sheri and Kevin are so down to earth, logical, and understanding, that I instantly knew they would have my back and I felt comfortable at my most vulnerable of times. They helped me see the bright future ahead and a new hope. Thank you Kevin Rundle and Sheri Early at Envision Family Law!!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi J,
We really appreciate you leaving a review for Kevin and Sherie, and we're glad to hear that they gave you such a positive experience during such a stressful time. Thanks again!

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text: You in need of a lawyer that will stand up for you and defend you to the end?. Kevin Rundle is not your guy. I had a d.v order with upcoming child custody and divorce hearings. 17,000 dollars later I've had one single court date and it was a apsalute disgrace watching Kevin on court. He talked a great game but ultimately was unprepared for the court. My ex submitted a flash drive off "evidence" Rundle hadn't even viewed it in fact had absolutely no idea what was on it. I had one crucial thing that I needed to defend. I knew for sure it would be an issue. Well after e mailing Rundle several times about a strategy I was ultimately ignored. Guess what price of evidence was used to impose the order. Kevin had no discernible direction in his case or the way to handle it. The judge has more good words to say about me than Rundle even spoke. After court I approached him about his conduct he came up with no discernable answer. I've spent 17,000 on a single court date and it was an absolute failure. Sometimes I feel like my wife had two attorneys.. Rundle is lazy, disorganized, and better suited to be a public defender..

This team was exactly what I needed. Erin and Kevin helped me through some repeated family law issues that I saw no end to! They stood on business and didn’t let the opposing counsel bully their way through this, again! Come with clear understanding and they will deliver!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Michael,
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave this review for Erin and Kevin! We appreciate you sharing your story!

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text:
I had a rough start with Envision Law, but that was during covid and my lawyer a medical condition that affected her ability to represent me.  As a result Jason Benjamin, a leading partner, took over my family law case and he did an amazing job.   With the help of Erin, is legal assistant, they made the very unpleasant process of family court as positive as they could, they even understood my frustrations and listened to my concerns the entire time.

I would recommend Jason to anyone who needs help with family law.   His record speaks volumes, but his work speaks for itself.

This was the first time I’ve ever needed an attorney, so I wasn’t sure what to expect or have any past experience to compare it to—but I feel incredibly fortunate to have found Atty Kevin Rundle and his paralegal Erin.
The process was long, complicated, and emotionally draining, but thanks to my attorney and his amazing paralegal, I now have a parenting plan that keeps my son safe.

The case involved serious concerns about the father’s severe mental health issues. My legal team handled everything with care, professionalism, and a strong focus on my child’s best interests. They were thorough, strategic, and genuinely compassionate. The paralegal was especially helpful—organized, responsive, and always on top of things.

Even though I was unfamiliar with the legal process, they walked me through every step, made sure I understood my options, and always made me feel supported. I’m beyond grateful for their work and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone facing a high-conflict custody situation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Corissa,
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review for Kevin and Erin! We appreciate you sharing your experience working with them and are happy to hear they helped you get such a favorable outcome!

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text: I have worked directly with Envision Family Law on a personal issue for over a year and a half.  As a retired Navy Veteran, they are straight forward and have your best interest in mind when handling difficult and sensitive family issues.  Mr. Troy Courage and his team did an outstanding job over the course of time keeping my best interest in mind.  Remember, you get what you pay for, and Envision Family Law is worth every cent!  Matter of fact, Ms. Tina Pyatt, Director of Accountants ensured monies were expeditiously returned once my case closed.  They are honest and accurate!  Don't research any further, call Envision Family Law and start righting any wrong that you feel needs to be fixed in your life or the life of someone you care about!  They are the Best of the Best!

Working with Kevin and Andrea made a difficult choice, an easier process. I was concerned in the beginning because I am located overseas but they were still able to handle my case and work with me to close a chapter in my life. I was able to get statuses and updates throughout and they answered all of my questions and concerns with professionalism and patience. For that I am truly grateful.

Kelly Leblanc and Lisa Parsons have been a life saver. They have guided me through the most difficult times of my life and have been there for me from the start. They show compassion, hard work and dignity at every turn. I wouldn't trust any other lawyer team with my legal issues than these two amazing people. I highly recommend them to anyone needing legal advice or representation. Thank you so much you two!

After 2 1/2 years of cheap attorney that only made me look bad I reached out to Janice and Michelle. Janice took over my case. From the start Janice was very kind and comforting. Janice jumped write in and from there on out she turned the table around in the court room. Everything started changing in me and my son's faver. By the end of the case Janice had gotten me everything I was asking for and then some. I went from 1 day a week to every other weekend to Wednesday over night and weekends to 50/50 in a matter of no time. I couldn't have made a better choice by having Janice representing me. I would highly recommend Janice and Michelle for any child custody issues. God bless them both.
Thank you Janice and Michelle for all that you have done for my son and I!

I had the pleasure of working with Kevin Rundle and Andrea during my divorce. Ultimately, I ran out of money just before my trial date, but Kevin and Andrea were a great support during the hardest portions of navigating custody, support schedules, and helping coach me through keeping a level head when opposing counsel used less than savory tactics to try and discredit me.
At the end of the day, they helped me keep the interests of my kids in the forefront and helped me take the first big step in a life changing circumstance.

Kelly LeBlanc is what I call a powerhouse in a pencil skirt! She took on my case after two other previous failed attempts (from other firms) due to my ex's contemptuous, shameless, above-the-law abuse of the legal system. From the initial consultation Kelly LeBlanc and her paralegal Lisa Parsons demonstrated an unwavering commitment to my case. They both listened and understood my emotional turmoil and assured me they would fight for the truth and validation I deserved. Kelly LeBlanc possesses exceptional legal expertise and a very sharp intellect. She meticulously analyzed all evidence and identified weaknesses in my ex's case. She refused to allow his sidelining and lies. Instead she presented a compelling, factual argument leaving no room for doubt regarding my case.
Thanks to Kelly LeBlanc's diligence and dedication, I finally got the justification I deserved. Kelly and Lisa not only won my case but also helped me reclaim my life to move forward with confidence. Kelly LeBlanc is a true advocate for justice and a champion for her clients. I so appreciate both Kelly and Lisa. I wholeheartedly recommend Kelly LeBlanc and this amazing powerhouse of a team!

I had originally worked with Jason and have followed him to this group. Had received nothing but the best with him. But when it came this Anna Twombly Linden in law group I was very disappointed. Didn’t get the representation I should have gotten. Was under prepared for court. Didn’t process all the evidence I had submitted to her. Put me up to speak in court with no warning. While she barely spoke in my defense.. Nickel and dime me for everything she could in the process. She way to over priced for her abilities.cost should have been $5,000 actual cost $15000
I could go on about what happened after I switch to my old lawyer in this law group but I’m so over this pain.. I’ve no help
Use to recommend and now I don’t.
They took on my case, and it was handled very professionally, and quickly. Envision Family Law was the best choice I could have made and it was worth every damn penny.

I had the absolute pleasure of working with Janice and her exceptional paralegal, Michelle, during my family law mediation. From the very beginning, their communication was nothing short of stellar. They kept me informed and reassured every step of the way, which was incredibly comforting during such a challenging time.

Meeting Janice in person at the office was a truly welcoming experience. She has been practicing for 7 years and has earned a spot on the Super Lawyers list for the past five years—a testament to her expertise and dedication. Janice is not only highly knowledgeable but also wonderfully personable and easy to talk to. She has a unique ability to make you feel at ease, even in the most emotional and stressful situations.

Janice's thorough understanding of family law and her compassionate approach made a world of difference for me. She was well-informed and provided clear, concise advice that helped me navigate the complexities of my case. The cost of representation was as expected, and I appreciated the opportunity to complete some of the documentation myself to reduce the overall cost.

I am confident in Janice's abilities and will be retaining her for all future negotiations with my former spouse regarding custody of our child. Her professionalism, warmth, and dedication have earned my highest recommendation.

I just want to take this time to thank Kevin and Erin. They made life so much easier, very responsive to any questions I had through my child support/custody case. At the beginning I thought it would be a breeze to handle it on my own, but after working with Erin and Kevin I came to understand why it was very important to have a knowledgeable attorney and team behind me to make sure I recieved the best possible outcome. Hopefully I won’t need the help again but IF I DID, i would definitely return. 10/10 would recommend. Thank you again Erin, Kevin and envision law group.

Kevin Rundle was the answer to my prayers!  He and his team in Envision Family Law provided me comfort and a sense of ease while going through my Child Custody case.  I have nothing but praises for this fine group of professionals!

I was a father of 5 children when going through my separation/divorce in 2015.  I had provided Child Support for my children since then.  Now, four of my children are adults and my youngest daughter had been abandoned by her mother.  Having my daughter live with me now 100% of the time is truly a blessing, but it has also been a challenge dealing with the government and school system.  Even though I had fathers' rights and a Parenting Plan that says I can make decisions concerning my child, they needed approval from her mother to do anything.  Even after explaining that her mother abandoned her and neglected her parental responsibilities, they would not lift a finger since I was listed as the non-custodial parent.

I needed legal assistance, but I was down on my luck financially.  I had to withdraw from my 401K due to hardship!  Kevin was gracious and chose to help me during my time of need.  After hearing my story, he offered me a discount for his hourly services and lessened his retainer fee to relieve my pockets.  We need more people like Kevin in this harsh world!  He made it possible for me take care of my beautiful daughter without having to deal with the absence of her mother.  Kevin, I said it many times already, but from the deepest part of my heart, I thank you for everything you have done for me and my family!  God bless you and your team!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Ray,
We really appreciate you taking the time to leave this review for Kevin! We're so glad to hear that you were happy with his help in your case and that it turned out so well for your family! Thanks again!

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text: After what started out being an ugly custody battle, this guy doesn't get back to people in a timely matter, and he lets his ego lose your case, and make the judge and other opposing party mad to the point if I would have signed the paper work he wrote up, I would have lost so much more grounds than what I had agreed with my ex. He doesn't fill out paper work correctly and in my experience this guy is a joke. He does his paper work very last second, and when I told him how I would prefer things, he dropped me as a client 2 hours before my deadline was due, so I myself got it done and turned in with a half hour to spare

Unfortunately, I was also going thru probate for a sister who passed unexpectedly and the difference between the Envision Law and the probate law firm was like night and day!  Envision Family Law was totally professional from start to finish and I got my refund due back to me in less than a week.  That other law firm...horribly unprofessional from start to finish. I would highly reccommend.

This is our second time in a year needing legal services from Envision Family law and specifically Kevin Rundle. I cannot recomend Kevin and Envision enough! reviews.text: I cannot recommend Attorney Kelly LeBlanc and Paralegal Lisa Parsons from Envision Family Law enough. They did an amazing job at helping me work through a contentious and complicated divorce case. Though I naively had anticipated our divorce to be straightforward, it proved to be a very challenging and emotional process.  Ms. LeBlanc's expertise allowed me to navigate hearings, mediation, and the final negotiations successfully, which allowed me to reach a fair and very favorable outcome for me and my daughters. Ms. Parsons was there every step of the way helping to keep all documentation and filings in order and allowed the divorce to keep moving along smoothly.  Ms. LeBlanc always helped keep my focus on the broader picture and goals.  Most importantly, we were able to get a fair parenting plan and schedule that allows our daughters to spend time with both parents equally.  Ms. LeBlanc and Ms. Parsons are truly exceptional.

reviews.text:
I first retained Jason with a messy custody case 9 years ago. Since then, I have referred many people to Envision Family Law.   In 2022, I found myself in need of counsel for yet another family law case. At the time the case was initiated, in an effort to save money, I retained another firm and attorney to represent me. Looking back, I should have trusted my instinct and retained Jason's firm from the beginning. Any money that I thought I would save, was quickly diminished by the lack of legal knowledge and drawn-out hearings I endured with my previous attorney. The case had multiple layers of both civil and criminal charges throughout Pierce County when I called Envision. Jason and his team (his paralegal, Erin specifically) were quick to get up to speed on every messy hearing, motion and affidavit that was in the dockets. Often times, calling well after business hours or during their breaks just so they could ensure I was receiving the best legal help. They were compassionate and understanding and eager to help. Jason is knowledgeable, quick-witted, organized and professional. He will tell you his honest opinion, whether that is in your favor or not. He works seamlessly with his support staff and is always willing to go the extra mile. He is well-respected in the courts and very personable and friendly while maintaining a high level of professionalism.

I'm as thankful for Jason and his team today, as I was years ago!

Do not use these people if you don't have a lot of money. They just ripped me off for close to 8k. When I first enlisted their services, I was given a lawyer named Russel. Later down the road, Russel left Envision and I was referred to a different lawyer by the name of Joshua. Let me tell you, that this guy didn't do nothing for me. I have a simple divorce, no property, no accounts, no children. This guy just kept draining my trust sending emails and letters to my ex's lawyer at 80 dollars a pop. We are in the final stage of the divorce in which all we have to do is agree and sign the papers. I have never recieved a call from him about my case except for when he accepted my case. I received another email from him before telling me he doesn't know what to do because her lawyer won't respond, and that I should seek legal aid. Isn't that your job since i hired you. After that, I only received emails from both Envision and his office asking to refill my trust. WHY, so you can keep ripping me off. Almost 2 years later, here I am, still married, and now without representation. I called Envision 5 times now and explained that I have been misrepresented and that I need to talk to someone asap. Their solution was to send me a letter of Joshua's withdraw and to not contact me back. 8k down the drain. I have no doubt that Russel would've got the divorce done, but since Joshua didn't get the 5k retainer fee, he did not represent me properly and just wanted to rip me off by chewing away at my trust, sending emails, and letters at 80 dollars a pop. I myself have read about the no contact law in Washington and don't understand why Joshua didn't work my case properly. So sad that that people that don't have have a lot of money, and are already going through a lot, have to deal with shiesty dirty law firms that rip them off. I hope no one else went through what I went through with Envision.

Where do I begin….

2 years ago when I was reading reviews from here, I admired their success stories and I hoped to one day be one of these people. and now I am.

I am a domestic violence victim and my ex husband is in the military. I was served with divorce papers through the mail shortly after a domestic violence protection order was filed. My ex husband was strategically stalking me making it nearly impossible for me to report, and he was financially withholding funds to hurt me, which essentially hurts my ability to care for our daughter. I was struggling as a single mother, working full time, not getting the amount of support I was supposed to be getting, and I didn’t have a lawyer for the first six months into the divorce. I had no direction and a lot of evidence that I had no idea what to do with. I barely had any time to myself to think about anything other than making sure my daughter was taken care of. I was haunted by my past and I was being oppressed by the trauma I had experienced in this relationship.

I found Kevin on Google and was impressed by his positive reviews. I knew it in my gut this was the right choice after the consultation because he knew exactly what I was experiencing and going through. His biggest concern was the best interest of my daughter and that lined up with everything that I believe in. My daughter is my world and she is the reason why I left. To protect her. Kevin and his paralegal, Andrea helped me get the outcome that I desired and if I didn’t understand legal terms, they explained thoroughly what they were. They helped me understand why their recommendations and counsel were important in this case. My divorce was a very contested divorce. We couldn’t agree on anything and he was fighting me the whole way through. Kevin and Andrea thoroughly went through my mountain of evidence and organized it to use only the most prominent and most important parts of it. Throughout the period of 2 years, my husband dug himself deeper into his own lies. Statements after statements of accusations that eventually exposed himself and what he truly was after. The experience and outcome of the divorce proved that his intentions were not in the best interests of our daughter. In turn, this gave me truth about many of the things he lied about in the relationship and lastly, it gave me closure. My ex husband and his counsel spun their web while mine remained focused on the facts and resolution. During this process, I felt like I was finally able to breath and it gave me time to regain focus on the care and well-being of my daughter without feeling the weight of this divorce on my shoulders. They understand how much emotions can cloud our judgement by becoming a road block of what’s truly most important. When I removed myself from the fire to focus on what matters most, Kevin and Andrea graciously put out that fire. Kevin worked with me by ensuring that we direct most communication through his paralegal to lower legal costs for me, which I was grateful for because I was convinced that my divorce was going to trial. We came to one resolution during the settlement conference then going to mediation, and my divorce reached a settlement! Everything that is important to me reached a resolution. The outcome of my divorce is now settled thanks to the hard work and dedication of Kevin and Andrea! I will forever be grateful with the outcome.

If you are reading this and going through a very contested divorce and the other party is playing dirty, don’t dance on the decision to retain a lawyer from Envision Family Law. They have been doing this a long time and are well respected through the judicial system. They will fight for your best interests in court and you will have a better outcome than you had anticipated!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Catrina,
Thank you so much for taking the time to write this review about Kevin and Andrea and for sharing your experience! Unfortunately, your experience is an all too familiar one, but hopefully your words will inspire someone else in a similar situation to seek the help they need to get through such an ordeal. We're so pleased that you were able to get such favorable outcome and wish you the best of luck in the future!

--Envision Family Law

reviews.text:
Envision Family Law is a great resource and a great group of individuals.  Thank you to Heather Ramirez and her team.  The attention to detail and the personalized communication was a stress reliever and informative. Once again thank you all.
Will recommend.

I had the unfortunate experience of working with Daniela Lazar from Envision Family Law, and I cannot express enough how disappointed I am with both her and the firm as a whole. Daniela was recently let go by the firm without more than a week’s notice to me, and the process has been a disaster from start to finish. Here’s a breakdown of my experience, which I would not wish on anyone dealing with sensitive family law matters.

First, communication with Daniela was nearly impossible. She was consistently unresponsive, with emails going unanswered for over a week at times. When I finally received responses, they were often unclear or didn’t address my questions, leaving me in the dark on how to handle situations or respond to the opposing party. On the rare occasion she did respond promptly, her guidance was vague, and there was little to no follow-up to ensure things were on track.

In court, Daniela was beyond unprofessional. She struggled to keep basic facts about my case straight, often stumbling over her words and showing a lack of confidence. It was clear she was unprepared, unable to answer straightforward questions from the judge, and frequently failed to anticipate how her decisions would impact me and my family. This lack of preparation and focus caused immediate issues that I had to “just deal with” afterward, with no solutions offered.

At one point, I tried to discuss my dissatisfaction with Daniela’s handling of the case, only for her to abruptly say she would be dropping me as a client. Within hours, she had filed to withdraw from my case, leaving me stranded. This kind of behavior shows a total lack of regard for clients and their situations.

The firm itself was no better. When I requested a refund of my remaining balance after deciding I no longer wanted Daniela as my attorney, they sent the refund to an old account I hadn’t used in months. This mistake led to weeks of trying to recover my funds with zero support from the firm. They laughed it off like it was nothing more than a minor inconvenience and ignored my emails when I tried to address my concerns.

After switching attorneys, I’ve been shocked at how poorly my case was handled under Daniela’s watch. Several attorneys I consulted were appalled by the amount of money I’d already spent with Envision Family Law and the disorganized state of my case. My new attorney accomplished more in one hearing than Daniela managed in three, with none of the mistakes or unprofessional conduct.

This was a deeply disappointing experience, and I would never recommend Daniela Lazar as an attorney or Envision Family Law as a firm. I am honestly shocked that someone with such poor legal skills and a lack of professionalism is legally allowed to represent clients. Save yourself the stress and look elsewhere for a firm that takes both you and your case seriously.

Hello Jan

Today I found myself on opposite sides of a legal negotiation with my wife.  That is a sandbox I had not played in. I walked into that room both financially and emotionally vested in a 30 year union that was to be dissolved.  I had concerns of my future financial wellbeing, but was more concerned with the finality of what we were doing in that room.  My mind kept going to my wife, my life with her and the desire to fix this and not terminate it. I was at odds, I had stood by, and stood for her over half my life. Yet at that moment I had to stand for myself. I  am grateful you were by my side today as well as throughout this entire ordeal.   If you ever question that you are in the right place professionally, I offer the example of today in suport of that choice.    You said you wanted me “to feel whole”.  You also clarified and acknowledged we were striving for whole in a financial way.  In the many other ways one strives to feel whole was out of our scope today. Jan, at the end of the day as I walked to my car, I weighed our final agreement and saw that we had arrived at the most fare outcome for both parties.
My wife  will be well financially  and most importantly can say to her children she “was fare”.  I have a healthy nest egg that, if I am smart in my dealings, can be nurtured into a stable retirement in the short years I have until I’m seventy (Which was my major concern).  On my drive home I had the feeling of a great weight lifted from my shoulders, the weight of fear. My anxiety was gone and I no longer feared for my future.  I truly hoped we would never go through with a dissolution. However, I could not ask for a better team to care for my interest in this matter, than you and Michelle.

My utmost gratitude.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Scott,
Thank you for sharing your story. We know how difficult it can be to make the decision to divorce, along with the myriad of emotions that accompany such a decision. Thank you for choosing Envision to help you with that decision and for leaving this review of Janice and Michelle. It is always our mission to provide the best possible client experience, which can mean different things for different clients. We're happy to hear that Janice and Michelle helped you achieve the best possible experience in such a difficult situation.

--Envision Family Law

I spent years juggling numerous medical appointments, working full time, raising a family, all while suffering chronic pain.  So the last thing I needed was to deal with insurance companies, car repair costs, medical payments, etc.  That’s where Washington Law Center has come to my rescue.  They take on the work which allows you the time you need to begin to recover physically & emotionally.  Car accidents are traumatic! The team at Washington Law Center understands this & is always so compassionate and supportive.  They show you the kindness & confident control that’s needed after a life altering car accident. Ashton was amazing in handling all 3 of my accidents with the incredible support of Jennifer & Jeffery. reviews.ownerResponse:
Pam,

We want to get people answers as quickly and as thoroughly as possible but we cannot consider accepting a malpractice allegation if the caller isn’t familiar with the patient’s medical records and cannot identify a medical procedure that was incorrectly withheld or applied. Not getting treated with the degree of compassion you wish is not malpractice. The medical malpractice standard is that the medical provider treated (or failed to treat) in a way that no reasonably prudent provider would have under the circumstances. Your call was very memorable and a reminder that nobody can please everyone.

- Spencer Parr

reviews.text: My name is Francisco, born in Guatemala and raised in Mexico. I arrived in the USA without any documents from either Guatemala or Mexico in 2017. She is an excellent lawyer who worked on my case, and I highly recommend her. In 2018, I received my work permit, and in December 2021, I was approved for residency. So I recommend that you don't lose hope. Thanks to the attorney and her team, I am now happy that they worked so hard. I highly recommend attorney Campos' services; she is 100% reliable.

During the course of a two and a half year struggle through the legal system in Washington state, I received the most courteous, caring, and empathetic representation I could’ve ever hoped for. Although there are many attorneys out there who will bully, cut, fight, and cheat their way to “win” - what impressed me most about Seacoma Law was that they had moral fortitude and passion for shedding light on the truth. Matthew was thorough and very knowledgeable at each step of the long drawn out process.  Samantha is an incredible paralegal who helped in maintaining excellent records and always kept me apprised. I am very grateful for everything they have done for my family. Seacoma Law is the representation you want if heading into the legal battlefield.

reviews.text: Where do I start!? Matt guided me through one of the most difficult and trying times of my life. A contentious divorce that took almost 3 years to complete. reviews.text:
I have worked with Matthew Yetter while he was working at his two previous law firms.  Since he has even more years of experience under his belt now, I expect his new law firm will provide at least the quality of service he has provided to his clients in the past.
What I really appreciated about working with Matthew is his integrity, fairness, communication, and calm demeanor.  These were his strengths while working with me.  He listens to his clients.  He is not cut-throat in his actions and is what I was looking for in an attorney.  My ex and I share three children together and 20 years of marriage so I wanted our settlement to be fair, not nasty, and still have someone represent me that had my back; Matthew was great.  He's very calm and during a divorce, you can get pretty riled up.  Well, Matthew helps keep things calm even when the "other side" is crazy.  You also never have to worry if deadlines are being met.  He and his staff have got you covered.

reviews.text: I had the privilege of working with Dan Cook and his team during an unwanted, very stress-filled, unreasonably delayed divorce. Dan was able to keep things simple, equitable, and given the circumstances, extremely reasonably priced. Kind, compassionate, understanding, supportive, all the good things that you would hope to find in someone who is defending you and fighting fiercely on your behalf. I highly recommend Dan Cook as a lawyer, but moreover, as a human being. When my paperwork was finally brought to court, the official saw it was Mr Cook, commented that all of his documents are always done correctly and moved us to the front of the line! It was finished almost before I could grasp that it was 'my turn' and suddenly all the pieces that I'd waited for to fall into place were set into stone. I remain grateful for the work put in on my behalf by Dan, Stacy, and the rest of their team.

My divorce was a sensitive one that was taken all the way to trial! Dan Cook was amazing in the care that he took and his attention to detail in putting my documents and case together. I was very happy with the results, he was fair and kind , he also understood the turmoil I was going through and was so patient and understanding with me! His staff was super professional and courteous and I’d use them again, or recommend them in a heartbeat!

Joe Krecker

I retained Dan around October to help me right the wrongs that were slipped in to my divorce without notifying me. He had it taken care of by November! My ex was out of prison and emotionally I was no where near ready to face him. Not only were Dan and his staff respectful and professional, but I finally felt heard. I felt like this company truly had my back and fought for me when I was unable to. It took me 9 months to gather the courage to find an attorney I was comfortable with, and if anyone has similar worries for their situation I highly recommend Dan.

Dan Cook and Stacy walked me through a divorce that I really didn’t want,  and they both were really kind and professional and never got annoyed at my indecision. I would recommend Alliance to anyone who needs good solid legal advise and services.

I am writing to recognize the outstanding legal representation of Dan Cook and his team at Alliance Law Group. Dan's legal and court system prowess are exceptional. But more than the legalities, it is his genuine caring in the intangibles. In looking back, what I remember most is Dan's empathy for the rollercoaster of emotions.  Divorce is a lonely and arduous experience. For me, Dan and his team became more than just legal representation. They offered guidance in putting one's life back together. And for that I am most grateful. John Heide

Dan is a great Lawyer and exceptional human being. Dan and his team helped me navigate a difficult divorce. I wish that no one would have to go through this experience, unfortunately many of us don't have a choice. If you are in that situation and looking for a lawyer pick Dan Cook.

Dan and his team have been nothing but amazing. I first retained Dan back in 2022 for a divorce I did not want but was going through, he was kind and understanding but was the lawyer I needed..He was the spine of support I needed because I was nothing but a mess at that time. A regular divorce is awful, mine was a military one with twists and turns around every corner and he handled them with amazing grace and integrity. He always kept what was best for me and my kids at the forefront. I have since had to retain his services again and he has maintained the same honor and integrity. I would (and have) recommend Dan to anyone, especially if they were my friend or family member.
Nelson Fraley represented me in a court case with the unemployment department of Washington state. I was very happy with what he was able to provide me with this court case!
Nelson Fraley really stepped into our legal situation with both feet. He was always friendly and accessible. We couldn’t have had our success story without him.

Have had a long dispute with the State of Washington and Nelson Fraley has been excellent to work with.  He's represented us well and is always pleasant when it comes to discussing the details of our case.  His diligence and our trust in him has been the key to getting us to our favorable outcome.  Thank you!

I had called many law offices to find a little clarity on a business matter. I was referred by another attorney's office to Nelson Fraley. He took some time to provide me with a consult right away, without rushing me off the phone. He was very helpful and understanding of the situation. I plan on making Alliance Law Group my first call for any legal needs in the future.

As a dad and as an immigrant that don't know all the laws of the states, I needed more than just a lawyer for my case, I needed a person that would be able to understand me. Daniel Cook is a phenomenal attorney that shows professionalism during personal meetings as well of on front of the court judge. Daniel Cook is a family guy that knows how to fight for what it is right and have great qualities such as a good listener, a great speaker, do his research and investigation and always respond to his clients on time. It is for these reasons that I highly recommended him.

"I am so grateful for Alliance Law Group, P.S., and Nelson Fraley II.  My ex-boyfriend and I bought a timeshare together and I wanted to know my legal rights to remove him, since he was not making consistent payments and I had already paid off my portion.  This resulted in not always having access to the timeshare properties.  I decided that I wanted to be the sole owner so as to not have to worry about my credit or ability to use my timeshare points.  Nelson, worked with me and listened to my needs and concerns.  He informed me of my rights and took time to evaluate all my options.  Nelson was able to negotiate a reasonable solution with my ex-boyfriend and now I am now the sole owner of my timeshare, and I couldn’t be more thrilled!  I am so happy I chose Alliance Law Group, P.S. and Nelson Fraley II."  L.Hughes, Tacoma, WA
Great work on a complex will/trust issue. I highly recommend this firm!

reviews.ownerResponse:
The client was advised --prior to engaging me-- that:(1) Kent Municipal was a very difficult court; (2) Kent Municipal had very high fines for amended charges; and (3) my fee was reduced because of the
above two reasons. There were no viable, substantive defenses to the 17 mph over speeding charge, an amendment to "inattention"--which does not go on the driving record--was the best result. The amended fine was $345.00, but that had been previously explained to the client. The response--not from the client, but from his mother--was shrill and loud. She chose to yell at my staff who took the call. She did not want to discuss any substantive issues. She just wanted to yell at my staff. I cannot and do not guarantee any specific outcomes. Given all of the facts, this was a very favorable result for a 20 year old male driver.

reviews.text: Starting using Doug in the late 90's for my speeding tickets. Doug has gotten 5 speeding tickets of mine dismissed. He even got me off a Carpool/HOV lane violation! Doug has been so good getting me off that I continue to speed and get tickets...oh Well...as long as Doug is around I'm in good shape.

I highly recommend Matthew Ennis for anyone needing an employment law consultation. After spending days searching for an attorney to review documents, Matthew was the only one who stepped up to help. He was professional, incredibly patient, and took the time to ensure all my questions were answered, which I truly appreciated during a stressful time. He didn't rush the process, and made sure I felt confident and informed before moving forward. If you want an attorney who is both highly competent and approachable, look no further.
Matthew Ennis is a genuinely good person and an excellent lawyer who is willing to really fight for you!

I had a time-sensitive issue that was handled respectfully & professionally. Meeting was well-organized and attorney was extremely knowledgeable. I will definitely refer back to him in the future. Thanks very much!

He was patient and explained things well to a layman like myself. He has a lot of knowledge and is absolutely approachable.

I would definitely recommend!

I am so grateful for Matthew Ennis and the outstanding support he provided me. From day one, he was approachable, patient, and deeply knowledgeable. He took the time to explain every step of the process, answered all my questions thoroughly, and always made sure I felt informed and reassured.

What impressed me most was how dedicated he was to my case. Matthew combined compassion with sharp legal expertise, and he went above and beyond to achieve a positive outcome. It was clear he genuinely cared, not only about the details of the case but also about my peace of mind throughout the process.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is professional, responsive, and truly invested in his clients’ best interests, I highly recommend Matthew. You’ll be in excellent hands.

I truly appreciate his support and would highly recommend him to anyone in need of an employment attorney.

Matthew has been amazing. reached out to help with an issue that I needed representation, he has been present for me all the way, helped me navigate this, explaining every step of the way, and has always been available to clarify any questions with patience.

Great service and would really recommend

Matthew Ennis helped advise me in troubling employment issue.  He was patient, understanding and provided really good advise on the law and options I had to move forward.

Since this was particularly difficult for me, his help was instrumental in achieving a positive outcome in my case.

I would not hesitate to use Matthew again and highly recommend him to anyone facing Employment issues.

Excellent legal guidance! I highly recommend Mathew for his clear communication, expertise, and results-driven approach. His willingness to begin with good-faith negotiations is also really valuable and not easy to find.

This was the first time I have ever had to hire an attorney. I found Matthew through a bar association referral (having no idea where to look otherwise). Turns out to be a good match. We did an initial consultation in late April. He was mindful of the facts of my case, able to recall them between many different calls over six months.

I appreciate that Matthew was conservative with my finances. He billed appropriately, and advised on whether or not one decision or another that I was making would be a wise use of the retainer I paid. Essentially telling me "yes you *could* do that, but it won't get any results and you'll be wasting your money."

Although the ultimate outcome of the situation was not exactly what I had hoped for, he was able to negotiate my contract and able to negotiate for severance pay.

Matthew Ennis at Hager & Ennis LLP was instrumental in revising my separation agreement and addressing employment law violations. His expertise and commitment were truly exceptional, and I am grateful for his assistance. If you are facing similar legal challenges, I highly recommend Matthew and the team at Hager & Ennis Law.

Excellent Experience!

I don’t leave reviews lightly, and I certainly don’t write them like this—but some people earn words, not just stars.

When I first reached out to Scott, I was overwhelmed with doubt, stress, and fear. I had been accused of multiple traffic infractions, and the weight of it hit far harder than I ever expected. I lost sleep. I lost my appetite. I questioned my judgment, my future, and my ability to provide for my family. The pressure bled into every corner of my life, and at my lowest point, even my family began to lose faith in me.

From the very beginning, Scott was different.

He didn’t just see a case—he saw a person. Calm, confident, and grounded, he became a steady presence when everything around me felt like it was unraveling. When anxiety took over, Scott brought clarity. When fear crept in, he brought reassurance. He explained the process, laid out realistic expectations, and never once overpromised—yet somehow still delivered beyond what I thought was possible.

And deliver he did.

Through his professionalism, expertise, and relentless advocacy, Scott achieved a successful outcome. Every dollar spent was earned. Every step he took was intentional. The result spoke for itself—but the impact went far beyond the courtroom.

Scott gave me something I didn’t realize I had lost: confidence. Confidence to wake up the next morning. Confidence to go to work. Confidence to stand tall again and continue providing for my family. In my darkest hour, he was a beacon of light—steady, reliable, and unwavering.

It’s rare to find someone who combines legal skill with genuine human decency. Scott did both. To me, he wasn’t just an attorney—he was a lifeline. A protector. A quiet hero when I needed one most.

If you’re facing a traffic case and feel overwhelmed, afraid, or uncertain about what comes next, know this: you are in the best possible hands with Scott. He earned my trust, my respect, and my gratitude—completely and without question.

Thank you, Scott. Truly.

Scott is very proactive attorney that will work hard to get your ticket erased. He was easy to work with, and the process was professional and painless. I would recommend this law office for anyone looking for a good attorney.

After going about 12 years ticket free, I was pulled over and written for speeding in November. 83 in a 55. Two days later, I get a letter in the mail from Scott (A general mailer) Advertising his services. I found The timing to be very peculiar. After a quick Google search, I realized that this is a sales tactic from lawyers. They access the (Apparently, public) Data on recent traffic offenders in their area, And reach out. My brain instantly thought ‘Ambulance chaser’. So I went ahead and called Scott’s Office. To my surprise, he answered his line Personally. After a brief conversation, He explained that there was really no downside to giving him a chance. His fee was only a couple dollars more than the ticket itself, And if he loses the case, he refunds his fee.  I had no real defense in mind. But more importantly, I liked the cut of his jib. Scott seemed like the type of person I would’ve befriended in school, And made sure to keep in touch with throughout the years. Someone who understands how life and the system works. Someone who is not afraid to tell it like it is.  I had planned on paying that ticket, taking the black eye on my driving record and moving on with my life.   I’m happy to say, three days Ago, Scott called me as he was leaving the courthouse. He got the ticket dismissed. I’ve already retained him to fight a ticket my family member received Recently. I have A lot of faith in Scott to help Anyone, even if you Feel they have you dead to rights. I most definitely have a leadfoot, and I’ve realized throughout the years that it’s a pay to play type of attitude. My only advice to anyone who cares to listen would be; Keep your mouth shut While remaining respectful on the side of the highway. And realize, the money will be leaving your wallet. Would you rather it go to the government ordained pirates Who are out to get you?  Or would you rather it go to someone who is willing to fight on your behalf?   Thanks to Scott, my record is still clean. My insurance rates will not get jacked up over this, Saving me an untold Amount of money in the future.  Since November, I’ve installed a radar detector, And save Scott‘s contact information in my phone. I only wish I would’ve known about Scott In my early driving years. He would’ve saved me a fortune! I encourage anyone who receives any citation to give Scott a chance. What do you got to lose?   Thanks again, Scott!
I would absolutely recommend Scott to help with a ticket. We called him for help and he took care of the rest getting our ticket dismissed. Best experience ever.

This review is specific to my Attorney, Scott Marlow.  I will get straight to it and cut the fluff here. Scott navigated and led my contentious divorce to absolute resolve and I am eternally grateful. Scott will tell you, as he told me, there are no winners in family law. While Scott is right…I sit back here writing this review and reflecting and I can’t help feeling victorious through the years it took to close my case out. Ill cut to the components and behaviors that Scott embodies that make him a superior attorney…a juggernaut more like it. Please note, the below are my observations of Scott during the period of ~2+ years as his client. For the reader, these are absolutely critical in selecting an attorney, or, ensuring you have the right attorney. You need an attorney that knows the law. No brainer, right? There are attorneys you ask questions to and they say they will get back to you. There are attorneys that answer on the spot with absolute precision. Without fail, Scott always had the answer and the law in his pocket. You want a responsive attorney. I never had any issues regarding timing and responses with Scott. I truly felt like I was his only client and I know that’s not fact. It didn’t matter if a court date was a day away or I had a question about something. Scott was all over it. You want a direct attorney. Someone who is not afraid to tell you what won’t work and what to expect. No sugar coating. This is how a great attorney manages their clients’ expectations through the entire process. You want an attorney that understands that his/her time is your money. Those billable hours can add up and Scott is quick to give you the sound legal advice and counsel you need in a short amount of time. Finally, you need an attorney who can own the podium. EVERY time Scott was on the podium, he spoke as if it was me talking and he spoke with no issues at all.  Don’t think that every attorney can speak in front of a judge and peers and not fumble or stutter or look unprepared and sloppy in execution. Most of them do. Not once did I see Scott appear as anything other than prepared and flawless in execution. I can’t stress this enough because these are the moments that absolutely count. These are the skirmishes and battles that you want to nail. Scott took my context and was able to use it as his own and convey exactly what he needed to in the moments that count. Call the execution whatever you want…executive presence, good public speaker… this is what it is. Two words: competence and confidence. Scott exudes these things. I stand victorious today because of Scotts legal acumen, his flawless execution on and off the podium, and his ability to see around the corner. I could go into anecdotes and specifics from being served as a respondent, to ex-parte hearings, to depositions, to motions, to rulings and everything in between. Those will not convey what the end results of my case were. The end results are the facts and the facts are this: I have the child custody I wanted from the parenting plan I wrote, I have my house, and I have happiness. I would have none of these if not for Scott. If there was a subscription fee to keep Scott on retainer indefinitely, I would do it and it would be the best decision I would have ever made for myself.

Barbara Henderson closed my case without even attempting to contact me. She did not give me any timeline or deadline but told me to take my time due to my health issues… I’ve given her receipts and extensive amounts of information, logs and even a 10 page spreadsheet. She never asked me what I wanted to do.

The only way I learned the case was closed is when I received an email from her paralegal to let them know if I’d like copies of my file and the Intent to Withdraw WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE that was ALREADY FILED WITH THE COURT. After I’ve paid thousands of dollars.
The Intent to withdraw includes an address that I haven’t had for 8 years or even while I’ve been her client. But her bills arrived just fine.  She even told me what my ex-husband would do if she reopened the case.

Michael Stewart is hands down the most amazing attorney I have ever worked with. I work in advocacy and spend a lot of time around the court house. When I had a loved one in need, he is the first person I called. When I say, he delivered, I mean HE DELIVERED. My loved one was looking at 30 years and an original $1,000,000 bail. reviews.text: Micheal Stewart saved my life I was facing a life sentence I had a pregnant fiancé I felt that their was so much stacked against me and with assigned counsel it would have been a worse situation I asked around and looked for the best lawyer and everyone said you need “Micheal Stewart” I secured him he worked with me on pricing and we got it figured out he told me the plan from the very beginning told me every move before he made it and let me comb through it with him while still incarcerated he promised he would get me home for my son and got my bail dropped $175,000 and a motion to watch my son come into the world and we finished off my case strong 8 months after my son was born with an amazing knapstad motion and I am now a free man if you need someone to put you’re trust into and he sticks to his word Micheal Stewart is the best of the best

reviews.text:
Unfortunately I cannot reccomend Mr. Bradshaw to anyone due to his lack of performance and lack of communication.

I paid my retainer to Mr. Bradshaw last year 2020, he went to one brief court hearing on my behalf, sent half a dozen emails to to opposing party and then stopped all communications with myself and opposing counsel. Around May of 2021 the opposing counsel contacts me saying they haven't heard from my attorney or I on the matter so they will be taking further actions at this point. Surprised by their accusations I attempted to contact my counsel thinking this had to be a mistake, this went on for about a week, and still no response. I wasn't going to wait any longer on the matter so I contacted the opposing counsel directly and began negotiation.

Come to find out my counsel sent half a dozen emails back and forth and then stopped communicating with the other counsel a few months after the court hearing last fall. (It is now July 2021)

I contacted Mr. Bradshaw yet again after I finished negotiations with the opposing counsel and achieved an end result to the matter. I did what I hired him to do so naturally I was a little put out but he did go to court for me and send emails and whatnot so I want to pay him for his time however I will never use his services again.

I told Mr. Bradshaw that I handled the negotiations, that they hadn't heard from him, I couldn't get ahold of him, so they proceed with further legal actions due to lack of response so I had to begin negotiations with opposing counsel because he was unavailable.

He claimed he didnt know about the further legal actions in the case, when I told him I wanted to end his services and get the remainder of my retainer back by the end of 2021 he paused for a moment and then informed me that he not only did he use the full $3500.00 retainer but also mentioned to me that he ran several hundred dollars over the retainer (in his one brief court appearance and the half a dozen emails sent to the opposing counsel) however he admitted to me that he was going to "be kind and just write off the additional expenses."

If you want to waste your money and pay someone to not handle anything and do everything yourself he is the guy to hire.
reviews.ownerResponse: I was not your lawyer. I don't believe we've ever met.

He helped me mend relations with myself. He showed me that I am not a bad person, I just made mistakes. Over all I would suggest Mr. Stewart to anyone seeking solid legal counsel. I actually do throw his name o I t ANY time I hear someone talking about retaining legal counsel.  In fact I won't personally be needing his help but I know someone who will and I will be personally bringing them down to his law office. Back to the point though this man is top notch legal counsel. Like I said above and beyond. He is worth every cent. Thank you Mike, you did more then you know when you helped me.  For that I thank you and I know my family does too.

I have never written a review but found myself pouring through them to find an attorney to help me navigate the probate process after my mom passed away.  I thought it was a little hypocritical to rely on the reviews and not leave one myself.

Nathan Sukhia (Gig Harbor Law) had excellent reviews, so I decided to give him a try.  I must say, I feel like I hit the lottery when I found him!  Even though my mother had a will, I found the process to close her estate daunting and overwhelming.  Nathan had it handled and closed in no time!

I had also been injured in an accident just prior to my mother’s death. It was rather complicated because it was an on-the-job injury, but also had a much larger personal injury component. I had been working with a personal injury attorney for a short time, but that attorney was completely unresponsive.  When I found out Nathan handled personal injury cases I immediately transferred my case to him.  Once again, Nathan delivered.  He and his team managed my case for nearly two years.  He did an excellent job of explaining the process and setting my expectations.  He was in constant contact during the entire process.  He and his team took care of all the paperwork, tracking and coordinating the multiple insurance explanation of benefits for all my medical appointments.  The insurance issues alone, would have been a nightmare to sort out.  Nathan was always available to take my call or respond an email.  He was more than an attorney; he was also my advocate.  Not only did he handle my case, but he also checked in with me frequently to make sure I was receiving the medial care I needed.

When it came time to start negotiations with opposing counsel, he was assertive, yet fair and reasonable.  He gave me options on how to proceed and offered his opinion on the various options, but always allowed me to make the final decision.  I trusted his advice and judgment, and in the end, he secured a much higher settlement than I had anticipated. While I was thrilled with the settlement, I was even more impressed with the hospitality of Nathan and his team.  Everyone is professional, yet personable and down to earth and they truly cared about how I was doing throughout the 2-year ordeal.

I am now working with Nathan on my estate planning and have every confidence that it will be handled in the same professional fashion as all my other affairs have been.

If you need an attorney, give Nathan a call.  You will not be disappointed!

Nathan and his staff have done an amazing job helping my Mom with her last will and powers of attorney and walked us through the process and helped me navigate the process of being the executor after my Mom passed.They really were kind and professional from start to finish. I would highly recommend Gig Harbor Law to anyone needing help from attorneys.Office manager Liz was fantastic to deal with as was Kendra as paralegal and of course Nathan whose compassion and experience were greatly appreciated by my Mom and myself. reviews.text: I had a car accident around December 2017, since I knew I needed an attorney for that case, I googled for one and Paul Ayan popped up with a five-star review. Not only did he handle my accident in a professional manner, but he makes a good advocate. He fought for my case after the insurance company wanted to keep delaying everything. He made it so I didn't have to stress the situation and handled everything for me. If I ever get in an accident again, I will be coming back to Paul. Thank you Paul!

After being involved in an automobile accident which left me questioning whether I was really injured or just ‘not tough enough’, I had the good fortune of being introduced to Paul Ayan. Paul was attentive, professional, and plain spoken.

I felt comfortable that Paul would protect my interests and help guide me through the legal portion of the claims process.  I am proud of that decision as my faith in both Paul, and his partner Camilla Hedberg, proved to be well placed.  I would not hesitate to refer my friends and  business associates to Ayan Law.

Working with Mr. Ayan was great. I was involved in a motor vehicle accident and he represented me. He stayed on top of communication even if there wasn't much movement which I really appreciated. Once things got moving, they went fast and Paul made sure I received compensation quickly, letting me know as soon as he received it from the insurance company, even going so far as to drop it off at my job since I couldn't make it to his office. If you're in an auto accident, go see Paul Ayan!

After my husband's accident, we contacted several attorneys. Mr. Ayan was the only one who offered realistic advise. We went with him because of his no nonsense approach to our situation. And we were soon rewarded for the decision. He was prompt and informative. Delay after delay happened and as soon as he was on the case things started improving rapidly. He got the funds released to replace my husbands vehicle almost immediately. The settlement process was a little slow, as it tends to be. But within a year, it was all said and done, and we couldn't be happier with the service provided. I highly recommend Mr. Ayan for anyone facing legal issues.

For the first time in my life at 36 I was in a car accident. I was 8 months pregnant and scared out of my mind when I watched the car plow right into me. The next day after getting voice mails from all insurance companies involved I called a small firm in my city. The second I talked to Camilla all the stress just evaporated. I ended that phone call and haven't shed a tear since. The day after that I had a rental car, and when the rental company said I only get it for a week, I called Paul and we switched the car and I had it another 2 weeks. My accident was the 5th of the month, well before the end of the month my totaled car had been paid off and I got a bit extra. My case took 3 years to finish, but it was worth it. I received much more than I'd even anticipated. To be honest, I received more than Paul did, and he did all the work. I would recommend Ayan law in a split second to anyone that truly needed a good law firm.

Poor communication on Jeff’s end, lost information I gave him, didn’t really seem to know what he was talking about as far as judgments when I asked questions and he told me conflicting things. reviews.text:
Five-Stars for Miranda Baner.

I am a Retired Army combat veteran and I support and endorse legal representation from Miranda Baner. She displayed patience and a true sense of seeking a prompt resolution from day one. She gave me the B.L.U.F. (Bottom-Line Up Front), which I thoroughly appreciated without being pretentious or condescending. Additionally, she never gave me the impression that she was billing me unnecessarily or overcharging for her professional services.

A big THANK YOU to Miranda and Noel for your support, patience and professionalism!

Five-Star Review for Attorney Jonathan Baner

I cannot recommend Jonathan Baner highly enough! As a landlord, I faced an incredibly frustrating situation where my tenant not only refused to pay rent but also caused significant damage to my property. Jonathan took on my case with a small retainer and fought tirelessly for me over the years to ensure I received what the court had awarded.

Even after winning in court, the battle wasn’t over, and my tenants still didn’t pay. However, Jonathan’s persistence, expertise, and dedication to justice made all the difference. Thanks to him, I can finally move on from this ordeal.

If you are a landlord dealing with a difficult tenant, Jonathan Baner is the attorney you want on your side. While the legal process can take time, he never gave up and always kept my best interests at the forefront. If I ever face another landlord-tenant issue, I will go straight to him. Highly recommended!

Miranda has been incredible to work with! From the very beginning, she took me under her wing and provided invaluable guidance at every step. Her billing was transparent and fair, with no hidden fees—everything was clearly itemized so I always knew exactly what I was paying for. As a former stay-at-home parent who hadn’t seen my kids in over three years, Miranda’s dedication and expertise have reconnected me with my children, and for that, I am eternally grateful. Her support has truly been priceless!

If I could give them a million stars, I would! Jonathan is everything you need in a lawyer. He is very kind, knowledgeable, professional, on top of his work, attentive to all my questions and so much more. His assistant Elizabeth was also great to work with. Communication was excellent , they are very informative and just absolutely wonderful people to work with. I am extremely thrilled with the service I received from him. Thank you so much Jonathan, you will definitely & always be my go to.
Professional, timely, and efficient. Miranda Baner represented my best interests, gave great advice, and was incredibly knowledgeable.

Miranda, Jonathan, and Noel are all amazing legal representatives and work as a team not only together, but with you as a client. We were at their mercy from across the country fighting for our rights and what is best for our family. Miranda took on our case within a 2 day notice, fought for us and with us until present day! Our only regret is that we can’t use her in TN, after her successful win for us. We had two other lawyers thru the yrs before this and felt unheard, often neglected, and over charged. Court is expensive no matter what… but with Baner and Baner we never regretted the fees due to the fight they fought, attention they paid, the outstanding service that went beyond the court room to even sharing tears thru the process. They are known as angels in our household who watched over us and still do to this day. We could be honest, even very blunt…and every word was heard. We were able to fight the best fight we could but maintain as much dignity throughout the process as one could have in a very difficult situation. We never had to depend on anything but the truth and the skill of the team at Baner and Baner. Miranda and Johnathan both appeared in court for us because if you hire one of them, you get both! Because they have each others backs if one cannot be present last minute, the other is there. Their paralegal Noel is another true asset to their team and was always available to help in any way and just as much a part of the team as the two of them! We will recommend them to any and everyone, and be grateful to them for eternity. Our case is not in open court at the moment; however we will always remain connected to them, and know that they will forever be a part of our story. Miranda told us that the reason they do this job is to fight for the ones that deserve it, and the little ones that it helps! And we can’t wait until our little one is grown and knows a little more of the story to understand… and we can all meet again and show Miranda what she fought for and how amazing it all turned out due to the care, attention, hours of work and dedication she put into our case! You cannot go wrong by trusting them with your life! Because it is your lives they fight for! And they truly are the best!

I was very pleased with Baner and Baner law firm.  They were extremely pleasant to work with and without the help of this firm the business would have got away with taking money for no service rendered.  Thank you so much for your assistance and support Baner and Baner.  Robert

Over the last nearly 3 years, she has methodically helped me through various petitions with the family court.  She has remained calm and professional despite difficult opposing counsel and challenging times in court.  I would recommend her without hesitation to anyone facing family court - whether for divorce or child custody.
The words thank you will never be enough for the peace you have brought my family, Miranda!

reviews.text: Mr. Baner was amazing. He took the evidence that was presented against me and went through it carefully. He fought hard and got my case dismissed. I highly recommend him.
