During an emotionally stressful time, the Baner team provided timely responses, thoughtful strategies, and a welcome level of professionalism and empathy. Miranda and Noel were efficient, consistently patient, and genuinely helpful. Considering the reality of legal fees, you can rest assured that your best interest is their primary focus and concern. Highly recommended legal team.

I cannot express enough gratitude for Miranda's outstanding representation in my highly complicated child custody case. From the moment I enlisted her services, it was evident that she was not just a competent attorney, but a compassionate and dedicated advocate for her clients.
Miranda's courtroom prowess was truly remarkable. She exuded confidence and poise while presenting my case, and her expertise in family law was evident throughout the proceedings. Her arguments were compelling, and she navigated the complexities of the legal system with finesse, ultimately securing a victorious outcome that exceeded my expectations.
Beyond her exceptional legal skills, it was Miranda's compassionate nature that truly set her apart. She took the time to listen to my concerns and understand my very complex situation, showing genuine empathy for my situation and the well-being of my child. Throughout the emotional rollercoaster of the case, she provided unwavering support and made sure I felt valued as a client.
Organization is clearly one of Miranda's strong suits. She left no stone unturned, meticulously gathering evidence and information to strengthen my case. Her attention to detail was outstanding, and she was always well-prepared for any twists and turns that arose during the legal proceedings.
What touched me the most was the depth of care and dedication Miranda displayed towards my case. It was evident that she genuinely cared about the outcome and the impact it would have on my family's future. Her passion for helping families navigate the complexities of family law shone through in every aspect of her work.
Thanks to Miranda's exceptional skills, compassion, and commitment, my child and our family can now look forward to a brighter and more stable future. I am forever grateful for her invaluable guidance and expertise during this challenging time.
In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Miranda to anyone seeking a family law attorney. Her remarkable courtroom abilities, compassionate demeanor, and meticulous organization make her an exceptional legal professional. If you find yourself in need of a dedicated and proficient family law advocate, Miranda is the one you can trust to fight for you and your family's best interests. In my opinion, any review that is less than 5-stars is probably inaccurate, or posted by a fake account owned by someone Miranda lost to in court. Miranda is an exceptional attorney by any measure, and you’ll be in good hands if you are lucky enough to get her.

Miranda, Jonathan and Noel are all very professional. They have been nothing but understanding, communicative, and reliable. I am very thankful for the hard work they put into my case. I highly, highly recommend them!
Simple, easy and professional
Miranda helped us on our tough case, and with her hard work, we prevailed.  Bar none, best Attorney in town!!!!

reviews.text: Very reliable and knowledgeable. Mrs. Baner helped me move the case quickly and effectively. I think she is the best for family law in WA.

I hired Mrs. Baner to assist me in a post divorce mediation situation. While I had initially opened to work through mediation without representation the other party obtained counsel and while I never felt inability to represent myself the handling by legal on the other side made it clear I was not seen as an equal or something to be given respect and open communication. After being manipulated and shoved around and give false/bogus legal threats to try to intimidate me it became clear that I would not be respected or taken seriously without having my own legal counsel. I spoke with approximately half a dozen attorney's and was turned off by many. In the same way the counter parties counsel had approached me and handled the situation so many attorney's pitched themselves as being aggressive and being able to "get a win", that they almost seemed eager for a fight. I always tried to open up with my situation not being about winning but being taken as an equal party in mediation (which ironically shouldn't even require an attorney) and making sure a lack of representation was not (if only perceptual) a disadvantage. Mrs. Baner understood my position on the matter, what I was actually looking for, and actually understood what I was not looking to do which was equally as important to me. She was not afraid to correct me thoughts and views when they were truly not going to be legally sound (and thus be of no value in mediation) but also fully supportive on the items that would be of merit. I hired her to both diffuse any legal bulldozing by opposing counsel but also to make sure I did not equally make a fool of myself or waste time arguing things that were perhaps subjectively and emotionally valuable but legally of no value in our case.

After hiring Miranda I had several attorneys circle back with me and every single one of them said the same thing "I'm sorry I wasn't able to work with you on this but you made a good choice", and that was unsolicited feedback. It became very clear how well known Miranda is and in my experience how respected she is in the legal community. Miranda was well acquainted with our mediator and while there was no impropriety she was informed from prior mediations how best to communicate our position and to put us in the best position to argue our case. Every case is going to be unique but if you are looking for someone to represent *YOU* well, someone that is in my opinion known for the right reasons, this firm needs to be on your short list. She won't sugar coat things, she will tell you when your wrong, and when the time comes to present your case you will have a known quantity. The impression I had from beginning to end is that Miranda is just as selective in the cases she takes and the clients she chooses to work with. Some people look for certain traits in their legal representation and its important to make sure you have a match on both sides. For my family and our case, Miranda was exactly what I was looking for.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, John! It was truly a pleasure working with you!

reviews.text: I feel so lucky to have found Miranda. She was an absolute pleasure to work with and never minded answering my multitude of questions. Miranda is kind and compassionate and worked with great dedication on my divorce case. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend her.

Miranda and her team are AMAZING! She’s honest and direct, and no stone is left unturned when it comes to her team and their attention to detail. My divorce and custody battle has been extremely stressful and downright ugly at times, but having her on my side every step of the way has been invaluable, as is the outcome she helped me to achieve at my recent hearing. She fought for me and my son through every twist and turn and I sleep better at night with Miranda and her legal team on my side! Forever grateful.

Getting advice from Miranda was incredibly helpful. She was very knowledgeable and professional. What felt most helpful was the compassion she showed. I felt like I could trust her because she acted with my families best interest at heart and that felt the most reassuring.

To say that I found Miranda at a very low point would be an understatement. She helped me when I had left my now ex-husband with nothing but our 3 yr old and our stuff. I was a full time college student and could barely afford attorney's fees. She met with me and gave me advice to be able to attend 3 hearings on my own and when I needed full legal representation she was there, no questions asked. She saw how important certain aspects of my parenting plan are and helped me fight for those. No, I didn't get everything I wanted, but realistically you don't in a divorce and no attorney can give you that. What she did give me was peace of mind knowing that my daughters (and mine) best interests are legally binding and my exes actions can be held accountable in the future. A peace of mind if you will. I'm forever grateful for her and her stuff, especially handling a contested divorce during COVID. It was nothing short of a wonderful experience. She was honest and upfront about parts that I knew I couldn't "win" and helped me get the ones that I could. As much as it pains me to know I'll need her services in the future, I'm grateful I've found someone I can trust to not only be there as my lawyer, but as another mom looking out for other moms. Divorce isn't easy, especially a narcissist, but she made it smoother and handled it with grace.

reviews.text:
The military "justice" system has become a weapon to push political agendas, DEI, and other social experiments. While most servicemen are patriots, a minority of troublemakers will exploit grievance systems when they are being held accountable. It does not matter if you are right or wrong - you will be flagged, investigated, and have your career put on hold for baseless allegations. You can love the military, but it's not going to love you back, it will leave you behind in an effort to protect itself.

Working with Jocelyn I could tell that she takes pride in her work and defending her clients - she is a genuine person and cares about people. She is a bright, intelligent, and passionate litigator, and I highly recommend her.

Stay away. Spend your money elsewhere unless you have $40,000+ to burn away.

If you are reading this, you are most likely going through one of the most turbulent times in your career and life, as I was months ago. From the first interaction with Jocelyn, there were numerous red flags that I chose not to acknowledge. Documents weren’t sent on time; communication was scarce, and I would be sent other clients' documentation. But, I believed in the Google reviews, the testimonials on the website, and simply wanted to believe I had the best representation.

Yet, during this time, Jocelyn never did what she had promised. There were no witness interviews. There were no follow-up questions with any pertinent party. Nothing. But I trusted her. And I signed contract after contract with her. (She pieces out every portion of your interaction with her under a new contract; there is no flat fee—another red flag.)

After paying tens of thousands of dollars, my situation only worsened (for a simple case). Ultimately, she stopped responding once the previous contract was up, and I didn’t have an extra five thousand to dump on top of the tens of thousands I had already given her. She quite literally ceased all communication with me at the darkest point of my life and my career.

By the grace of god, I was able to find another UCMJ lawyer who is even better and a decent human being and communicates—and charged me a fraction of what I paid Jocelyn FOR EVERYTHING. And there was no individual contract for every scenario. I am beyond glad to say I am in a better place now but to no thanks to this firm. Stay away.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are so deeply saddened to learn that you felt abandoned. Unfortunately, given the cannons of confidentiality and the sacrosanct attorney-client privilege, we are prevented from providing a detailed response to the specific concerns you've raised. What we can offer is that in every circumstance where we provide a fee agreement to a potential client, we explicitly describe what specific legal service we are providing and the price for which we are providing it. Included in those fee agreements is a recitation of the additional derogatory actions the command could elect to take and if the client wishes to pursue representation for any of those follow-on actions it would require a separate written agreement. It can feel very overwhelming when the command keeps bringing actions and levying additional derogatory actions against a service member. Not every person can afford to continue in representation, and that brings us no joy. We always want to keep fighting on behalf of every client whose case we begin, but that is not always possible. We also pride ourselves in being very transparent that each event could bring about another one. When a client lets us know that they are not in a position to continue with the follow-up derogatory actions, we also must be mindful about continued communication given our responsibilities to current clients, but we never want to make anyone feel that we have abandoned them.
In reviewing your file, we cannot find a request for forwarding any of the materials in your case file to your new counsel, including notes from witness interviews, attempts to interview witnesses, drafted affidavits of the interviews accomplished, and the signed affidavits submitted on your behalf during the representation. If your new counsel or you would like any of those work products, please get in touch with the Firm and we will ensure that they are forwarded without delay. Wishing you the very best in resolving your matters.

reviews.text: My career and retirement were on the line because of an unfounded accusation, and a process that does not necessarily require the accuser to have the burden of proof. Her approach to my case showed that she takes more than just the law into consideration; she also navigates the personalities of the people involved, and the nuances of the system that might be working against you. I believe she has excelled beyond mere technical knowledge and skill, to become a true master and even philosopher of the legal environment, giving her wisdom that places her above all others in defending you. I am deeply grateful to her for being my champion.
I called their office and while they didn’t answer initially, they did respond to my call through text and were actually very helpful.

reviews.text:
If you are in a situation where your military career is in jeopardy, I highly recommend avoiding free military lawyers. Having personally experienced their limitations and challenges, I decided to explore other options. That's when I came across Jocelyn Stewart, a professional who exceeded all expectations.

Jocelyn displayed an understanding of UCMJ law and its complexities, along with an unwavering commitment to defending my rights. From our first consultation to the resolution of my case, she navigated the intricacies of the system with expertise and dedication.

What sets Jocelyn apart is her unique ability to address military legal matters comprehensively and with a fresh perspective. Her insightful advice, coupled with a proactive and strategic approach, played a pivotal role in safeguarding my military career.

Throughout the process, Jocelyn demonstrated professionalism, clear communication, and an unmatched commitment to my case. Her attention to detail, along with care for her clients' well-being, instilled confidence in me during this period.

If you're facing challenges within the military and are considering hiring a civilian lawyer, look no further than Jocelyn Stewart. Not only is she an expert in UCMJ law, but she also goes the extra mile to serve as your advocate, safeguarding your rights and striving for the most favorable outcome.

I’m deeply appreciative of Jocelyn's representation, and I wholeheartedly endorse her to anyone grappling with the complexities of UCMJ law.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ethan, thank you for entrusting your career to my firm. I remain overjoyed that we were able to highlight the corruption going on in your unit's leadership. Best to you and yours for continued success!

reviews.text: Jocelyn represented me through an EO investigation and Board of Inquiry that I thought I didn’t have a chance at winning. The complainant lined up 5 witnesses against me and I had no one. Through careful research and amazing evidence finding she proved that the group conspired to corroborate their stories and got them to admit it under oath. She was incredible throughout the investigation and process. The only regret I have is not hiring her sooner. 10/10 recommend
Attorney Jocelyn Stewart and her Team are Awesome,  and I highly recommend!   Having her representation is truly an honor.

I could not have asked for better or more professional representation. Mr. Cody Harnish would set time aside for me no matter the time. Separated by 16 hours did not stop him from communicating effectively. Very knowledgeable in military law, he worked very diligently on my case and managed to get me far better results than I assumed would be the best case scenario! Would recommend to any service member interested in being represented by an attorney who cares about getting results. I am so thankful to have ran across this amazing law office. Thank you again Mr. Harnish.
Highly recommend! Was a honor to be represented by Sean Mangan. The way he handled my case couldn’t have been better!

Do not retain anyone from this practice. The experience with Sean Mangan could not have been more miserable.

From the beginning, Sean did not return most emails without multiple multiple follow ups. At times, I literally begged for a response and/or his counsel. In the entire two years he was my attorney, almost every appointment, he was either late, very late or they were entirely rescheduled.

I would have parted ways within the first few months, but very unfortunately I had already paid 8k up front! Paying up front (which was required) was a horrible mistake. Otherwise, I would have cut my pricey losses and hired another attorney.

Retaining Sean Mangan made a miserable situation far, far worse. I regret ever trusting him every single day. Save your sanity and money and hire someone (ANYONE!) else.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are profoundly saddened by the experience you have shared here. The Firm has reached out to you multiple times in several different ways to attempt to address your concerns with you. Mr. Mangan is no longer an attorney with the Firm. Perhaps your frustration with him would be better directed at him and his site. Wishing you the very best. We remain available to discuss your specific concerns.

reviews.text:
Highly Recommended and one of the best. Her services were well worth it and if on the fence I would contact her office for a consultation and retain her sooner than later.

I was hesitant to retain a lawyer because I knew my innocence but still found myself in a very vulnerable situation and unfamiliar with the military legal system. I also had a command that would not listen to my side and only saw me guilty. Jocelyn Stewart came highly recommended from a colleague so I gave it a shot and I was not disappointed.  I chose to have her represent me for an Administrative separation board where my whole career and retirement was on the line and she did not disappoint. She was helpful and timely throughout the whole process. She came prepared, well organized, and her experience showed. She saved my reputation, a lifetime of benefits, and secured my future. Even though I knew I was not guilty of the allegations that brought me into this situation I don’t think the outcome would have been as favorable for me if it wasn’t for her. I would have never been able to represent myself as well as she did.

For those service members that find themselves in these administrative and legal proceedings I highly recommend getting legal representation and not trying to fight it yourself. Trial defense services (TDS) was not helpful at all and after talking with Jocelyn TDS often provided very poor advice.  It is disappointing that it is so hard for a service member to prove their innocence and receive justice through the military investigation and justice system as JAG personnel and commanders don’t require determining evidence as a civilian court does and often times disregard service members statements or manipulate them to fit their version of the truth or just try to get rid of the service member instead of finding the actual truth, substantiating evidence, and determining justice. But that is the system and it isn’t designed to help or protect the service member. That is why good legal representation is essential and when it comes to representation Jocelyn Stewart is a really good choice. She is very busy and flies around the country representing service members and yet she always found time to talk to me and assist me.

Retain sooner than later as statements or actions you make during the process can work or be used against you. Jocelyn Stewart is one of the best and is worth the retainer fee.

Very knowledgeable attorney who communicates well, has vast amount of experience, and understands in depth the processes and challenges of her clients.

I couldn’t have asked for better legal counsel. Any potentials looking for a good attorney need not look any further than Ms. Stewart!
Great lawyer. Knows her stuff.

Jocelyn was very professional when helping with a military case, she didn't sugar coat anything nor did she overpromise.  I felt that she was honest and sincere and I wouldn't hesitate to recommend her services.

Jocelyn... first of all, thank you for your service! The combination of your experience and specialized knowledge makes you one in a million. I wouldn't think twice to call you if I ever needed the best military trial lawyer in my corner. Keep up the good fight!
I have referred many of my criminal defense clients with UCMJ issues to Jocelyn.  Her expertise in military law has saved many of my client's career.

Jocelyn is someone who shares many good tips on her social media that can keep you out of trouble before you ever need a lawyer. If you still need a lawyer, she is the one you want in your corner. Her record speaks for itself.
Great attorney and great office!! If you’re in need of help, you can’t go wrong by reaching out to Jocelyn.

You need a lawyer that will care about you while defending you. It is your life and career on the line so don’t just go to anyone but trust a person that actually has been in the military and knows how the system works!
Just got off the phone with Brian schenk. Absolute honesty and integrity. I couldn't recommend a more professional or honest/ straightforward group of law professionals.

I am very grateful to Jocelyn to help me to prove that I did not do any wrong doing and corroborate my innocence. I felt what I have gone through was like a horror movie, I had no one on myside, but Jocelyn and her team. Almost immediately, as I came in to her office with my rather vague and unsubstantiated case, she understood what was going on and handled it methodically, objectively, and efficiently. She is a master in her craft. Jocelyn tends to explained to her clients every single step moving forward and what to expect. To me, one of her great commodity that differentiate her from her peers is her conciseness and directness. In conclusion, I do not wish the circumstances that I had to go through for my worst enemy, it drained me physically and mentally, but having her on my side was the only thing that gave me confidence and reassurance to fight for my innocence, and I thank her for it.

Securing Jocelyn's services are your best chance when facing a 15-6 investigation or reprimand.

During Command I came under investigation after being accused of a relationship with a subordinate. I initially tried to rebut the investigation myself with legal assistance. Despite the Investigating Officer changing his recommendations the CG issued me a GOMOR.

I retained Jocelyn at this point and was able to sway the Deputy CG to file the GOMOR locally. I will be able to exit my Command without relief or a referred OER. I will not be facing a board and my security clearance is safe. I regret not retaining Jocelyn from the start. Her team worked hard for me and I could be facing far worse without her.

Investigations are stacked against you and you will feel guilty until proven innocent. Everyone will air their grievances and take advantage. This is on top of all the other worries and feeling like an outcast. Having Jocelyn's skills and experience on your side is exactly what you need in such times.

Mr. Harnish is an excellent attorney that is experienced in military law and its system. His vast knowledge and experience of the military judicial system were instrumental in my case. He advocates for his clients and kept me informed every step of the way. I had the best possible outcome in my case and I know it was in large part to his expertise. Thank you Mr. Harnish!

Mr. Cody Harnish was a fantastic lawyer. His goal was to give supportive and quality legal representation. He accomplished that goal and more! He exceeded my expectations and gave me peace-of-mind! I highly recommend him for anyone seeking legal representation.

I worked with Sean Mangan to extricate myself from a difficult situation in the military, and he performed wonders.  10/10 recommend you work with this firm, and with Sean in particular.  He got me everything I wanted and needed, and I am confident he will do the same for you!

Thank you for everything. The most important thing is the peace of mind. It was the best decision I ever made to select your law firm to fight for me.  Thank you and please continue to help many others that in needed of your services. Thank you.

I had the opportunity to speak with Jocelyn Stewart for a brief consultation and felt that she took great care and time to answer the few questions that I had. Without hesitation, she would be my first call if I were to ever need legal services. Her answers to me were thorough, confident, and well-informed. Despite the brief nature of the call, I still felt that she took the time to understand my questions and provide thorough feedback.

If you are looking for an expert lawyer who knows military law and court proceedings inside and out, who will provide candid and accurate advice when you need it most, and will fight as hard or harder for your case then you would yourself then look no further than Sean Mangan. As parents with a son facing a court martial after being wrongfully accused we wanted the absolute best lawyer possible and we will be forever grateful we chose Sean. He kept us informed every step of the way, answered all of our questions with patience and helped us understand a very technical process. Sean was amazing in the courtroom displaying his outstanding knowledge of the law and the rights of the accused. We would absolutely recommend Sean to any other parents facing a similar situation and the peace of mind you will receive from knowing you have someone with Sean's experience, integrity and expertise fighting for your cause is well worth the cost.

Briefly spoke with Mr. Mangan regarding a complex situation and he took the time to explain things in detail via email. Provided great advise and broke things down as much as he could for free. Most places do not give service members a consultation without a charge, but he did. Would hire him if needed and would definitely recommend anyone who has any possible legal issues to reach out to him or the Law Offices of Jocelyn C. Stewart. FIVE STARS from me.

Worked with Mike Millios on a Financial Liability Investigation. He was extremely professional and responsive. He helped me draft an effective rebuttal and navigate the process from start to finish. Highly recommend Mike and his group.

I was blindsided by baseless accusations during a post deployment investigation that was being ram rodded through and despite numerous attempts could not get JAG assistance. This was a scary place to be and with the full weight of a military investigation being directed at me I knew that I had to get help quickly if I wanted to salvage my military career. The best decision I made was to call Jocelyn C. Stewart. She answered the phone immediately and after far too much of my nervous rambling laid out my rights, the legal process, and what I could expect to happen going forward which put me at ease. If your career is important to you and you want the best defense possible then there is only one call to make…. Jocelyn C. Stewart

Government vs Jocelyn Stewart

When you are going against the government, you will need someone on your side that will fight on your behalf every step of the way.  I have 19 years in the military, and I found myself in trouble which is all my fault.  The government wanted to take all my retirement and VA benefits away by giving me an Other Than Honorable Discharge.  I did not know who to ask for help other than my military-appointed attorney.  As you know already may know, military lawyers only have so much experience as a military law officer and they are very busy.  Therefore, I was not going to take the chance to possibly lose all the hard work I have done to make it this far in my career.  If you need someone with years and years of experience that has seen it all and is still practicing military law, HIRE MS. JOCELYN STEWARD NOW!  She knows the regulations and guidelines that can help you get the best results possible.  Right now, everybody has turned their back on you because you messed up, she will be there to give you the assistance you need.  She also has very high integrity and when or if she takes your case, you will know she will do everything in her power to win.  Lastly, she will take most of the burden away from you the moment you decide to hire her.  She will relentlessly contact every possible person that may write you a character statement and do the hard work of editing to make your packet as strong as possible.  Her due diligence helped me get my benefits back.  Now, I can finally move forward with my life after this tough lesson I just went through.

Ms. Jocelyn is a very professional and responsible lawyer. She worked with me on my case to ensure I was being taken care of. She broke down the process to me piece by piece. She didn't sugar colt nor lied to me about the consequences if it didn't go the route I was expecting. But presented options on  my plate if that was the case. I absolutely with no doubt I recommend her to anyone across the board. Incredible professionalism and quick response

I was up against multiple specification of a bogus charge that had the potential to follow me the rest of my life. I called UCMJDefender and Joselyn immediately brought Sean Mangan in on the consultation call to begin working through my case. Throughout the process Sean was checking in to ensure that I was doing alright and to update me on my case. His firm brought in excellent consultants and experts to testify on my behalf. Throughout the trial he and my team overwealmingly showed that the government's' case was weak and I was found Not Guilty; additionally he inserted case law that would trigger an appellate review and trial, he plays chess where the government prosecutors are playing checkers.
Kevin Hastings is a phenomenal personal injury lawyer in Tacoma. He advocates for his clients and really cares about our community.
Just plain excellent folks.  All concerns about working with lawyers and the legal system dissolved once we experienced their tireless commitment.
Patrick and PCVA were supportive and showed great empathy for my loss. They made it possible to achieve a favorable resolution to my sister’s case and I am thankful for everything they did for me.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a pleasure working with you, and we’re grateful for your kind words. We wish you all the best moving forward!

reviews.text:
Darrell Cochran, Kevin Hastings their associates and staff are simply amazing.  They have treated me with the utmost respect and looked after my best interest from the start.  I feel like obviously when you are dealing with lawyers and lawsuits you enter the situation guarded and nervous. When you have been a victim of sexual abuse, you are not just guarded, you trust no one. Since our first meeting Darrell and Kevin were kind and caring.  They earned my trust by regularly reinforcing that they would fight for me and protect me.
My case was lucky enough to start right at the beginning of COVID, and all the courts came to a complete halt. Which added a few years to my case but even then Darrell and Kevin continued to push things forward as much as they could. During my case the opposing party attempted to discredit me like many do but Darrell and Kevin stood their ground, helped me stay strong and fought for me. Their unwavering support was incredible.
They helped me grow from a victim to the strong woman I have become.  They helped me get my power back!! They taught me not only how to advocate for myself but also how to advocate for others. I highly recommend Darrel and Kevin and their entire staff at PFAU Cochran Vertetis Amala.  They have become like family to me and I will forever be grateful for their dedication and hard work helping me seek the justice I deserved.

I am indebted to Kevin Hastings and the firm of PCVA for impeccable service handling my matter. From the moment I engaged the firm, I felt completely supported and as if a huge weight had been lifted from my shoulders. I was told to focus on healing and moving forward with my life while they took care of the details, and that is exactly what happened from beginning to end.

Kevin Hastings is everything you hope for in an attorney - smart, efficient, straightforward, very easy to talk to, and empathetic. I was completely able to set aside my legal concerns and focus on my recovery, as promised. The support staff was responsive and very helpful throughout. I am truly very grateful for their help and give Kevin and PCVA the highest possible rating!

This was a complete waiste of my time.i signed a retainer agreent 3 mo. Ago to find out after 2 weeks of. Nonstop calling and leaving
My number for someone to call back and them to text me and say that they can't take my case because of statute of limitations but for child abuse cases there is no statute so they couldn't even tell me the real reason I have an open and close case..it's okay cuz they take 40% of the verdict when everyone else.takes 30 or 33 % I would tell anyone asking to go somewhere else if they asked me..Thanks

I am beyond grateful for the incredible support and expertise provided by PCVA Law during my case. From our very first meeting, it was clear that I had found not just skilled attorneys, but true allies in my corner who care deeply and passionately about the situation I was in and let me share that it was a total nightmare.

Their dedication to my case was nothing short of extraordinary. They took the time to really understand my situation and made sure I was informed and comfortable every step of the way. Whenever I had questions or concerns, they responded quickly and with such compassion, which made a world of difference during this stressful time.

What stood out the most was their unwavering commitment to achieving a positive outcome for me. They worked tirelessly, showing a deep understanding of both the complexities and the legal strategies needed to win. Their attention to detail and relentless effort were instrumental in securing a result that far exceeded my expectations.

I can’t thank PCVA Law enough for their hard work and genuine care. They not only provided exceptional legal representation but also supported me with empathy and understanding throughout the entire process which gave me a huge sense of relief.

If you’re looking for attorneys who are not just experts in their field but also truly care about their clients, I wholeheartedly recommend PCVA Law. They turned a difficult (and unimaginable!) situation into a victory, and I will be forever grateful for their help.  I finally have my life back!!
Helped a lot
Tom, Liz and Bill were awesome after my car accident! So glad to have their help!

This team is fair and just! Don't be afraid to trust them... I experienced empathy and I got personal justice.. I am forever grateful to Patrick Brown especially for making something that was overwhelming, difficult, and confusing manageable...  Working tirelessly for my best possible outcome! They were professional and empathetic throughout everything! Fantastic advocating!
Whoever I talked to on the phone told me within 5 minutes without looking at any records the doctors were not negligent!  I never even got my case evaluation.

I contacted this law firm three times. I provided details as to why I was seeking their assistance. I was told the first time I called the information would be screened and they would get back to me either way a few days later. I called again after five days of not hearing from them and was told the same thing. After another five days of no response I called yet again asking why I haven’t been contacted? The screener gave me the same run around line that they would evaluate the details and get back to me. I made sure of my call back number each time yet nobody ever contacted me.

The team at PCVA Law are fierce advocates for those who have been wronged and taken advantage of.  They are sensitive, respectful, and professional when dealing with such sensitive topics of litigation.  For the first time in my life I felt that I had the law on my side and was given the justice that I long deserved. They were able to help me reach a generous settlement that will afford me peace, healing, and closure from a very painful past. Looking at their history of successful litigation is enough to ensure that you are working with the absolute best. I give them my highest recommendation.

They were great. I was a person who had to be found in a class action lawsuit. I was homeless for 14 years. When after finding residency for 3 years and settling down, they were able to find me. Made me aware of the case, which turned into a payout I was satisfied with. The really fought for me and got me the justice I deserved. MICHAEL Mckinney.

Terrible. Seemed like talking to me was an inconvenience.  She was short and rude and honestly didn’t even listen.  I don’t think she is capable of understanding law if she can’t even comprehend legal residence.
By the way, after leaving this review, they called me back to harass me about it.  They called several times.  Avoid these hacks.

If it wasn’t for Julie I would have never ended up with shared custody of my children. She set the foundation for me not only being with my children half of the time but also I received 50% of all the assets acquired during my marriage. Julie is awesome! She gets stuff done!

I called awhile back ago and spoke directly with the attorney she was awesome laid everything out simply. Today I called and had no pleasure speaking with her Paralegal who was rude, and short. I cannot believe someone who was so nice can hire such an entitled piece of work as her first impression of her office. Highly disappointed, asked if he could just have her call me back. He stated: "To get to her you have to go through me!" Hopefully the attorney gets to see this review and is able to re-evaluate her hiring pratices.

By far the best place to go.
She helped me get custody of my son.
She has always been really good about working with my weird schedule. 10/10 would recommend!

Julie and James are the best.
They handled my divorce and later my custody battle for my daughter.
Also later, Julie got my daughter out of hmmm her 80 mile an hr speeding ticket.
I highly recommend Julie and her brother James for any legal issue. If it’s not their specialty they can point you in the right direction.
Ryan Sibley
Been going here for years and Julie is the best at what she does!
Has always gone above and beyond for me. No lawyer will work harder for you !!

I had 2 different attorneys Before JUlie, She was up front, direct and Worked very well, She AND her team Are amazing. As A single dad it was hard for me to get 50/50 and she did it, she also save me alot more time and money by getting it settled. I would recommend her to ANyone who is Looking for an attorney and is wanting someone who is actually going to listen to you and work with you.
A lawyer who can conveniently consult and handle any case for any Korean.

I was one of Julie's earlier clients. At the time I was a young single father and needed help in getting a custody order to see my daughter. From day one Julie listened to my needs, made an effort to understand what was important to me and where I was coming from, and gave me a sense of confidence that I would be able to have a relationship with my child.
I have yet to find anyone who has fought as hard for my interests as Julie did. I no longer live in WA and to this day Julie will pick up the phone or call me back promptly. She is very efficient with her work and will not waste your time or money. I know it sounds cliché but Julie really cared about my well being and the well being of my family. Looking back, I am writing this review years later because I still feel a sense of gratitude for how Julie helped me. My daughter is 10 now and I am married with a child on the way and if it weren't for Julie's efforts I can't say that I would be having the family experience I am having today.

James is great too! He is prompt and assertive and easy to talk to which I found really helpful during stressful times. You won't go wrong having 6th Ave Law Office represent your interests.
Great people,  good friends and knowledgeable.

From day one, Jason and Jenna from PLG made me feel at ease. They explained every legal technicality in plain English and always returned my calls within 24 hours. I never felt like 'just another case number.' Their transparency and constant updates gave me incredible peace of mind during a very stressful time. Highly recommend for their professionalism and clear communication.

reviews.text: What happens when someone runs a red light and puts both of your elderly parents in the hospital?  Well, don't rely on Burien Police to document the accident appropriately.  Despite that fact, Jason Epstein was able to get our parents a reasonable settlement that more than took care of their expenses involving three hospitals, a totaled vehicle, and being laid up for a month. Jason and Aranza were extremely responsive, insightful, and experienced working with the unending challenges of the insurance, medical, and medicare systems. We're grateful for their help, which helped mom and dad end up just fine.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience with us! We’re glad that Jason and Aranza could assist you and your family in navigating such a difficult situation. It’s never easy dealing with the aftermath of an accident, but we’re thrilled to hear that your parents are doing better. We appreciate your trust in Premier Law, and we’ll be here if you ever need further assistance. Wishing you and your family all the best!
